- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1957","title":"The Perceptron and Connectionism","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>In 1957, American psychologist Frank Rosenblatt introduced the Perceptron in his technical report The Perceptron: A Perceiving and Recognizing Automaton. Widely regarded as the first trainable artificial neural network, the Perceptron marked the beginning of data-driven machine learning and laid the theoretical foundation for the development of modern deep learning.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1958-rosenblatt-perceptron_frank-rosenblatt.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1958-rosenblatt-perceptron_threshold.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1958-rosenblatt-perceptron_sensor-grid.svg","resources/images/1957-perceptron/people/1957-perceptron_people_01.jpg","resources/images/1957-perceptron/papers/1957-perceptron_papers_01.png","resources/images/1957-perceptron/historical/1957-perceptron_historical_01.jpg","resources/images/1957-perceptron/historical/1957-perceptron_historical_01.png"],"primaryVideo":{"id":"https://media.sciencearena.cn/video/1957%E6%84%9F%E7%9F%A5%E6%9C%BA%EF%BC%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%B7%A5%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E7%9A%84%E6%9C%80%E5%88%9D%E7%81%AB%E8%8A%B1.mp4","url":"https://media.sciencearena.cn/video/1957%E6%84%9F%E7%9F%A5%E6%9C%BA%EF%BC%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%B7%A5%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E7%9A%84%E6%9C%80%E5%88%9D%E7%81%AB%E8%8A%B1.mp4","embed_url":"https://media.sciencearena.cn/video/1957%E6%84%9F%E7%9F%A5%E6%9C%BA%EF%BC%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%B7%A5%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E7%9A%84%E6%9C%80%E5%88%9D%E7%81%AB%E8%8A%B1.mp4","title":"","channel":"","duration":"","thumbnail":"","source":"Web"},"quoteHtml":"\"Linear threshold learning machine\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>The perceptron paper record</em>, Frank Rosenblatt","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Neural networks / Rosenblatt Perceptron","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Linear threshold learning machine\"<br>source：<em>The perceptron paper record</em>, Frank Rosenblatt"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"In the 1950s, researchers were exploring machines inspired by neural and psychological models of perception. This context helps viewers place The Perceptron and Connectionism in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"A perceptron computes a weighted sum of inputs and fires when the sum crosses a threshold; mistakes trigger weight updates. The key mechanism is Linear threshold learning machine, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Rosenblatt's perceptron as a foundational neural-learning model and a symbol of early connectionist optimism. Its long-term legacy is the debate over linear separability and the path from single threshold units to multilayer representation learning.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1958-rosenblatt-perceptron-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the basic computation in a perceptron?","zh":"感知机的基本计算是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A weighted sum followed by a threshold decision","zh":"加权求和后进行阈值决策"},{"en":"A t-SNE perplexity search","zh":"t-SNE 困惑度搜索"},{"en":"A Bayesian network message pass only","zh":"仅贝叶斯网络消息传递"},{"en":"A molecular mass spectrum filter","zh":"分子质谱过滤器"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"A perceptron classifies by summing weighted inputs and comparing the result to a threshold.","zh":"感知机通过输入加权求和并与阈值比较来分类。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["neural-network","classification"]}]}`

### milestone-1958-wangs-algorithm

- Kind: changed

- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Proving theorems by pattern recognition I","zh":"通过模式识别证明定理 I"},"url":"https://cacm.acm.org/research/proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i/"},{"type":{"en":"Archive","zh":"档案"},"label":{"en":"Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II","zh":"通过模式识别证明定理（二）"},"url":"https://www.nokia.com/bell-labs/publications-and-media/publications/proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-ii/"},{"type":{"en":"Photo","zh":"照片"},"label":{"en":"Rockefeller University Digital Commons: Wang, Hao","zh":"Rockefeller University Digital Commons: 王浩, Hao"},"url":"https://digitalcommons.rockefeller.edu/faculty-members/109/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"通过模式识别证明定理 I","en":"Proving theorems by pattern recognition I"},"url":"https://cacm.acm.org/research/proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i/","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-ii","type":{"zh":"档案","en":"Archive"},"label":{"zh":"通过模式识别证明定理（二）","en":"Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II"},"url":"https://www.nokia.com/bell-labs/publications-and-media/publications/proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-ii/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"archive"},{"id":"source-rockefeller-university-digital-commons-wang-hao","type":{"zh":"照片","en":"Photo"},"label":{"zh":"Rockefeller University Digital Commons: 王浩, Hao","en":"Rockefeller University Digital Commons: Wang, Hao"},"url":"https://digitalcommons.rockefeller.edu/faculty-members/109/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"photo"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"The first paper appeared in Communications of the ACM in April 1960, with DOI 10.1145/367177.367224. Bell Labs' archive preserves the 1961 continuation, where Wang describes proof procedures for predicate calculus and related decision-problem cases.","zh":"第一篇论文发表于 1960 年 4 月 《ACM 通讯》，DOI 为 10.1145/367177.367224。贝尔实验室 档案保存了 1961 年续篇，其中 王浩 讨论了谓词演算证明过程及相关判定问题情形。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The key display idea is pattern-guided proof reduction: transform formulas into recognizable logical shapes, apply rules to split or simplify them, and close branches when a proof condition appears. The key mechanism is Pattern-guided proof procedure, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"展示重点是由模式引导的证明归约：把公式转换成可识别的逻辑形状，应用规则拆分或简化它们，并在出现证明条件时闭合分支。 关键机制是模式引导证明过程，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Wang's algorithm as an early milestone in automated theorem proving. Its long-term legacy is that it narrowed the gap between formal logic and machine execution, influencing later proof procedures and SAT-style reasoning.","zh":"专家通常把王氏算法视为自动定理证明的早期里程碑。它的长期影响在于缩小了形式逻辑与机器执行之间的距离，并影响了后来的证明过程和 SAT 式推理。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"published-papers","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"第一篇论文发表于 1960 年 4 月 《ACM 通讯》，DOI 为 10.1145/367177.367224。贝尔实验室 档案保存了 1961 年续篇，其中 王浩 讨论了谓词演算证明过程及相关判定问题情形。","en":"The first paper appeared in Communications of the ACM in April 1960, with DOI 10.1145/367177.367224. Bell Labs' archive preserves the 1961 continuation, where Wang describes proof procedures for predicate calculus and related decision-problem cases."},"sourceIds":["source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i"]},{"id":"pattern-logic","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"展示重点是由模式引导的证明归约：把公式转换成可识别的逻辑形状，应用规则拆分或简化它们，并在出现证明条件时闭合分支。","en":"The key display idea is pattern-guided proof reduction: transform formulas into recognizable logical shapes, apply rules to split or simplify them, and close branches when a proof condition appears."},"sourceIds":["source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把王氏算法视为自动定理证明的早期里程碑。它的长期影响在于缩小了形式逻辑与机器执行之间的距离，并影响了后来的证明过程和 SAT 式推理。","en":"Experts generally treat Wang's algorithm as an early milestone in automated theorem proving. Its long-term legacy is that it narrowed the gap between formal logic and machine execution, influencing later proof procedures and SAT-style reasoning."},"sourceIds":["source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1958-wangs-algorithm-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Wang's theorem-proving procedure use to avoid blind truth-table enumeration?","zh":"王氏定理证明过程用什么避免盲目真值表枚举？"},"options":[{"en":"Pattern-guided logical transformations","zh":"由模式引导的逻辑变换"},{"en":"Random screen colors","zh":"随机屏幕颜色"},{"en":"Only handwritten notes","zh":"只靠手写笔记"},{"en":"A fixed chess opening","zh":"固定国际象棋开局"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Wang framed proof search as recognizing and reducing logical patterns, not simply enumerating all truth assignments.","zh":"Wang把证明搜索表述为识别并归约逻辑模式，而不是简单枚举所有真值赋值。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["theorem-proving","pattern-recognition"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"quiz-1958-wangs-algorithm-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"王氏定理证明过程用什么避免盲目真值表枚举？","en":"What did Wang's theorem-proving procedure use to avoid blind truth-table enumeration?"},"options":[{"zh":"由模式引导的逻辑变换","en":"Pattern-guided logical transformations"},{"zh":"随机屏幕颜色","en":"Random screen colors"},{"zh":"只靠手写笔记","en":"Only handwritten notes"},{"zh":"固定国际象棋开局","en":"A fixed chess opening"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Wang把证明搜索表述为识别并归约逻辑模式，而不是简单枚举所有真值赋值。","en":"Wang framed proof search as recognizing and reducing logical patterns, not simply enumerating all truth assignments."},"sourceIds":["source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i"],"assetIds":["asset-1958-wangs-algorithm-hao-wang"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1958-1961","title":"王氏算法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>王浩的定理证明工作表明，机器可以通过识别逻辑结构模式来证明许多定理，而不只是盲目枚举真值表。他 1960 年发表于 CACM 的论文和 1961 年 《贝尔系统技术期刊》 的续篇，把形式逻辑推进成一种可运行的证明搜索方法。它连接了早期符号 AI 演示与后来的自动定理证明器。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1958-wangs-algorithm_hao-wang.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1958-wangs-algorithm_pattern-proof.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"给出了一个谓词演算的证明过程\"","quoteAttribution":"《通过模式识别证明定理（二）》, 王浩, 《贝尔系统技术期刊》, 1961","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / 王氏算法","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"给出了一个谓词演算的证明过程\"<br>source：《通过模式识别证明定理（二）》, 王浩, 《贝尔系统技术期刊》, 1961"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"第一篇论文发表于 1960 年 4 月 《ACM 通讯》，DOI 为 10.1145/367177.367224。贝尔实验室 档案保存了 1961 年续篇，其中 王浩 讨论了谓词演算证明过程及相关判定问题情形。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"展示重点是由模式引导的证明归约：把公式转换成可识别的逻辑形状，应用规则拆分或简化它们，并在出现证明条件时闭合分支。 关键机制是模式引导证明过程，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把王氏算法视为自动定理证明的早期里程碑。它的长期影响在于缩小了形式逻辑与机器执行之间的距离，并影响了后来的证明过程和 SAT 式推理。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1958-wangs-algorithm-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Wang's theorem-proving procedure use to avoid blind truth-table enumeration?","zh":"王氏定理证明过程用什么避免盲目真值表枚举？"},"options":[{"en":"Pattern-guided logical transformations","zh":"由模式引导的逻辑变换"},{"en":"Random screen colors","zh":"随机屏幕颜色"},{"en":"Only handwritten notes","zh":"只靠手写笔记"},{"en":"A fixed chess opening","zh":"固定国际象棋开局"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Wang framed proof search as recognizing and reducing logical patterns, not simply enumerating all truth assignments.","zh":"Wang把证明搜索表述为识别并归约逻辑模式，而不是简单枚举所有真值赋值。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["theorem-proving","pattern-recognition"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1958-1961","title":"王氏算法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>王浩的定理证明工作表明，机器可以通过识别逻辑结构模式来证明许多定理，而不只是盲目枚举真值表。他 1960 年发表于 CACM 的论文和 1961 年 《贝尔系统技术期刊》 的续篇，把形式逻辑推进成一种可运行的证明搜索方法。它连接了早期符号 AI 演示与后来的自动定理证明器。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1958-wangs-algorithm_hao-wang.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1958-wangs-algorithm_pattern-proof.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"给出了一个谓词演算的证明过程\"","quoteAttribution":"《通过模式识别证明定理（二）》, 王浩, 《贝尔系统技术期刊》, 1961","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / 王氏算法","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"给出了一个谓词演算的证明过程\"<br>source：《通过模式识别证明定理（二）》, 王浩, 《贝尔系统技术期刊》, 1961"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"第一篇论文发表于 1960 年 4 月 《ACM 通讯》，DOI 为 10.1145/367177.367224。贝尔实验室 档案保存了 1961 年续篇，其中 王浩 讨论了谓词演算证明过程及相关判定问题情形。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"展示重点是由模式引导的证明归约：把公式转换成可识别的逻辑形状，应用规则拆分或简化它们，并在出现证明条件时闭合分支。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把王氏算法视为自动定理证明的早期里程碑。它的长期影响在于缩小了形式逻辑与机器执行之间的距离，并影响了后来的证明过程和 SAT 式推理。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"quiz-1958-wangs-algorithm-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"王氏定理证明过程用什么避免盲目真值表枚举？","en":"What did Wang's theorem-proving procedure use to avoid blind truth-table enumeration?"},"options":[{"zh":"由模式引导的逻辑变换","en":"Pattern-guided logical transformations"},{"zh":"随机屏幕颜色","en":"Random screen colors"},{"zh":"只靠手写笔记","en":"Only handwritten notes"},{"zh":"固定国际象棋开局","en":"A fixed chess opening"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Wang把证明搜索表述为识别并归约逻辑模式，而不是简单枚举所有真值赋值。","en":"Wang framed proof search as recognizing and reducing logical patterns, not simply enumerating all truth assignments."},"sourceIds":["source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i"],"assetIds":["asset-1958-wangs-algorithm-hao-wang"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1958-1961","title":"Wang's Algorithm","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Hao Wang's theorem-proving work showed that a machine could prove many logical theorems by recognizing structural patterns rather than blindly enumerating truth tables. His 1960 CACM paper and 1961 Bell System Technical Journal continuation helped turn formal logic into an executable proof-search discipline. It stands between early symbolic AI demonstrations and later automated theorem provers.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1958-wangs-algorithm_hao-wang.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1958-wangs-algorithm_pattern-proof.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"A proof procedure for the predicate calculus is given\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II</em>, Hao Wang, Bell System Technical Journal, 1961","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Automated theorem proving / Wang's algorithm","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"A proof procedure for the predicate calculus is given\"<br>source：<em>Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II</em>, Hao Wang, Bell System Technical Journal, 1961"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"The first paper appeared in Communications of the ACM in April 1960, with DOI 10.1145/367177.367224. Bell Labs' archive preserves the 1961 continuation, where Wang describes proof procedures for predicate calculus and related decision-problem cases.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The key display idea is pattern-guided proof reduction: transform formulas into recognizable logical shapes, apply rules to split or simplify them, and close branches when a proof condition appears. The key mechanism is Pattern-guided proof procedure, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Wang's algorithm as an early milestone in automated theorem proving. Its long-term legacy is that it narrowed the gap between formal logic and machine execution, influencing later proof procedures and SAT-style reasoning.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1958-wangs-algorithm-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Wang's theorem-proving procedure use to avoid blind truth-table enumeration?","zh":"王氏定理证明过程用什么避免盲目真值表枚举？"},"options":[{"en":"Pattern-guided logical transformations","zh":"由模式引导的逻辑变换"},{"en":"Random screen colors","zh":"随机屏幕颜色"},{"en":"Only handwritten notes","zh":"只靠手写笔记"},{"en":"A fixed chess opening","zh":"固定国际象棋开局"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Wang framed proof search as recognizing and reducing logical patterns, not simply enumerating all truth assignments.","zh":"Wang把证明搜索表述为识别并归约逻辑模式，而不是简单枚举所有真值赋值。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["theorem-proving","pattern-recognition"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1958-1961","title":"Wang's Algorithm","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Hao Wang's theorem-proving work showed that a machine could prove many logical theorems by recognizing structural patterns rather than blindly enumerating truth tables. His 1960 CACM paper and 1961 Bell System Technical Journal continuation helped turn formal logic into an executable proof-search discipline. It stands between early symbolic AI demonstrations and later automated theorem provers.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1958-wangs-algorithm_hao-wang.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1958-wangs-algorithm_pattern-proof.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"A proof procedure for the predicate calculus is given\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II</em>, Hao Wang, Bell System Technical Journal, 1961","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Automated theorem proving / Wang's algorithm","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"A proof procedure for the predicate calculus is given\"<br>source：<em>Proving Theorems by Pattern Recognition - II</em>, Hao Wang, Bell System Technical Journal, 1961"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"The first paper appeared in Communications of the ACM in April 1960, with DOI 10.1145/367177.367224. Bell Labs' archive preserves the 1961 continuation, where Wang describes proof procedures for predicate calculus and related decision-problem cases.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The key display idea is pattern-guided proof reduction: transform formulas into recognizable logical shapes, apply rules to split or simplify them, and close branches when a proof condition appears.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Wang's algorithm as an early milestone in automated theorem proving. Its long-term legacy is that it narrowed the gap between formal logic and machine execution, influencing later proof procedures and SAT-style reasoning.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"quiz-1958-wangs-algorithm-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"王氏定理证明过程用什么避免盲目真值表枚举？","en":"What did Wang's theorem-proving procedure use to avoid blind truth-table enumeration?"},"options":[{"zh":"由模式引导的逻辑变换","en":"Pattern-guided logical transformations"},{"zh":"随机屏幕颜色","en":"Random screen colors"},{"zh":"只靠手写笔记","en":"Only handwritten notes"},{"zh":"固定国际象棋开局","en":"A fixed chess opening"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Wang把证明搜索表述为识别并归约逻辑模式，而不是简单枚举所有真值赋值。","en":"Wang framed proof search as recognizing and reducing logical patterns, not simply enumerating all truth assignments."},"sourceIds":["source-proving-theorems-by-pattern-recognition-i"],"assetIds":["asset-1958-wangs-algorithm-hao-wang"]}]}`

### milestone-1959-pandemonium

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1959"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Pandemonium: A Paradigm for Learning","zh":"群魔殿：一种学习范式"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-4899-1221-6_4"},{"type":{"en":"Image source","zh":"图片来源"},"label":{"en":"Pandemonium architecture image","zh":"Pandemonium 架构图片"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Original_pande2.jpg"},{"type":{"en":"Image source","zh":"图片来源"},"label":{"en":"Oliver Selfridge portrait","zh":"奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇 人物照片"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Oliver_Selfridge_at_BBN.jpg"},{"type":{"en":"Obituary","zh":"人物资料"},"label":{"en":"Oliver Selfridge obituary, The Guardian","zh":"奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇 讣告，卫报"},"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2008/dec/16/oliver-selfridge-obituary"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-pandemonium-a-paradigm-for-learning","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"群魔殿：一种学习范式","en":"Pandemonium: A Paradigm for Learning"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-4899-1221-6_4","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-pandemonium-architecture-image","type":{"zh":"图片来源","en":"Image source"},"label":{"zh":"Pandemonium 架构图片","en":"Pandemonium architecture image"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Original_pande2.jpg","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-oliver-selfridge-portrait","type":{"zh":"图片来源","en":"Image source"},"label":{"zh":"奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇 人物照片","en":"Oliver Selfridge portrait"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Oliver_Selfridge_at_BBN.jpg","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-oliver-selfridge-obituary-the-guardian","type":{"zh":"人物资料","en":"Obituary"},"label":{"zh":"奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇 讣告，卫报","en":"Oliver Selfridge obituary, The Guardian"},"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2008/dec/16/oliver-selfridge-obituary","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Early AI needed models for pattern recognition that were less brittle than hand-coded one-shot templates. This context helps viewers place Pandemonium in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","zh":"早期 AI 需要比一次性手写模板更不脆弱的模式识别模型。 这段背景帮助观众把Pandemonium 感知架构放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Multiple small recognizers respond to features; stronger responses propagate upward until a winning interpretation emerges. The key mechanism is Layered feature detection and voting, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"多个小型识别器响应特征；较强响应向上传播，直到形成获胜解释。 关键机制是分层特征检测与投票，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Pandemonium as an influential early model of distributed pattern recognition. Its long-term legacy is the idea of perception as evidence accumulation across layered detectors, which echoes in ensemble methods and hierarchical recognition systems.","zh":"专家通常把 Pandemonium 视为有影响力的早期分布式模式识别模型。它的长期影响在于把感知理解为分层检测器之间的证据累积，这一思想在集成方法和分层识别系统中仍有回响。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"早期 AI 需要比一次性手写模板更不脆弱的模式识别模型。 这段背景帮助观众把Pandemonium 感知架构放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","en":"Early AI needed models for pattern recognition that were less brittle than hand-coded one-shot templates. This context helps viewers place Pandemonium in the technical problems and research priorities of its time."},"sourceIds":["source-pandemonium-a-paradigm-for-learning"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"多个小型识别器响应特征；较强响应向上传播，直到形成获胜解释。 关键机制是分层特征检测与投票，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"Multiple small recognizers respond to features; stronger responses propagate upward until a winning interpretation emerges. The key mechanism is Layered feature detection and voting, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-pandemonium-a-paradigm-for-learning"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Pandemonium 视为有影响力的早期分布式模式识别模型。它的长期影响在于把感知理解为分层检测器之间的证据累积，这一思想在集成方法和分层识别系统中仍有回响。","en":"Experts generally treat Pandemonium as an influential early model of distributed pattern recognition. Its long-term legacy is the idea of perception as evidence accumulation across layered detectors, which echoes in ensemble methods and hierarchical recognition systems."},"sourceIds":["source-pandemonium-a-paradigm-for-learning"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1959-pandemonium-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the core idea of Pandemonium-style perception?","zh":"Pandemonium 式感知的核心思想是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Many simple feature recognizers vote toward higher-level patterns","zh":"许多简单特征识别器向高层模式投票"},{"en":"One fixed rule answers every image","zh":"一个固定规则回答所有图像"},{"en":"A database deletes all uncertain evidence","zh":"数据库删除所有不确定证据"},{"en":"A chess engine searches only openings","zh":"棋类引擎只搜索开局"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Selfridge's architecture treated recognition as layered, distributed evidence accumulation.","zh":"Selfridge 的架构把识别看作分层、分布式的证据累积。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["perception","pattern-recognition"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1959-pandemonium-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Pandemonium 式感知的核心思想是什么？","en":"What is the core idea of Pandemonium-style perception?"},"options":[{"zh":"许多简单特征识别器向高层模式投票","en":"Many simple feature recognizers vote toward higher-level patterns"},{"zh":"一个固定规则回答所有图像","en":"One fixed rule answers every image"},{"zh":"数据库删除所有不确定证据","en":"A database deletes all uncertain evidence"},{"zh":"棋类引擎只搜索开局","en":"A chess engine searches only openings"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Selfridge 的架构把识别看作分层、分布式的证据累积。","en":"Selfridge's architecture treated recognition as layered, distributed evidence accumulation."},"sourceIds":["source-pandemonium-a-paradigm-for-learning"],"assetIds":["asset-1959-pandemonium-oliver-selfridge"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1959","title":"Pandemonium 感知架构","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pandemonium 把感知描述为简单特征检测器与高层模式识别器之间的分层竞争。它用带噪声的分布式投票隐喻，预示了后来的集成识别、黑板式系统和分层模式处理思想。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1959-pandemonium_oliver-selfridge.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9e/Original_pande2.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1959-pandemonium_feature-votes.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1959-pandemonium_layered-recognition.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"分层特征投票构成感知\"","quoteAttribution":"《群魔殿：一种学习范式》, 奥利弗·G·塞尔弗里奇","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：感知 / Pandemonium 感知架构","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"分层特征投票构成感知\"<br>source：《群魔殿：一种学习范式》, 奥利弗·G·塞尔弗里奇"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"早期 AI 需要比一次性手写模板更不脆弱的模式识别模型。 这段背景帮助观众把Pandemonium 感知架构放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"多个小型识别器响应特征；较强响应向上传播，直到形成获胜解释。 关键机制是分层特征检测与投票，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Pandemonium 视为有影响力的早期分布式模式识别模型。它的长期影响在于把感知理解为分层检测器之间的证据累积，这一思想在集成方法和分层识别系统中仍有回响。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1959-pandemonium-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the core idea of Pandemonium-style perception?","zh":"Pandemonium 式感知的核心思想是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Many simple feature recognizers vote toward higher-level patterns","zh":"许多简单特征识别器向高层模式投票"},{"en":"One fixed rule answers every image","zh":"一个固定规则回答所有图像"},{"en":"A database deletes all uncertain evidence","zh":"数据库删除所有不确定证据"},{"en":"A chess engine searches only openings","zh":"棋类引擎只搜索开局"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Selfridge's architecture treated recognition as layered, distributed evidence accumulation.","zh":"Selfridge 的架构把识别看作分层、分布式的证据累积。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["perception","pattern-recognition"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1959","title":"Pandemonium 感知架构","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pandemonium 把感知描述为简单特征检测器与高层模式识别器之间的分层竞争。它用带噪声的分布式投票隐喻，预示了后来的集成识别、黑板式系统和分层模式处理思想。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1959-pandemonium_oliver-selfridge.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9e/Original_pande2.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1959-pandemonium_feature-votes.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1959-pandemonium_layered-recognition.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"分层特征投票构成感知\"","quoteAttribution":"《群魔殿：一种学习范式》, 奥利弗·G·塞尔弗里奇","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：感知 / Pandemonium 感知架构","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"分层特征投票构成感知\"<br>source：《群魔殿：一种学习范式》, 奥利弗·G·塞尔弗里奇"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"早期 AI 需要比一次性手写模板更不脆弱的模式识别模型。 这段背景帮助观众把Pandemonium 感知架构放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"多个小型识别器响应特征；较强响应向上传播，直到形成获胜解释。 关键机制是分层特征检测与投票，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Pandemonium 视为有影响力的早期分布式模式识别模型。它的长期影响在于把感知理解为分层检测器之间的证据累积，这一思想在集成方法和分层识别系统中仍有回响。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1959-pandemonium-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Pandemonium 式感知的核心思想是什么？","en":"What is the core idea of Pandemonium-style perception?"},"options":[{"zh":"许多简单特征识别器向高层模式投票","en":"Many simple feature recognizers vote toward higher-level patterns"},{"zh":"一个固定规则回答所有图像","en":"One fixed rule answers every image"},{"zh":"数据库删除所有不确定证据","en":"A database deletes all uncertain evidence"},{"zh":"棋类引擎只搜索开局","en":"A chess engine searches only openings"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Selfridge 的架构把识别看作分层、分布式的证据累积。","en":"Selfridge's architecture treated recognition as layered, distributed evidence accumulation."},"sourceIds":["source-pandemonium-a-paradigm-for-learning"],"assetIds":["asset-1959-pandemonium-oliver-selfridge"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1959","title":"Pandemonium","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pandemonium described perception as a layered competition among simple feature detectors and higher-level pattern recognizers. Its noisy, distributed voting metaphor anticipated later ideas in ensemble recognition, blackboard-style systems, and layered pattern processing.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1959-pandemonium_oliver-selfridge.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9e/Original_pande2.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1959-pandemonium_feature-votes.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1959-pandemonium_layered-recognition.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Layered feature voters build perception\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Pandemonium: A Paradigm for Learning</em>, Oliver G. Selfridge","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Perception / Pandemonium","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Layered feature voters build perception\"<br>source：<em>Pandemonium: A Paradigm for Learning</em>, Oliver G. Selfridge"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Early AI needed models for pattern recognition that were less brittle than hand-coded one-shot templates. This context helps viewers place Pandemonium in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Multiple small recognizers respond to features; stronger responses propagate upward until a winning interpretation emerges. The key mechanism is Layered feature detection and voting, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Pandemonium as an influential early model of distributed pattern recognition. Its long-term legacy is the idea of perception as evidence accumulation across layered detectors, which echoes in ensemble methods and hierarchical recognition systems.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1959-pandemonium-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the core idea of Pandemonium-style perception?","zh":"Pandemonium 式感知的核心思想是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Many simple feature recognizers vote toward higher-level patterns","zh":"许多简单特征识别器向高层模式投票"},{"en":"One fixed rule answers every image","zh":"一个固定规则回答所有图像"},{"en":"A database deletes all uncertain evidence","zh":"数据库删除所有不确定证据"},{"en":"A chess engine searches only openings","zh":"棋类引擎只搜索开局"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Selfridge's architecture treated recognition as layered, distributed evidence accumulation.","zh":"Selfridge 的架构把识别看作分层、分布式的证据累积。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["perception","pattern-recognition"]}]}`

### milestone-1960-davis-putnam-dpll

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1960-1962"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"A Computing Procedure for Quantification Theory","zh":"量词理论的计算过程"},"url":"https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/321033.321034"},{"type":{"en":"Program","zh":"程序"},"label":{"en":"A machine program for theorem-proving","zh":"用于定理证明的机器程序"},"url":"https://cacm.acm.org/research/a-machine-program-for-theorem-proving/"},{"type":{"en":"Photo","zh":"照片"},"label":{"en":"Wikimedia Commons: Hilary Putnam","zh":"维基共享资源: 希拉里·普特南"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Hilary_Putnam.jpg"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-a-computing-procedure-for-quantification-theory","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"量词理论的计算过程","en":"A Computing Procedure for Quantification Theory"},"url":"https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/321033.321034","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-a-machine-program-for-theorem-proving","type":{"zh":"程序","en":"Program"},"label":{"zh":"用于定理证明的机器程序","en":"A machine program for theorem-proving"},"url":"https://cacm.acm.org/research/a-machine-program-for-theorem-proving/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"program"},{"id":"source-wikimedia-commons-hilary-putnam","type":{"zh":"照片","en":"Photo"},"label":{"zh":"维基共享资源: 希拉里·普特南","en":"Wikimedia Commons: Hilary Putnam"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Hilary_Putnam.jpg","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"photo"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Davis and Putnam's 1960 JACM paper introduced a proof procedure for quantification theory. The 1962 Communications of the ACM article by Davis, Logemann, and Loveland reported a machine program for theorem proving, creating the DPLL lineage.","zh":"Davis 和 Putnam 1960 年 《ACM 杂志》 论文提出了量词理论证明过程。Davis、Logemann 与 Loveland 1962 年发表于 《ACM 通讯》 的文章报告了一个定理证明机器程序，形成了 DPLL 这一脉络。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The interface should show disciplined branching: simplify clauses, propagate forced assignments, split on a variable, and backtrack when a branch becomes impossible. The key mechanism is SAT search with propagation, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"界面应展示有纪律的分支搜索：简化子句、传播被迫赋值、选择变量分裂，并在分支不可能时回溯。 关键机制是带传播的 SAT 搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Davis-Putnam and DPLL as foundational work behind practical SAT solving. Their long-term legacy is the search-and-propagate structure that still underlies modern solvers, even after learning, restarts, watched literals, and heuristics were added.","zh":"专家通常把 Davis-Putnam 和 DPLL 视为实用 SAT 求解背后的基础工作。它们的长期影响在于搜索与传播结构至今仍支撑现代求解器，即使后来加入了学习、重启、watched literals 和启发式策略。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"published-papers","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"Davis 和 Putnam 1960 年 《ACM 杂志》 论文提出了量词理论证明过程。Davis、Logemann 与 Loveland 1962 年发表于 《ACM 通讯》 的文章报告了一个定理证明机器程序，形成了 DPLL 这一脉络。","en":"Davis and Putnam's 1960 JACM paper introduced a proof procedure for quantification theory. The 1962 Communications of the ACM article by Davis, Logemann, and Loveland reported a machine program for theorem proving, creating the DPLL lineage."},"sourceIds":["source-a-computing-procedure-for-quantification-theory"]},{"id":"sat-search","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"界面应展示有纪律的分支搜索：简化子句、传播被迫赋值、选择变量分裂，并在分支不可能时回溯。","en":"The interface should show disciplined branching: simplify clauses, propagate forced assignments, split on a variable, and backtrack when a branch becomes impossible."},"sourceIds":["source-a-computing-procedure-for-quantification-theory"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Davis-Putnam 和 DPLL 视为实用 SAT 求解背后的基础工作。它们的长期影响在于搜索与传播结构至今仍支撑现代求解器，即使后来加入了学习、重启、watched literals 和启发式策略。","en":"Experts generally treat Davis-Putnam and DPLL as foundational work behind practical SAT solving. Their long-term legacy is the search-and-propagate structure that still underlies modern solvers, even after learning, restarts, watched literals, and heuristics were added."},"sourceIds":["source-a-computing-procedure-for-quantification-theory"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1960-davis-putnam-dpll-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What SAT-solving structure did DPLL make central?","zh":"DPLL 让 SAT 求解的哪种结构成为核心？"},"options":[{"en":"Branching, propagation, and backtracking","zh":"分支、传播与回溯"},{"en":"Painting a circuit board","zh":"给电路板上色"},{"en":"Sorting portraits by brightness","zh":"按亮度排序肖像"},{"en":"Replacing logic with audio signals","zh":"用音频信号替代逻辑"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"DPLL recursively branches on assignments, propagates forced literals, and backtracks when a contradiction appears.","zh":"DPLL 递归选择赋值分支，传播被迫文字，并在出现矛盾时回溯。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["sat","search","theorem-proving"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"quiz-1960-davis-putnam-dpll-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"DPLL 让 SAT 求解的哪种结构成为核心？","en":"What SAT-solving structure did DPLL make central?"},"options":[{"zh":"分支、传播与回溯","en":"Branching, propagation, and backtracking"},{"zh":"给电路板上色","en":"Painting a circuit board"},{"zh":"按亮度排序肖像","en":"Sorting portraits by brightness"},{"zh":"用音频信号替代逻辑","en":"Replacing logic with audio signals"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"DPLL 递归选择赋值分支，传播被迫文字，并在出现矛盾时回溯。","en":"DPLL recursively branches on assignments, propagates forced literals, and backtracks when a contradiction appears."},"sourceIds":["source-a-computing-procedure-for-quantification-theory"],"assetIds":["asset-1960-davis-putnam-dpll-hilary-putnam"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1960-1962","title":"DP/DPLL 算法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Davis-Putnam 过程及其 DPLL 改进，把逻辑可满足性变成了自动推理中的实用搜索问题。Davis 和 Putnam 1960 年 《ACM 杂志》 论文把量词理论与可行证明过程联系起来，Davis、Logemann 和 Loveland 1962 年程序又用传播和回溯改进了 SAT 搜索。这条线索今天仍贯穿 SAT、SMT、规划、验证和约束求解系统。</p>","figures":["","","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1960-davis-putnam-dpll_hilary-putnam.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1960-davis-putnam-dpll_sat-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"给出了量词理论的统一证明过程\"","quoteAttribution":"《量词理论的计算过程》, 马丁·戴维斯、希拉里·普特南, 《ACM 杂志》, 1960","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / Davis-Putnam 算法与 DPLL","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"给出了量词理论的统一证明过程\"<br>source：《量词理论的计算过程》, 马丁·戴维斯、希拉里·普特南, 《ACM 杂志》, 1960"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"Davis 和 Putnam 1960 年 《ACM 杂志》 论文提出了量词理论证明过程。Davis、Logemann 与 Loveland 1962 年发表于 《ACM 通讯》 的文章报告了一个定理证明机器程序，形成了 DPLL 这一脉络。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"界面应展示有纪律的分支搜索：简化子句、传播被迫赋值、选择变量分裂，并在分支不可能时回溯。 关键机制是带传播的 SAT 搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Davis-Putnam 和 DPLL 视为实用 SAT 求解背后的基础工作。它们的长期影响在于搜索与传播结构至今仍支撑现代求解器，即使后来加入了学习、重启、watched literals 和启发式策略。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1960-davis-putnam-dpll-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What SAT-solving structure did DPLL make central?","zh":"DPLL 让 SAT 求解的哪种结构成为核心？"},"options":[{"en":"Branching, propagation, and backtracking","zh":"分支、传播与回溯"},{"en":"Painting a circuit board","zh":"给电路板上色"},{"en":"Sorting portraits by brightness","zh":"按亮度排序肖像"},{"en":"Replacing logic with audio signals","zh":"用音频信号替代逻辑"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"DPLL recursively branches on assignments, propagates forced literals, and backtracks when a contradiction appears.","zh":"DPLL 递归选择赋值分支，传播被迫文字，并在出现矛盾时回溯。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["sat","search","theorem-proving"]}]}`

论文提出了量词理论证明过程。Davis、Logemann 与 Loveland 1962 年发表于 《ACM 通讯》 的文章报告了一个定理证明机器程序，形成了 DPLL 这一脉络。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"界面应展示有纪律的分支搜索：简化子句、传播被迫赋值、选择变量分裂，并在分支不可能时回溯。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Davis-Putnam 和 DPLL 视为实用 SAT 求解背后的基础工作。它们的长期影响在于搜索与传播结构至今仍支撑现代求解器，即使后来加入了学习、重启、watched literals 和启发式策略。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"quiz-1960-davis-putnam-dpll-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"DPLL 让 SAT 求解的哪种结构成为核心？","en":"What SAT-solving structure did DPLL make central?"},"options":[{"zh":"分支、传播与回溯","en":"Branching, propagation, and backtracking"},{"zh":"给电路板上色","en":"Painting a circuit board"},{"zh":"按亮度排序肖像","en":"Sorting portraits by brightness"},{"zh":"用音频信号替代逻辑","en":"Replacing logic with audio signals"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"DPLL 递归选择赋值分支，传播被迫文字，并在出现矛盾时回溯。","en":"DPLL recursively branches on assignments, propagates forced literals, and backtracks when a contradiction appears."},"sourceIds":["source-a-computing-procedure-for-quantification-theory"],"assetIds":["asset-1960-davis-putnam-dpll-hilary-putnam"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1960-1962","title":"Davis-Putnam & DPLL","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>The Davis-Putnam procedure and its DPLL refinement made logical satisfiability a practical search problem for automated reasoning. Davis and Putnam's 1960 JACM paper connected quantification theory to feasible proof procedures, while Davis, Logemann, and Loveland's 1962 program refined SAT search with propagation and backtracking. The lineage still runs through modern SAT, SMT, planning, verification, and constraint-solving systems.</p>","figures":["","","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1960-davis-putnam-dpll_hilary-putnam.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1960-davis-putnam-dpll_sat-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"a uniform proof procedure for quantification theory is given\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>A Computing Procedure for Quantification Theory</em>, Martin Davis and Hilary Putnam, Journal of the ACM, 1960","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Automated theorem proving / Davis-Putnam algorithm & DPLL","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"a uniform proof procedure for quantification theory is given\"<br>source：<em>A Computing Procedure for Quantification Theory</em>, Martin Davis and Hilary Putnam, Journal of the ACM, 1960"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Davis and Putnam's 1960 JACM paper introduced a proof procedure for quantification theory. The 1962 Communications of the ACM article by Davis, Logemann, and Loveland reported a machine program for theorem proving, creating the DPLL lineage.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The interface should show disciplined branching: simplify clauses, propagate forced assignments, split on a variable, and backtrack when a branch becomes impossible. The key mechanism is SAT search with propagation, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Davis-Putnam and DPLL as foundational work behind practical SAT solving. Their long-term legacy is the search-and-propagate structure that still underlies modern solvers, even after learning, restarts, watched literals, and heuristics were added.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1960-davis-putnam-dpll-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What SAT-solving structure did DPLL make central?","zh":"DPLL 让 SAT 求解的哪种结构成为核心？"},"options":[{"en":"Branching, propagation, and backtracking","zh":"分支、传播与回溯"},{"en":"Painting a circuit board","zh":"给电路板上色"},{"en":"Sorting portraits by brightness","zh":"按亮度排序肖像"},{"en":"Replacing logic with audio signals","zh":"用音频信号替代逻辑"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"DPLL recursively branches on assignments, propagates forced literals, and backtracks when a contradiction appears.","zh":"DPLL 递归选择赋值分支，传播被迫文字，并在出现矛盾时回溯。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["sat","search","theorem-proving"]}]}`

  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Applications of Artificial Intelligence for Chemical Inference","zh":"人工智能在化学推断中的应用"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1021/ci60034a002"},{"type":{"en":"Award","zh":"奖项资料"},"label":{"en":"ACM Turing Award profile for Edward Feigenbaum","zh":"ACM 图灵 Award profile for 爱德华·费根鲍姆"},"url":"https://awards.acm.org/award-recipients/feigenbaum_4167235"},{"type":{"en":"History","zh":"历史资料"},"label":{"en":"Stanford Knowledge Systems Laboratory history","zh":"斯坦福大学 Knowledge Systems Laboratory history"},"url":"http://ksl-web.stanford.edu/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-applications-of-artificial-intelligence-for-chemical-inference","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"人工智能在化学推断中的应用","en":"Applications of Artificial Intelligence for Chemical Inference"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1021/ci60034a002","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-acm-turing-award-profile-for-edward-feigenbaum","type":{"zh":"奖项资料","en":"Award"},"label":{"zh":"ACM 图灵 Award profile for 爱德华·费根鲍姆","en":"ACM Turing Award profile for Edward Feigenbaum"},"url":"https://awards.acm.org/award-recipients/feigenbaum_4167235","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-stanford-knowledge-systems-laboratory-history","type":{"zh":"历史资料","en":"History"},"label":{"zh":"斯坦福大学 Knowledge Systems Laboratory history","en":"Stanford Knowledge Systems Laboratory history"},"url":"http://ksl-web.stanford.edu/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"General-purpose problem solving was not enough for hard scientific tasks. DENDRAL showed that carefully encoded expertise could focus search.","zh":"通用问题求解不足以处理困难科学任务。DENDRAL 表明，精心编码的专业知识可以聚焦搜索。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The system generated candidate molecular structures and rejected impossible ones using chemical constraints. The key mechanism is Rule-guided chemical structure inference, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"系统生成候选分子结构，并用化学约束排除不可能的候选。 关键机制是规则引导的化学结构推断，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat DENDRAL as one of the first convincing demonstrations that domain knowledge could make AI useful. Its long-term legacy is the expert-system and knowledge-engineering tradition in chemistry, medicine, and enterprise decision support.","zh":"专家通常把 DENDRAL 视为最早有力证明领域知识能让 AI 变得有用的系统之一。它的长期影响在于推动了化学、医学和企业决策支持中的专家系统与知识工程传统。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"通用问题求解不足以处理困难科学任务。DENDRAL 表明，精心编码的专业知识可以聚焦搜索。","en":"General-purpose problem solving was not enough for hard scientific tasks. DENDRAL showed that carefully encoded expertise could focus search."},"sourceIds":["source-applications-of-artificial-intelligence-for-chemical-inference"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"系统生成候选分子结构，并用化学约束排除不可能的候选。 关键机制是规则引导的化学结构推断，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"The system generated candidate molecular structures and rejected impossible ones using chemical constraints. The key mechanism is Rule-guided chemical structure inference, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-applications-of-artificial-intelligence-for-chemical-inference"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 DENDRAL 视为最早有力证明领域知识能让 AI 变得有用的系统之一。它的长期影响在于推动了化学、医学和企业决策支持中的专家系统与知识工程传统。","en":"Experts generally treat DENDRAL as one of the first convincing demonstrations that domain knowledge could make AI useful. Its long-term legacy is the expert-system and knowledge-engineering tradition in chemistry, medicine, and enterprise decision support."},"sourceIds":["source-applications-of-artificial-intelligence-for-chemical-inference"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1965-dendral-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What made DENDRAL historically important?","zh":"DENDRAL 的历史重要性主要是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"It used expert chemical knowledge to guide scientific inference","zh":"它用专家化学知识引导科学推断"},{"en":"It invented t-SNE visualization","zh":"它发明了 t-SNE 可视化"},{"en":"It normalized neural activations","zh":"它归一化神经激活"},{"en":"It won at Go with Monte Carlo tree search","zh":"它用蒙特卡洛树搜索赢围棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"DENDRAL helped show that knowledge-rich expert systems could solve practical scientific tasks.","zh":"DENDRAL 表明富知识专家系统可以解决实际科学任务。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["expert-system","science"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1965-dendral-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"DENDRAL 的历史重要性主要是什么？","en":"What made DENDRAL historically important?"},"options":[{"zh":"它用专家化学知识引导科学推断","en":"It used expert chemical knowledge to guide scientific inference"},{"zh":"它发明了 t-SNE 可视化","en":"It invented t-SNE visualization"},{"zh":"它归一化神经激活","en":"It normalized neural activations"},{"zh":"它用蒙特卡洛树搜索赢围棋","en":"It won at Go with Monte Carlo tree search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"DENDRAL 表明富知识专家系统可以解决实际科学任务。","en":"DENDRAL helped show that knowledge-rich expert systems could solve practical scientific tasks."},"sourceIds":["source-applications-of-artificial-intelligence-for-chemical-inference"],"assetIds":["asset-1965-dendral-edward-feigenbaum"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1965","title":"DENDRAL","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>DENDRAL 是最早展示领域知识能让 AI 具有实际用途的专家系统之一。它把搜索与专家化学规则结合起来，根据质谱证据推断分子结构。这个项目把注意力从单纯通用推理转向富知识系统。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1965-dendral_edward-feigenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-dendral_mass-spectrum.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-dendral_rule-filter.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"规则引导的化学结构推断\"","quoteAttribution":"《化学推断论文记录》, 爱德华·费根鲍姆","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：专家系统 / DENDRAL","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"规则引导的化学结构推断\"<br>source：《化学推断论文记录》, 爱德华·费根鲍姆"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"通用问题求解不足以处理困难科学任务。DENDRAL 表明，精心编码的专业知识可以聚焦搜索。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"系统生成候选分子结构，并用化学约束排除不可能的候选。 关键机制是规则引导的化学结构推断，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 DENDRAL 视为最早有力证明领域知识能让 AI 变得有用的系统之一。它的长期影响在于推动了化学、医学和企业决策支持中的专家系统与知识工程传统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1965-dendral-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What made DENDRAL historically important?","zh":"DENDRAL 的历史重要性主要是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"It used expert chemical knowledge to guide scientific inference","zh":"它用专家化学知识引导科学推断"},{"en":"It invented t-SNE visualization","zh":"它发明了 t-SNE 可视化"},{"en":"It normalized neural activations","zh":"它归一化神经激活"},{"en":"It won at Go with Monte Carlo tree search","zh":"它用蒙特卡洛树搜索赢围棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"DENDRAL helped show that knowledge-rich expert systems could solve practical scientific tasks.","zh":"DENDRAL 表明富知识专家系统可以解决实际科学任务。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["expert-system","science"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1965","title":"DENDRAL","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>DENDRAL 是最早展示领域知识能让 AI 具有实际用途的专家系统之一。它把搜索与专家化学规则结合起来，根据质谱证据推断分子结构。这个项目把注意力从单纯通用推理转向富知识系统。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1965-dendral_edward-feigenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-dendral_mass-spectrum.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-dendral_rule-filter.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"规则引导的化学结构推断\"","quoteAttribution":"《化学推断论文记录》, 爱德华·费根鲍姆","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：专家系统 / DENDRAL","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"规则引导的化学结构推断\"<br>source：《化学推断论文记录》, 爱德华·费根鲍姆"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"通用问题求解不足以处理困难科学任务。DENDRAL 表明，精心编码的专业知识可以聚焦搜索。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"系统生成候选分子结构，并用化学约束排除不可能的候选。 关键机制是规则引导的化学结构推断，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 DENDRAL 视为最早有力证明领域知识能让 AI 变得有用的系统之一。它的长期影响在于推动了化学、医学和企业决策支持中的专家系统与知识工程传统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1965-dendral-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"DENDRAL 的历史重要性主要是什么？","en":"What made DENDRAL historically important?"},"options":[{"zh":"它用专家化学知识引导科学推断","en":"It used expert chemical knowledge to guide scientific inference"},{"zh":"它发明了 t-SNE 可视化","en":"It invented t-SNE visualization"},{"zh":"它归一化神经激活","en":"It normalized neural activations"},{"zh":"它用蒙特卡洛树搜索赢围棋","en":"It won at Go with Monte Carlo tree search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"DENDRAL 表明富知识专家系统可以解决实际科学任务。","en":"DENDRAL helped show that knowledge-rich expert systems could solve practical scientific tasks."},"sourceIds":["source-applications-of-artificial-intelligence-for-chemical-inference"],"assetIds":["asset-1965-dendral-edward-feigenbaum"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1965","title":"DENDRAL","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>DENDRAL was one of the first expert systems to show that domain knowledge could make AI practically useful. It helped infer molecular structures from mass-spectrometry evidence by combining search with expert chemical rules. The project shifted attention from general reasoning alone to knowledge-rich systems.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1965-dendral_edward-feigenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-dendral_mass-spectrum.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-dendral_rule-filter.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Rule-guided chemical structure inference\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Chemical inference paper record</em>, Edward Feigenbaum","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Expert systems / DENDRAL","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Rule-guided chemical structure inference\"<br>source：<em>Chemical inference paper record</em>, Edward Feigenbaum"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"General-purpose problem solving was not enough for hard scientific tasks. DENDRAL showed that carefully encoded expertise could focus search.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The system generated candidate molecular structures and rejected impossible ones using chemical constraints. The key mechanism is Rule-guided chemical structure inference, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat DENDRAL as one of the first convincing demonstrations that domain knowledge could make AI useful. Its long-term legacy is the expert-system and knowledge-engineering tradition in chemistry, medicine, and enterprise decision support.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1965-dendral-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What made DENDRAL historically important?","zh":"DENDRAL 的历史重要性主要是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"It used expert chemical knowledge to guide scientific inference","zh":"它用专家化学知识引导科学推断"},{"en":"It invented t-SNE visualization","zh":"它发明了 t-SNE 可视化"},{"en":"It normalized neural activations","zh":"它归一化神经激活"},{"en":"It won at Go with Monte Carlo tree search","zh":"它用蒙特卡洛树搜索赢围棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"DENDRAL helped show that knowledge-rich expert systems could solve practical scientific tasks.","zh":"DENDRAL 表明富知识专家系统可以解决实际科学任务。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["expert-system","science"]}]}`

  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1965"`

  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"A Machine-Oriented Logic Based on the Resolution Principle","zh":"基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1145/321250.321253"},{"type":{"en":"Review","zh":"评述"},"label":{"en":"Journal of Symbolic Logic review record","zh":"Journal of Symbolic Logic review record"},"url":"https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/journal-of-symbolic-logic/article/j-a-robinson-a-machineoriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle-journal-of-the-association-for-computing-machinery-vol-12-1965-pp-2341/65679C30B9D7D7763FFB700CA77B18B1"},{"type":{"en":"Background","zh":"背景"},"label":{"en":"Stanford Encyclopedia: Automated Reasoning","zh":"斯坦福大学 Encyclopedia: Automated Reasoning"},"url":"https://plato.stanford.edu/entries/reasoning-automated/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-a-machine-oriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑","en":"A Machine-Oriented Logic Based on the Resolution Principle"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1145/321250.321253","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-journal-of-symbolic-logic-review-record","type":{"zh":"评述","en":"Review"},"label":{"zh":"Journal of Symbolic Logic review record","en":"Journal of Symbolic Logic review record"},"url":"https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/journal-of-symbolic-logic/article/j-a-robinson-a-machineoriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle-journal-of-the-association-for-computing-machinery-vol-12-1965-pp-2341/65679C30B9D7D7763FFB700CA77B18B1","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-stanford-encyclopedia-automated-reasoning","type":{"zh":"背景","en":"Background"},"label":{"zh":"斯坦福大学 Encyclopedia: Automated Reasoning","en":"Stanford Encyclopedia: Automated Reasoning"},"url":"https://plato.stanford.edu/entries/reasoning-automated/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Earlier theorem provers often needed many specialized inference rules. Resolution reduced proof search to a small number of clause operations, making mechanized logic less ad hoc.","zh":"早期定理证明器往往依赖许多专门推理规则。归结把证明搜索压缩为少量子句操作，让机械化逻辑不再那么临时拼装。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The key move is refutation: assume the claim is false, then repeatedly resolve complementary literals until the empty clause appears. The key mechanism is Clause refutation with unification, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"关键动作是反驳：先假设结论为假，再不断归结互补文字，直到推出空子句。 关键机制是带合一的子句反驳，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat resolution as a foundational proof method for symbolic AI and automated reasoning. Its long-term legacy is visible in theorem proving, logic programming, SAT/SMT lineages, and constraint-based reasoning systems.","zh":"专家通常把归结法视为符号 AI 和自动推理的基础证明方法。它的长期影响体现在定理证明、逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系和基于约束的推理系统中。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"早期定理证明器往往依赖许多专门推理规则。归结把证明搜索压缩为少量子句操作，让机械化逻辑不再那么临时拼装。","en":"Earlier theorem provers often needed many specialized inference rules. Resolution reduced proof search to a small number of clause operations, making mechanized logic less ad hoc."},"sourceIds":["source-a-machine-oriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"关键动作是反驳：先假设结论为假，再不断归结互补文字，直到推出空子句。 关键机制是带合一的子句反驳，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"The key move is refutation: assume the claim is false, then repeatedly resolve complementary literals until the empty clause appears. The key mechanism is Clause refutation with unification, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-a-machine-oriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把归结法视为符号 AI 和自动推理的基础证明方法。它的长期影响体现在定理证明、逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系和基于约束的推理系统中。","en":"Experts generally treat resolution as a foundational proof method for symbolic AI and automated reasoning. Its long-term legacy is visible in theorem proving, logic programming, SAT/SMT lineages, and constraint-based reasoning systems."},"sourceIds":["source-a-machine-oriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1965-resolution-method-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does the resolution method try to derive after negating the target claim?","zh":"归结方法在否定目标结论后试图推出什么？"},"options":[{"en":"The empty clause, showing contradiction","zh":"空子句，表示矛盾"},{"en":"A larger image dataset","zh":"更大的图像数据集"},{"en":"A random dropout mask","zh":"随机 dropout 掩码"},{"en":"A chess opening book","zh":"国际象棋开局库"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Resolution is usually used as refutation: if the premises plus the negated goal imply the empty clause, the original goal follows.","zh":"归结通常作为反驳证明使用：如果前提加否定目标能推出空子句，原目标就成立。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["logic","reasoning"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1965-resolution-method-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"归结方法在否定目标结论后试图推出什么？","en":"What does the resolution method try to derive after negating the target claim?"},"options":[{"zh":"空子句，表示矛盾","en":"The empty clause, showing contradiction"},{"zh":"更大的图像数据集","en":"A larger image dataset"},{"zh":"随机 dropout 掩码","en":"A random dropout mask"},{"zh":"国际象棋开局库","en":"A chess opening book"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"归结通常作为反驳证明使用：如果前提加否定目标能推出空子句，原目标就成立。","en":"Resolution is usually used as refutation: if the premises plus the negated goal imply the empty clause, the original goal follows."},"sourceIds":["source-a-machine-oriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle"],"assetIds":["asset-1965-resolution-method-john-alan-robinson"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1965","title":"归结方法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>归结方法把一阶定理证明变成统一的反驳过程：把命题转为子句，否定目标，再推出矛盾。Robinson 将归结与合一结合起来，让自动证明器获得一种可系统实现的紧凑规则。它后来成为逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系以及许多推理系统的基础。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1965-resolution-method_john-alan-robinson.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-resolution-method_clause-refutation.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-resolution-method_unification-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"归结原理\"","quoteAttribution":"《基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑》, 约翰·艾伦·罗宾逊, 《ACM 杂志》, 1965","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / 归结方法","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"归结原理\"<br>source：《基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑》, 约翰·艾伦·罗宾逊, 《ACM 杂志》, 1965"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"早期定理证明器往往依赖许多专门推理规则。归结把证明搜索压缩为少量子句操作，让机械化逻辑不再那么临时拼装。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"关键动作是反驳：先假设结论为假，再不断归结互补文字，直到推出空子句。 关键机制是带合一的子句反驳，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把归结法视为符号 AI 和自动推理的基础证明方法。它的长期影响体现在定理证明、逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系和基于约束的推理系统中。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1965-resolution-method-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does the resolution method try to derive after negating the target claim?","zh":"归结方法在否定目标结论后试图推出什么？"},"options":[{"en":"The empty clause, showing contradiction","zh":"空子句，表示矛盾"},{"en":"A larger image dataset","zh":"更大的图像数据集"},{"en":"A random dropout mask","zh":"随机 dropout 掩码"},{"en":"A chess opening book","zh":"国际象棋开局库"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Resolution is usually used as refutation: if the premises plus the negated goal imply the empty clause, the original goal follows.","zh":"归结通常作为反驳证明使用：如果前提加否定目标能推出空子句，原目标就成立。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["logic","reasoning"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1965","title":"归结方法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>归结方法把一阶定理证明变成统一的反驳过程：把命题转为子句，否定目标，再推出矛盾。Robinson 将归结与合一结合起来，让自动证明器获得一种可系统实现的紧凑规则。它后来成为逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系以及许多推理系统的基础。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1965-resolution-method_john-alan-robinson.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-resolution-method_clause-refutation.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-resolution-method_unification-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"归结原理\"","quoteAttribution":"《基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑》, 约翰·艾伦·罗宾逊, 《ACM 杂志》, 1965","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / 归结方法","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"归结原理\"<br>source：《基于归结原理的机器导向逻辑》, 约翰·艾伦·罗宾逊, 《ACM 杂志》, 1965"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"早期定理证明器往往依赖许多专门推理规则。归结把证明搜索压缩为少量子句操作，让机械化逻辑不再那么临时拼装。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"关键动作是反驳：先假设结论为假，再不断归结互补文字，直到推出空子句。 关键机制是带合一的子句反驳，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把归结法视为符号 AI 和自动推理的基础证明方法。它的长期影响体现在定理证明、逻辑程序设计、SAT/SMT 谱系和基于约束的推理系统中。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1965-resolution-method-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"归结方法在否定目标结论后试图推出什么？","en":"What does the resolution method try to derive after negating the target claim?"},"options":[{"zh":"空子句，表示矛盾","en":"The empty clause, showing contradiction"},{"zh":"更大的图像数据集","en":"A larger image dataset"},{"zh":"随机 dropout 掩码","en":"A random dropout mask"},{"zh":"国际象棋开局库","en":"A chess opening book"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"归结通常作为反驳证明使用：如果前提加否定目标能推出空子句，原目标就成立。","en":"Resolution is usually used as refutation: if the premises plus the negated goal imply the empty clause, the original goal follows."},"sourceIds":["source-a-machine-oriented-logic-based-on-the-resolution-principle"],"assetIds":["asset-1965-resolution-method-john-alan-robinson"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1965","title":"Resolution Method","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Resolution turned first-order theorem proving into a uniform refutation procedure: translate statements into clauses, negate the target, and derive a contradiction. Robinson combined resolution with unification, giving automated provers a compact rule that could be implemented systematically. It became a foundation for logic programming, SAT/SMT lineage, and many later reasoning systems.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1965-resolution-method_john-alan-robinson.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-resolution-method_clause-refutation.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1965-resolution-method_unification-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"the resolution principle\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>A Machine-Oriented Logic Based on the Resolution Principle</em>, John Alan Robinson, Journal of the ACM, 1965","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Automated theorem proving / Resolution method","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"the resolution principle\"<br>source：<em>A Machine-Oriented Logic Based on the Resolution Principle</em>, John Alan Robinson, Journal of the ACM, 1965"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Earlier theorem provers often needed many specialized inference rules. Resolution reduced proof search to a small number of clause operations, making mechanized logic less ad hoc.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The key move is refutation: assume the claim is false, then repeatedly resolve complementary literals until the empty clause appears. The key mechanism is Clause refutation with unification, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat resolution as a foundational proof method for symbolic AI and automated reasoning. Its long-term legacy is visible in theorem proving, logic programming, SAT/SMT lineages, and constraint-based reasoning systems.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1965-resolution-method-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does the resolution method try to derive after negating the target claim?","zh":"归结方法在否定目标结论后试图推出什么？"},"options":[{"en":"The empty clause, showing contradiction","zh":"空子句，表示矛盾"},{"en":"A larger image dataset","zh":"更大的图像数据集"},{"en":"A random dropout mask","zh":"随机 dropout 掩码"},{"en":"A chess opening book","zh":"国际象棋开局库"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Resolution is usually used as refutation: if the premises plus the negated goal imply the empty clause, the original goal follows.","zh":"归结通常作为反驳证明使用：如果前提加否定目标能推出空子句，原目标就成立。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["logic","reasoning"]}]}`
