### milestone-1966-eliza

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1966"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"ELIZA CACM paper","zh":"ELIZA CACM paper"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1145/365153.365168"},{"type":{"en":"Institution","zh":"机构"},"label":{"en":"MIT News obituary for Joseph Weizenbaum","zh":"麻省理工学院 新闻 obituary for 约瑟夫·魏岑鲍姆"},"url":"https://news.mit.edu/2008/obit-weizenbaum-0310"},{"type":{"en":"Archive","zh":"档案"},"label":{"en":"ELIZA source reconstruction project","zh":"ELIZA source reconstruction project"},"url":"https://sites.google.com/view/elizagen-org/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-eliza-cacm-paper","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"ELIZA CACM paper","en":"ELIZA CACM paper"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1145/365153.365168","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-mit-news-obituary-for-joseph-weizenbaum","type":{"zh":"机构","en":"Institution"},"label":{"zh":"麻省理工学院 新闻 obituary for 约瑟夫·魏岑鲍姆","en":"MIT News obituary for Joseph Weizenbaum"},"url":"https://news.mit.edu/2008/obit-weizenbaum-0310","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-eliza-source-reconstruction-project","type":{"zh":"档案","en":"Archive"},"label":{"zh":"ELIZA source reconstruction project","en":"ELIZA source reconstruction project"},"url":"https://sites.google.com/view/elizagen-org/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"archive"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"In the 1960s, AI language systems were mostly symbolic and hand-built. ELIZA tested whether a small set of scripts could sustain the impression of natural conversation.","zh":"20 世纪 60 年代，AI 语言系统多为手工构建的符号系统。ELIZA 测试少量脚本能否维持自然对话的印象。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The DOCTOR script does not understand therapy; it transforms recognized patterns into reflective prompts that invite the user to continue. The key mechanism is Pattern matching and scripted reflection, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"DOCTOR 脚本并不理解心理治疗；它把识别到的模式转成反问式提示，诱导用户继续说下去。 关键机制是模式匹配与脚本反射，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat ELIZA as both historically important and cautionary: it produced conversational illusion without deep understanding. Its long-term legacy is the reminder that interaction design, expectation, and user projection strongly shape judgments about AI.","zh":"专家通常认为 ELIZA 既具有历史重要性，也具有警示意义：它没有深层理解，却能制造对话幻觉。它的长期影响在于提醒人们，交互设计、期待和用户投射会强烈影响对 AI 的判断。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"20 世纪 60 年代，AI 语言系统多为手工构建的符号系统。ELIZA 测试少量脚本能否维持自然对话的印象。","en":"In the 1960s, AI language systems were mostly symbolic and hand-built. ELIZA tested whether a small set of scripts could sustain the impression of natural conversation."},"sourceIds":["source-eliza-cacm-paper"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"DOCTOR 脚本并不理解心理治疗；它把识别到的模式转成反问式提示，诱导用户继续说下去。 关键机制是模式匹配与脚本反射，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"The DOCTOR script does not understand therapy; it transforms recognized patterns into reflective prompts that invite the user to continue. The key mechanism is Pattern matching and scripted reflection, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-eliza-cacm-paper"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常认为 ELIZA 既具有历史重要性，也具有警示意义：它没有深层理解，却能制造对话幻觉。它的长期影响在于提醒人们，交互设计、期待和用户投射会强烈影响对 AI 的判断。","en":"Experts generally treat ELIZA as both historically important and cautionary: it produced conversational illusion without deep understanding. Its long-term legacy is the reminder that interaction design, expectation, and user projection strongly shape judgments about AI."},"sourceIds":["source-eliza-cacm-paper"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1966-eliza-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why did ELIZA feel conversational despite having no deep understanding?","zh":"ELIZA 没有深层理解，为什么仍显得像在对话？"},"options":[{"en":"It used scripts to reflect user phrases back as questions","zh":"它用脚本把用户短语反射成问题"},{"en":"It trained a transformer on the web","zh":"它在网页上训练了 Transformer"},{"en":"It solved ImageNet classification","zh":"它解决了 ImageNet 分类"},{"en":"It used Monte Carlo tree search","zh":"它使用蒙特卡洛树搜索"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"ELIZA’s DOCTOR script relied on pattern matching and response templates that made users continue supplying meaning.","zh":"ELIZA 的 DOCTOR 脚本依赖模式匹配和回应模板，让用户持续提供语义。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["chatbot","nlp"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1966-eliza-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"ELIZA 没有深层理解，为什么仍显得像在对话？","en":"Why did ELIZA feel conversational despite having no deep understanding?"},"options":[{"zh":"它用脚本把用户短语反射成问题","en":"It used scripts to reflect user phrases back as questions"},{"zh":"它在网页上训练了 Transformer","en":"It trained a transformer on the web"},{"zh":"它解决了 ImageNet 分类","en":"It solved ImageNet classification"},{"zh":"它使用蒙特卡洛树搜索","en":"It used Monte Carlo tree search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"ELIZA 的 DOCTOR 脚本依赖模式匹配和回应模板，让用户持续提供语义。","en":"ELIZA’s DOCTOR script relied on pattern matching and response templates that made users continue supplying meaning."},"sourceIds":["source-eliza-cacm-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-1966-eliza-joseph-weizenbaum"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1966","title":"ELIZA","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>ELIZA 展示了简单语言模式匹配在制造“对话感”方面能走多远。它的 DOCTOR 脚本会把用户短语改写成问题反射回来，机制很浅，却让互动令人印象深刻。它成为聊天机器人史和“机器拟人化”争论中的标志性案例。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1966-eliza_joseph-weizenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_doctor-script.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_terminal-dialog.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"人与机器之间的交流\"","quoteAttribution":"《ELIZA：研究人与机器之间自然语言交流的计算机程序》, 约瑟夫·魏岑鲍姆, 《ACM 通讯》, 1966","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：聊天机器人 / ELIZA","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"人与机器之间的交流\"<br>source：《ELIZA：研究人与机器之间自然语言交流的计算机程序》, 约瑟夫·魏岑鲍姆, 《ACM 通讯》, 1966"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"20 世纪 60 年代，AI 语言系统多为手工构建的符号系统。ELIZA 测试少量脚本能否维持自然对话的印象。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"DOCTOR 脚本并不理解心理治疗；它把识别到的模式转成反问式提示，诱导用户继续说下去。 关键机制是模式匹配与脚本反射，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常认为 ELIZA 既具有历史重要性，也具有警示意义：它没有深层理解，却能制造对话幻觉。它的长期影响在于提醒人们，交互设计、期待和用户投射会强烈影响对 AI 的判断。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1966-eliza-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why did ELIZA feel conversational despite having no deep understanding?","zh":"ELIZA 没有深层理解，为什么仍显得像在对话？"},"options":[{"en":"It used scripts to reflect user phrases back as questions","zh":"它用脚本把用户短语反射成问题"},{"en":"It trained a transformer on the web","zh":"它在网页上训练了 Transformer"},{"en":"It solved ImageNet classification","zh":"它解决了 ImageNet 分类"},{"en":"It used Monte Carlo tree search","zh":"它使用蒙特卡洛树搜索"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"ELIZA’s DOCTOR script relied on pattern matching and response templates that made users continue supplying meaning.","zh":"ELIZA 的 DOCTOR 脚本依赖模式匹配和回应模板，让用户持续提供语义。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["chatbot","nlp"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1966","title":"ELIZA","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>ELIZA 展示了简单语言模式匹配在制造“对话感”方面能走多远。它的 DOCTOR 脚本会把用户短语改写成问题反射回来，机制很浅，却让互动令人印象深刻。它成为聊天机器人史和“机器拟人化”争论中的标志性案例。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1966-eliza_joseph-weizenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_doctor-script.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_terminal-dialog.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"人与机器之间的交流\"","quoteAttribution":"《ELIZA：研究人与机器之间自然语言交流的计算机程序》, 约瑟夫·魏岑鲍姆, 《ACM 通讯》, 1966","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：聊天机器人 / ELIZA","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"人与机器之间的交流\"<br>source：《ELIZA：研究人与机器之间自然语言交流的计算机程序》, 约瑟夫·魏岑鲍姆, 《ACM 通讯》, 1966"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"20 世纪 60 年代，AI 语言系统多为手工构建的符号系统。ELIZA 测试少量脚本能否维持自然对话的印象。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"DOCTOR 脚本并不理解心理治疗；它把识别到的模式转成反问式提示，诱导用户继续说下去。 关键机制是模式匹配与脚本反射，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常认为 ELIZA 既具有历史重要性，也具有警示意义：它没有深层理解，却能制造对话幻觉。它的长期影响在于提醒人们，交互设计、期待和用户投射会强烈影响对 AI 的判断。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1966-eliza-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"ELIZA 没有深层理解，为什么仍显得像在对话？","en":"Why did ELIZA feel conversational despite having no deep understanding?"},"options":[{"zh":"它用脚本把用户短语反射成问题","en":"It used scripts to reflect user phrases back as questions"},{"zh":"它在网页上训练了 Transformer","en":"It trained a transformer on the web"},{"zh":"它解决了 ImageNet 分类","en":"It solved ImageNet classification"},{"zh":"它使用蒙特卡洛树搜索","en":"It used Monte Carlo tree search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"ELIZA 的 DOCTOR 脚本依赖模式匹配和回应模板，让用户持续提供语义。","en":"ELIZA’s DOCTOR script relied on pattern matching and response templates that made users continue supplying meaning."},"sourceIds":["source-eliza-cacm-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-1966-eliza-joseph-weizenbaum"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1966","title":"ELIZA","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>ELIZA showed how far simple language pattern matching could go in producing the feeling of conversation. Its DOCTOR script reflected user phrases back as questions, making the interaction memorable precisely because the mechanism was shallow. The program became a landmark in chatbot history and in debates about anthropomorphizing machines.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1966-eliza_joseph-weizenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_doctor-script.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_terminal-dialog.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"communication between man and machine\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>ELIZA: A Computer Program for the Study of Natural Language Communication Between Man and Machine</em>, Joseph Weizenbaum, Communications of the ACM, 1966","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: ChatBot / ELIZA","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"communication between man and machine\"<br>source：<em>ELIZA: A Computer Program for the Study of Natural Language Communication Between Man and Machine</em>, Joseph Weizenbaum, Communications of the ACM, 1966"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"In the 1960s, AI language systems were mostly symbolic and hand-built. ELIZA tested whether a small set of scripts could sustain the impression of natural conversation.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The DOCTOR script does not understand therapy; it transforms recognized patterns into reflective prompts that invite the user to continue. The key mechanism is Pattern matching and scripted reflection, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat ELIZA as both historically important and cautionary: it produced conversational illusion without deep understanding. Its long-term legacy is the reminder that interaction design, expectation, and user projection strongly shape judgments about AI.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1966-eliza-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why did ELIZA feel conversational despite having no deep understanding?","zh":"ELIZA 没有深层理解，为什么仍显得像在对话？"},"options":[{"en":"It used scripts to reflect user phrases back as questions","zh":"它用脚本把用户短语反射成问题"},{"en":"It trained a transformer on the web","zh":"它在网页上训练了 Transformer"},{"en":"It solved ImageNet classification","zh":"它解决了 ImageNet 分类"},{"en":"It used Monte Carlo tree search","zh":"它使用蒙特卡洛树搜索"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"ELIZA’s DOCTOR script relied on pattern matching and response templates that made users continue supplying meaning.","zh":"ELIZA 的 DOCTOR 脚本依赖模式匹配和回应模板，让用户持续提供语义。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["chatbot","nlp"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1966","title":"ELIZA","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>ELIZA showed how far simple language pattern matching could go in producing the feeling of conversation. Its DOCTOR script reflected user phrases back as questions, making the interaction memorable precisely because the mechanism was shallow. The program became a landmark in chatbot history and in debates about anthropomorphizing machines.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1966-eliza_joseph-weizenbaum.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_doctor-script.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1966-eliza_terminal-dialog.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"communication between man and machine\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>ELIZA: A Computer Program for the Study of Natural Language Communication Between Man and Machine</em>, Joseph Weizenbaum, Communications of the ACM, 1966","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: ChatBot / ELIZA","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"communication between man and machine\"<br>source：<em>ELIZA: A Computer Program for the Study of Natural Language Communication Between Man and Machine</em>, Joseph Weizenbaum, Communications of the ACM, 1966"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"In the 1960s, AI language systems were mostly symbolic and hand-built. The key mechanism is Pattern matching and scripted reflection, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat ELIZA as both historically important and cautionary: it produced conversational illusion without deep understanding. ### milestone-1969-ai-winter

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1969"`
- `achievement.visualModules`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `[]`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `[]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Background","zh":"背景解读"},"html":{"en":"What changed the field in Perceptrons was that it clarified exactly which tasks single-layer perceptrons could not solve. Researchers then shifted attention away from the neural-network boom toward approaches that were easier to formalize and prove.","zh":"《Perceptrons》真正改变研究方向的地方，在于它把“哪些任务是单层感知机做不到的”说清楚了；学术界随后开始把注意力从神经网络热潮转向更容易形式化和证明的路线。"}},{"label":{"en":"Context","zh":"延展说明"},"html":{"en":"The winter did not mean neural networks had failed forever. It meant their promise was revalued under the computing and algorithmic limits of the time. The later return of backpropagation, LSTM, and large-scale compute essentially filled in the missing training mechanisms and resources.","zh":"寒冬并不意味着神经网络从此失效，而是意味着在当时的计算与算法条件下，它的承诺被重新估价；后来 BP、LSTM 与大算力的回归，本质上是在补齐当年缺失的训练机制与资源基础。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"background","label":{"zh":"背景解读","en":"Background"},"html":{"zh":"《Perceptrons》真正改变研究方向的地方，在于它把“哪些任务是单层感知机做不到的”说清楚了；学术界随后开始把注意力从神经网络热潮转向更容易形式化和证明的路线。","en":"What changed the field in Perceptrons was that it clarified exactly which tasks single-layer perceptrons could not solve. Researchers then shifted attention away from the neural-network boom toward approaches that were easier to formalize and prove."},"sourceIds":["source-legacy-event-record"]},{"id":"context","label":{"zh":"延展说明","en":"Context"},"html":{"zh":"寒冬并不意味着神经网络从此失效，而是意味着在当时的计算与算法条件下，它的承诺被重新估价；后来 BP、LSTM 与大算力的回归，本质上是在补齐当年缺失的训练机制与资源基础。","en":"The winter did not mean neural networks had failed forever. It meant their promise was revalued under the computing and algorithmic limits of the time. The later return of backpropagation, LSTM, and large-scale compute essentially filled in the missing training mechanisms and resources."},"sourceIds":["source-legacy-event-record"]}]`

### milestone-1970-shrdlu

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1970"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Thesis","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Procedures as a Representation for Data in a Computer Program for Understanding Natural Language","zh":"在理解自然语言的计算机程序中把过程作为数据表示"},"url":"https://dspace.mit.edu/handle/1721.1/7095"},{"type":{"en":"Profile","zh":"人物资料"},"label":{"en":"Terry Winograd, Stanford Computer Science","zh":"特里·维诺格拉德, 斯坦福大学 Computer 《科学》"},"url":"https://www.cs.stanford.edu/people/terry-winograd"},{"type":{"en":"Oral history","zh":"口述史"},"label":{"en":"Terry Winograd oral history, CBI","zh":"特里·维诺格拉德 oral history, CBI"},"url":"https://hdl.handle.net/11299/107717"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Thesis"},"label":{"zh":"在理解自然语言的计算机程序中把过程作为数据表示","en":"Procedures as a Representation for Data in a Computer Program for Understanding Natural Language"},"url":"https://dspace.mit.edu/handle/1721.1/7095","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-terry-winograd-stanford-computer-science","type":{"zh":"人物资料","en":"Profile"},"label":{"zh":"特里·维诺格拉德, 斯坦福大学 Computer 《科学》","en":"Terry Winograd, Stanford Computer Science"},"url":"https://www.cs.stanford.edu/people/terry-winograd","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-terry-winograd-oral-history-cbi","type":{"zh":"口述史","en":"Oral history"},"label":{"zh":"特里·维诺格拉德 oral history, CBI","en":"Terry Winograd oral history, CBI"},"url":"https://hdl.handle.net/11299/107717","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Early language programs often handled isolated sentences. SHRDLU made language, reference, memory, and action share one miniature world.","zh":"早期语言程序往往只处理孤立句子。SHRDLU 让语言、指称、记忆和动作共享同一个微型世界。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The system understood utterances by grounding them in blocks, spatial relations, and procedures that could actually change the scene. The key mechanism is Blocks-world language understanding, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"系统通过积木、空间关系和可以改变场景的过程来落地理解用户话语。 关键机制是积木世界语言理解，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat SHRDLU as a classic demonstration of both the promise and brittleness of microworld AI. Its long-term legacy is showing that language understanding can look powerful when grounded in a tightly constrained world model, while also exposing the limits of that constraint.","zh":"专家通常把 SHRDLU 视为微世界 AI 的希望与脆弱性的经典展示。它的长期影响在于说明语言理解在受限世界模型中可以显得很强大，同时也暴露了这种限制本身的边界。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"早期语言程序往往只处理孤立句子。SHRDLU 让语言、指称、记忆和动作共享同一个微型世界。","en":"Early language programs often handled isolated sentences. SHRDLU made language, reference, memory, and action share one miniature world."},"sourceIds":["source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"系统通过积木、空间关系和可以改变场景的过程来落地理解用户话语。 关键机制是积木世界语言理解，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"The system understood utterances by grounding them in blocks, spatial relations, and procedures that could actually change the scene. The key mechanism is Blocks-world language understanding, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 SHRDLU 视为微世界 AI 的希望与脆弱性的经典展示。它的长期影响在于说明语言理解在受限世界模型中可以显得很强大，同时也暴露了这种限制本身的边界。","en":"Experts generally treat SHRDLU as a classic demonstration of both the promise and brittleness of microworld AI. Its long-term legacy is showing that language understanding can look powerful when grounded in a tightly constrained world model, while also exposing the limits of that constraint."},"sourceIds":["source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1970-shrdlu-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why could SHRDLU appear so fluent in dialogue?","zh":"为什么 SHRDLU 在对话中显得很流畅？"},"options":[{"en":"It grounded language in a small blocks world with explicit actions","zh":"它把语言落地到一个小型积木世界和明确动作中"},{"en":"It trained on the full web","zh":"它在整个网络上训练"},{"en":"It used ImageNet labels","zh":"它使用 ImageNet 标签"},{"en":"It played chess by hardware search","zh":"它用硬件搜索下棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"SHRDLU worked because language, objects, memory, and plans were all represented inside one constrained microworld.","zh":"SHRDLU 有效是因为语言、对象、记忆和计划都表示在同一个受限微世界里。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["nlp","microworld"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1970-shrdlu-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么 SHRDLU 在对话中显得很流畅？","en":"Why could SHRDLU appear so fluent in dialogue?"},"options":[{"zh":"它把语言落地到一个小型积木世界和明确动作中","en":"It grounded language in a small blocks world with explicit actions"},{"zh":"它在整个网络上训练","en":"It trained on the full web"},{"zh":"它使用 ImageNet 标签","en":"It used ImageNet labels"},{"zh":"它用硬件搜索下棋","en":"It played chess by hardware search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"SHRDLU 有效是因为语言、对象、记忆和计划都表示在同一个受限微世界里。","en":"SHRDLU worked because language, objects, memory, and plans were all represented inside one constrained microworld."},"sourceIds":["source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-"],"assetIds":["asset-1970-shrdlu-terry-winograd"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1970","title":"SHRDLU","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>SHRDLU 展示了计算机可以围绕一个受限但丰富的积木世界进行对话。Winograd 把句法分析、规划、过程语义和小型世界模型结合起来，让自然语言命令转化为类似机器人操作的动作。它的力量来自紧密集成：语言之所以有效，是因为世界被限制并被明确表示。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1970-shrdlu_terry-winograd.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_blocks-world.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_parser-plan.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"积木世界语言理解\"","quoteAttribution":"《SHRDLU 博士论文记录》, 特里·维诺格拉德","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自然语言理解 / SHRDLU","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"积木世界语言理解\"<br>source：《SHRDLU 博士论文记录》, 特里·维诺格拉德"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"早期语言程序往往只处理孤立句子。SHRDLU 让语言、指称、记忆和动作共享同一个微型世界。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"系统通过积木、空间关系和可以改变场景的过程来落地理解用户话语。 关键机制是积木世界语言理解，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 SHRDLU 视为微世界 AI 的希望与脆弱性的经典展示。它的长期影响在于说明语言理解在受限世界模型中可以显得很强大，同时也暴露了这种限制本身的边界。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1970-shrdlu-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why could SHRDLU appear so fluent in dialogue?","zh":"为什么 SHRDLU 在对话中显得很流畅？"},"options":[{"en":"It grounded language in a small blocks world with explicit actions","zh":"它把语言落地到一个小型积木世界和明确动作中"},{"en":"It trained on the full web","zh":"它在整个网络上训练"},{"en":"It used ImageNet labels","zh":"它使用 ImageNet 标签"},{"en":"It played chess by hardware search","zh":"它用硬件搜索下棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"SHRDLU worked because language, objects, memory, and plans were all represented inside one constrained microworld.","zh":"SHRDLU 有效是因为语言、对象、记忆和计划都表示在同一个受限微世界里。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["nlp","microworld"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1970","title":"SHRDLU","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>SHRDLU 展示了计算机可以围绕一个受限但丰富的积木世界进行对话。Winograd 把句法分析、规划、过程语义和小型世界模型结合起来，让自然语言命令转化为类似机器人操作的动作。它的力量来自紧密集成：语言之所以有效，是因为世界被限制并被明确表示。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1970-shrdlu_terry-winograd.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_blocks-world.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_parser-plan.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"积木世界语言理解\"","quoteAttribution":"《SHRDLU 博士论文记录》, 特里·维诺格拉德","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：自然语言理解 / SHRDLU","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"积木世界语言理解\"<br>source：《SHRDLU 博士论文记录》, 特里·维诺格拉德"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"早期语言程序往往只处理孤立句子。SHRDLU 让语言、指称、记忆和动作共享同一个微型世界。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"系统通过积木、空间关系和可以改变场景的过程来落地理解用户话语。 关键机制是积木世界语言理解，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 SHRDLU 视为微世界 AI 的希望与脆弱性的经典展示。它的长期影响在于说明语言理解在受限世界模型中可以显得很强大，同时也暴露了这种限制本身的边界。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1970-shrdlu-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么 SHRDLU 在对话中显得很流畅？","en":"Why could SHRDLU appear so fluent in dialogue?"},"options":[{"zh":"它把语言落地到一个小型积木世界和明确动作中","en":"It grounded language in a small blocks world with explicit actions"},{"zh":"它在整个网络上训练","en":"It trained on the full web"},{"zh":"它使用 ImageNet 标签","en":"It used ImageNet labels"},{"zh":"它用硬件搜索下棋","en":"It played chess by hardware search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"SHRDLU 有效是因为语言、对象、记忆和计划都表示在同一个受限微世界里。","en":"SHRDLU worked because language, objects, memory, and plans were all represented inside one constrained microworld."},"sourceIds":["source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-"],"assetIds":["asset-1970-shrdlu-terry-winograd"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1970","title":"SHRDLU","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>SHRDLU showed that a computer could carry on a constrained but surprisingly rich dialogue about a toy blocks world. Winograd combined parsing, planning, procedural semantics, and a small world model so natural-language commands could become robot-like actions. Its power came from tight integration: language worked because the world was limited and explicitly represented.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1970-shrdlu_terry-winograd.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_blocks-world.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_parser-plan.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Blocks-world language understanding\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>SHRDLU dissertation record</em>, Terry Winograd","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Natural language understanding / SHRDLU","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Blocks-world language understanding\"<br>source：<em>SHRDLU dissertation record</em>, Terry Winograd"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Early language programs often handled isolated sentences. SHRDLU made language, reference, memory, and action share one miniature world.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The system understood utterances by grounding them in blocks, spatial relations, and procedures that could actually change the scene. The key mechanism is Blocks-world language understanding, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat SHRDLU as a classic demonstration of both the promise and brittleness of microworld AI. Its long-term legacy is showing that language understanding can look powerful when grounded in a tightly constrained world model, while also exposing the limits of that constraint.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1970-shrdlu-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why could SHRDLU appear so fluent in dialogue?","zh":"为什么 SHRDLU 在对话中显得很流畅？"},"options":[{"en":"It grounded language in a small blocks world with explicit actions","zh":"它把语言落地到一个小型积木世界和明确动作中"},{"en":"It trained on the full web","zh":"它在整个网络上训练"},{"en":"It used ImageNet labels","zh":"它使用 ImageNet 标签"},{"en":"It played chess by hardware search","zh":"它用硬件搜索下棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"SHRDLU worked because language, objects, memory, and plans were all represented inside one constrained microworld.","zh":"SHRDLU 有效是因为语言、对象、记忆和计划都表示在同一个受限微世界里。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["nlp","microworld"]}]}`

Winograd combined parsing, planning, procedural semantics, and a small world model so natural-language commands could become robot-like actions. Its power came from tight integration: language worked because the world was limited and explicitly represented.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1970-shrdlu_terry-winograd.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_blocks-world.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1970-shrdlu_parser-plan.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Blocks-world language understanding\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>SHRDLU dissertation record</em>, Terry Winograd","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Natural language understanding / SHRDLU","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Blocks-world language understanding\"<br>source：<em>SHRDLU dissertation record</em>, Terry Winograd"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Early language programs often handled isolated sentences. Its long-term legacy is showing that language understanding can look powerful when grounded in a tightly constrained world model, while also exposing the limits of that constraint.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1970-shrdlu-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么 SHRDLU 在对话中显得很流畅？","en":"Why could SHRDLU appear so fluent in dialogue?"},"options":[{"zh":"它把语言落地到一个小型积木世界和明确动作中","en":"It grounded language in a small blocks world with explicit actions"},{"zh":"它在整个网络上训练","en":"It trained on the full web"},{"zh":"它使用 ImageNet 标签","en":"It used ImageNet labels"},{"zh":"它用硬件搜索下棋","en":"It played chess by hardware search"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"SHRDLU 有效是因为语言、对象、记忆和计划都表示在同一个受限微世界里。","en":"SHRDLU worked because language, objects, memory, and plans were all represented inside one constrained microworld."},"sourceIds":["source-procedures-as-a-representation-for-data-in-a-computer-program-for-understanding-"],"assetIds":["asset-1970-shrdlu-terry-winograd"]}]}`

### milestone-1971-complexity-theory

- Kind: changed

  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"The Complexity of Theorem-Proving Procedures","zh":"定理证明过程的复杂性"},"url":"https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/800157.805047"},{"type":{"en":"Award","zh":"奖项"},"label":{"en":"Stephen A. Cook ACM A.M. Turing Award","zh":"斯蒂芬·A·库克 ACM A.M. 图灵 Award"},"url":"https://awards.acm.org/award_winners/cook_N991950"},{"type":{"en":"Problem","zh":"难题"},"label":{"en":"Clay Mathematics Institute P vs NP","zh":"克雷数学研究所 P 与 NP 问题"},"url":"https://www.claymath.org/millennium/p-vs-np/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-the-complexity-of-theorem-proving-procedures","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"定理证明过程的复杂性","en":"The Complexity of Theorem-Proving Procedures"},"url":"https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/800157.805047","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-stephen-a-cook-acm-a-m-turing-award","type":{"zh":"奖项","en":"Award"},"label":{"zh":"斯蒂芬·A·库克 ACM A.M. 图灵 Award","en":"Stephen A. Cook ACM A.M. Turing Award"},"url":"https://awards.acm.org/award_winners/cook_N991950","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"award"},{"id":"source-clay-mathematics-institute-p-vs-np","type":{"zh":"难题","en":"Problem"},"label":{"zh":"克雷数学研究所 P 与 NP 问题","en":"Clay Mathematics Institute P vs NP"},"url":"https://www.claymath.org/millennium/p-vs-np/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"problem"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Cook's 1971 STOC paper made Boolean satisfiability a canonical problem for comparing computational hardness. It showed that many different-looking problems can be connected by efficient reductions.","zh":"库克 1971 年 STOC 论文把布尔可满足性问题变成比较计算困难性的经典对象。它说明许多看起来不同的问题可以通过高效归约联系起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The exhibit should emphasize the move from isolated hard problems to a shared map of hardness. If one NP-complete problem is solved efficiently, every problem in NP can be solved efficiently.","zh":"这个展项应突出从“单个难题”到“困难性地图”的转变。如果一个 NP 完全问题能被高效求解，那么 NP 中所有问题都能被高效求解。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Cook's NP-completeness result as a founding event of theoretical computer science. Its long-term legacy is a durable framework for comparing computational hardness across algorithms, optimization, cryptography, and AI search.","zh":"专家通常把库克的 NP 完全性结果视为理论计算机科学的奠基事件。它的长期影响在于建立了一套持久框架，用来比较算法、优化、密码学和 AI 搜索中的计算困难性。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"published-paper","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"库克 1971 年 STOC 论文把布尔可满足性问题变成比较计算困难性的经典对象。它说明许多看起来不同的问题可以通过高效归约联系起来。","en":"Cook's 1971 STOC paper made Boolean satisfiability a canonical problem for comparing computational hardness. It showed that many different-looking problems can be connected by efficient reductions."},"sourceIds":["source-the-complexity-of-theorem-proving-procedures"]},{"id":"reduction-logic","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"这个展项应突出从“单个难题”到“困难性地图”的转变。如果一个 NP 完全问题能被高效求解，那么 NP 中所有问题都能被高效求解。","en":"The exhibit should emphasize the move from isolated hard problems to a shared map of hardness. If one NP-complete problem is solved efficiently, every problem in NP can be solved efficiently."},"sourceIds":["source-the-complexity-of-theorem-proving-procedures"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把库克的 NP 完全性结果视为理论计算机科学的奠基事件。它的长期影响在于建立了一套持久框架，用来比较算法、优化、密码学和 AI 搜索中的计算困难性。","en":"Experts generally treat Cook's NP-completeness result as a founding event of theoretical computer science. Its long-term legacy is a durable framework for comparing computational hardness across algorithms, optimization, cryptography, and AI search."},"sourceIds":["source-the-complexity-of-theorem-proving-procedures"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1971-complexity-theory-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does NP-completeness help researchers compare?","zh":"NP 完全性帮助研究者比较什么？"},"options":[{"en":"The computational hardness of different problems","zh":"不同问题的计算困难性"},{"en":"The brightness of computer screens","zh":"电脑屏幕的亮度"},{"en":"The handwriting style of programmers","zh":"程序员的笔迹风格"},{"en":"The physical weight of machines","zh":"机器的物理重量"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Polynomial-time reductions let researchers connect different problems and reason about shared hardness.","zh":"多项式时间归约让研究者把不同问题联系起来，并推理它们共享的困难性。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["complexity","reductions"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"quiz-1971-complexity-theory-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"NP 完全性帮助研究者比较什么？","en":"What does NP-completeness help researchers compare?"},"options":[{"zh":"不同问题的计算困难性","en":"The computational hardness of different problems"},{"zh":"电脑屏幕的亮度","en":"The brightness of computer screens"},{"zh":"程序员的笔迹风格","en":"The handwriting style of programmers"},{"zh":"机器的物理重量","en":"The physical weight of machines"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"多项式时间归约让研究者把不同问题联系起来，并推理它们共享的困难性。","en":"Polynomial-time reductions let researchers connect different problems and reason about shared hardness."},"sourceIds":["source-the-complexity-of-theorem-proving-procedures"],"assetIds":["asset-1971-complexity-theory-stephen-cook"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":1971,"title":"NP 完全性","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>计算复杂性理论让计算机科学能够按照求解所需资源来划分问题。库克 1971 年关于 NP 完全性的结果表明，许多困难问题具有共同结构：答案可以很快验证，但找到答案可能非常困难。它改变了研究者理解算法极限、密码学、优化和 AI 搜索的方式。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-complexity-theory_stephen-cook.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-complexity-theory_reduction-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"奠定了 NP 完全性理论的基础\"","quoteAttribution":"《斯蒂芬·A·库克 ACM 图灵奖获奖说明》, 美国计算机协会, 1982","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：理论 / 计算复杂性理论","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"奠定了 NP 完全性理论的基础\"<br>source：《斯蒂芬·A·库克 ACM 图灵奖获奖说明》, 美国计算机协会, 1982"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"库克 1971 年 STOC 论文把布尔可满足性问题变成比较计算困难性的经典对象。它说明许多看起来不同的问题可以通过高效归约联系起来。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"这个展项应突出从“单个难题”到“困难性地图”的转变。如果一个 NP 完全问题能被高效求解，那么 NP 中所有问题都能被高效求解。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把库克的 NP 完全性结果视为理论计算机科学的奠基事件。它的长期影响在于建立了一套持久框架，用来比较算法、优化、密码学和 AI 搜索中的计算困难性。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1971-complexity-theory-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does NP-completeness help researchers compare?","zh":"NP 完全性帮助研究者比较什么？"},"options":[{"en":"The computational hardness of different problems","zh":"不同问题的计算困难性"},{"en":"The brightness of computer screens","zh":"电脑屏幕的亮度"},{"en":"The handwriting style of programmers","zh":"程序员的笔迹风格"},{"en":"The physical weight of machines","zh":"机器的物理重量"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Polynomial-time reductions let researchers connect different problems and reason about shared hardness.","zh":"多项式时间归约让研究者把不同问题联系起来，并推理它们共享的困难性。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["complexity","reductions"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":1971,"title":"NP 完全性","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>计算复杂性理论让计算机科学能够按照求解所需资源来划分问题。库克 1971 年关于 NP 完全性的结果表明，许多困难问题具有共同结构：答案可以很快验证，但找到答案可能非常困难。它改变了研究者理解算法极限、密码学、优化和 AI 搜索的方式。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-complexity-theory_stephen-cook.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-complexity-theory_reduction-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"奠定了 NP 完全性理论的基础\"","quoteAttribution":"《斯蒂芬·A·库克 ACM 图灵奖获奖说明》, 美国计算机协会, 1982","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：理论 / 计算复杂性理论","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"奠定了 NP 完全性理论的基础\"<br>source：《斯蒂芬·A·库克 ACM 图灵奖获奖说明》, 美国计算机协会, 1982"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"库克 1971 年 STOC 论文把布尔可满足性问题变成比较计算困难性的经典对象。它说明许多看起来不同的问题可以通过高效归约联系起来。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"这个展项应突出从“单个难题”到“困难性地图”的转变。如果一个 NP 完全问题能被高效求解，那么 NP 中所有问题都能被高效求解。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把库克的 NP 完全性结果视为理论计算机科学的奠基事件。它的长期影响在于建立了一套持久框架，用来比较算法、优化、密码学和 AI 搜索中的计算困难性。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"quiz-1971-complexity-theory-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"NP 完全性帮助研究者比较什么？","en":"What does NP-completeness help researchers compare?"},"options":[{"zh":"不同问题的计算困难性","en":"The computational hardness of different problems"},{"zh":"电脑屏幕的亮度","en":"The brightness of computer screens"},{"zh":"程序员的笔迹风格","en":"The handwriting style of programmers"},{"zh":"机器的物理重量","en":"The physical weight of machines"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"多项式时间归约让研究者把不同问题联系起来，并推理它们共享的困难性。","en":"Polynomial-time reductions let researchers connect different problems and reason about shared hardness."},"sourceIds":["source-the-complexity-of-theorem-proving-procedures"],"assetIds":["asset-1971-complexity-theory-stephen-cook"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":1971,"title":"NP-Completeness","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Computational complexity theory gave computer science a language for classifying problems by the resources needed to solve them. Cook's 1971 NP-completeness result showed that many hard problems share a common structure: a solution can be checked quickly even when finding one may be infeasible. This changed how researchers reason about algorithms, limits, cryptography, optimization, and AI search.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-complexity-theory_stephen-cook.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-complexity-theory_reduction-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"laid the foundations for the theory of NP-Completeness\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Stephen A. Cook A.M. Turing Award citation</em>, Association for Computing Machinery, 1982","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Theory / Complexity theory","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"laid the foundations for the theory of NP-Completeness\"<br>source：<em>Stephen A. Cook A.M. Turing Award citation</em>, Association for Computing Machinery, 1982"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Cook's 1971 STOC paper made Boolean satisfiability a canonical problem for comparing computational hardness. It showed that many different-looking problems can be connected by efficient reductions.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The exhibit should emphasize the move from isolated hard problems to a shared map of hardness. If one NP-complete problem is solved efficiently, every problem in NP can be solved efficiently.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Cook's NP-completeness result as a founding event of theoretical computer science. Its long-term legacy is a durable framework for comparing computational hardness across algorithms, optimization, cryptography, and AI search.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1971-complexity-theory-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does NP-completeness help researchers compare?","zh":"NP 完全性帮助研究者比较什么？"},"options":[{"en":"The computational hardness of different problems","zh":"不同问题的计算困难性"},{"en":"The brightness of computer screens","zh":"电脑屏幕的亮度"},{"en":"The handwriting style of programmers","zh":"程序员的笔迹风格"},{"en":"The physical weight of machines","zh":"机器的物理重量"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Polynomial-time reductions let researchers connect different problems and reason about shared hardness.","zh":"多项式时间归约让研究者把不同问题联系起来，并推理它们共享的困难性。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["complexity","reductions"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":1971,"title":"NP-Completeness","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Computational complexity theory gave computer science a language for classifying problems by the resources needed to solve them. Cook's 1971 NP-completeness result showed that many hard problems share a common structure: a solution can be checked quickly even when finding one may be infeasible. This changed how researchers reason about algorithms, limits, cryptography, optimization, and AI search.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-complexity-theory_stephen-cook.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-complexity-theory_reduction-map.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"laid the foundations for the theory of NP-Completeness\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Stephen A. It showed that many different-looking problems can be connected by efficient reductions.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The exhibit should emphasize the move from isolated hard problems to a shared map of hardness. ### milestone-1971-vc-theory

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1971"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"On the Uniform Convergence of Relative Frequencies","zh":"相对频率的一致收敛"},"url":"https://epubs.siam.org/doi/10.1137/1116025"},{"type":{"en":"Book","zh":"图书"},"label":{"en":"The Nature of Statistical Learning Theory","zh":"统计学习理论的本质"},"url":"https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-4757-2440-0"},{"type":{"en":"Overview","zh":"综述"},"label":{"en":"An Overview of Statistical Learning Theory","zh":"统计学习理论概览"},"url":"https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/18252602/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-on-the-uniform-convergence-of-relative-frequencies","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"相对频率的一致收敛","en":"On the Uniform Convergence of Relative Frequencies"},"url":"https://epubs.siam.org/doi/10.1137/1116025","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-the-nature-of-statistical-learning-theory","type":{"zh":"图书","en":"Book"},"label":{"zh":"统计学习理论的本质","en":"The Nature of Statistical Learning Theory"},"url":"https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-4757-2440-0","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"book"},{"id":"source-an-overview-of-statistical-learning-theory","type":{"zh":"综述","en":"Overview"},"label":{"zh":"统计学习理论概览","en":"An Overview of Statistical Learning Theory"},"url":"https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/18252602/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"overview"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"The 1971 Vapnik-Chervonenkis paper made generalization a mathematical question about uniform convergence across a whole class of events or hypotheses. Vapnik's 1995 book later synthesized the framework for statistical learning theory.","zh":"瓦普尼克 和 切尔沃年基斯 1971 年论文把泛化变成了关于一整类事件或假设上一致收敛的数学问题。瓦普尼克 1995 年著作随后系统总结了统计学习理论框架。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The key display idea is the gap between fitting examples and performing on unseen data. VC dimension gives a way to reason about when model flexibility helps and when it becomes overfitting risk.","zh":"关键展示点是“拟合样本”和“在未见数据上表现”之间的差距。VC 维提供了一种方法，用来理解模型灵活性何时有帮助、何时会带来过拟合风险。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat VC theory as one of the mathematical foundations of machine learning, while noting that classical bounds can be conservative for modern deep networks. Its long-term legacy is the language it gave researchers for model capacity, generalization, and learning from finite samples.","zh":"专家通常把 VC 理论视为机器学习的数学基础之一，同时也指出经典界对现代深度网络可能偏保守。它的长期影响在于为模型容量、泛化能力和有限样本学习提供了共同语言。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"published-paper","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"瓦普尼克 和 切尔沃年基斯 1971 年论文把泛化变成了关于一整类事件或假设上一致收敛的数学问题。瓦普尼克 1995 年著作随后系统总结了统计学习理论框架。","en":"The 1971 Vapnik-Chervonenkis paper made generalization a mathematical question about uniform convergence across a whole class of events or hypotheses. Vapnik's 1995 book later synthesized the framework for statistical learning theory."},"sourceIds":["source-on-the-uniform-convergence-of-relative-frequencies"]},{"id":"capacity-logic","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"关键展示点是“拟合样本”和“在未见数据上表现”之间的差距。VC 维提供了一种方法，用来理解模型灵活性何时有帮助、何时会带来过拟合风险。","en":"The key display idea is the gap between fitting examples and performing on unseen data. VC dimension gives a way to reason about when model flexibility helps and when it becomes overfitting risk."},"sourceIds":["source-on-the-uniform-convergence-of-relative-frequencies"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 VC 理论视为机器学习的数学基础之一，同时也指出经典界对现代深度网络可能偏保守。它的长期影响在于为模型容量、泛化能力和有限样本学习提供了共同语言。","en":"Experts generally treat VC theory as one of the mathematical foundations of machine learning, while noting that classical bounds can be conservative for modern deep networks. Its long-term legacy is the language it gave researchers for model capacity, generalization, and learning from finite samples."},"sourceIds":["source-on-the-uniform-convergence-of-relative-frequencies"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1971-vc-theory-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does VC theory mainly help explain in machine learning?","zh":"VC 理论主要帮助解释机器学习中的什么问题？"},"options":[{"en":"Why training performance may or may not generalize to unseen data","zh":"为什么训练表现可能泛化或不能泛化到未见数据"},{"en":"How to make a monitor larger","zh":"如何把显示器做得更大"},{"en":"Why all datasets have the same labels","zh":"为什么所有数据集都有相同标签"},{"en":"How to remove probability from learning","zh":"如何从学习中去掉概率"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"VC dimension and uniform convergence connect sample size, model capacity, training error and expected test behavior.","zh":"VC 维和一致收敛把样本量、模型容量、训练误差与预期测试表现联系起来。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["generalization","capacity"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"quiz-1971-vc-theory-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"VC 理论主要帮助解释机器学习中的什么问题？","en":"What does VC theory mainly help explain in machine learning?"},"options":[{"zh":"为什么训练表现可能泛化或不能泛化到未见数据","en":"Why training performance may or may not generalize to unseen data"},{"zh":"如何把显示器做得更大","en":"How to make a monitor larger"},{"zh":"为什么所有数据集都有相同标签","en":"Why all datasets have the same labels"},{"zh":"如何从学习中去掉概率","en":"How to remove probability from learning"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"VC 维和一致收敛把样本量、模型容量、训练误差与预期测试表现联系起来。","en":"VC dimension and uniform convergence connect sample size, model capacity, training error and expected test behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-on-the-uniform-convergence-of-relative-frequencies"],"assetIds":["asset-1971-vc-theory-vladimir-vapnik"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":1971,"title":"VC 理论","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>VC 理论解释了为什么模型只用有限样本训练后，有时仍能在未见数据上表现可靠。瓦普尼克和切尔沃年基斯用 VC 维等概念把学习、概率和模型容量联系起来。它成为统计学习理论的基础，也深刻影响了机器学习对泛化能力的理解。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-vc-theory_vladimir-vapnik.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-vc-theory_generalization.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"统计学习理论是在 20 世纪 60 年代末提出的。\"","quoteAttribution":"《统计学习理论概览》, 弗拉基米尔·N·瓦普尼克, 《IEEE 神经网络汇刊》, 1999","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：理论 / VC 理论","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"统计学习理论是在 20 世纪 60 年代末提出的。\"<br>source：《统计学习理论概览》, 弗拉基米尔·N·瓦普尼克, 《IEEE 神经网络汇刊》, 1999"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"瓦普尼克 和 切尔沃年基斯 1971 年论文把泛化变成了关于一整类事件或假设上一致收敛的数学问题。瓦普尼克 1995 年著作随后系统总结了统计学习理论框架。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"关键展示点是“拟合样本”和“在未见数据上表现”之间的差距。VC 维提供了一种方法，用来理解模型灵活性何时有帮助、何时会带来过拟合风险。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 VC 理论视为机器学习的数学基础之一，同时也指出经典界对现代深度网络可能偏保守。它的长期影响在于为模型容量、泛化能力和有限样本学习提供了共同语言。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1971-vc-theory-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does VC theory mainly help explain in machine learning?","zh":"VC 理论主要帮助解释机器学习中的什么问题？"},"options":[{"en":"Why training performance may or may not generalize to unseen data","zh":"为什么训练表现可能泛化或不能泛化到未见数据"},{"en":"How to make a monitor larger","zh":"如何把显示器做得更大"},{"en":"Why all datasets have the same labels","zh":"为什么所有数据集都有相同标签"},{"en":"How to remove probability from learning","zh":"如何从学习中去掉概率"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"VC dimension and uniform convergence connect sample size, model capacity, training error and expected test behavior.","zh":"VC 维和一致收敛把样本量、模型容量、训练误差与预期测试表现联系起来。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["generalization","capacity"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":1971,"title":"VC 理论","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>VC 理论解释了为什么模型只用有限样本训练后，有时仍能在未见数据上表现可靠。瓦普尼克和切尔沃年基斯用 VC 维等概念把学习、概率和模型容量联系起来。它成为统计学习理论的基础，也深刻影响了机器学习对泛化能力的理解。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-vc-theory_vladimir-vapnik.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-vc-theory_generalization.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"统计学习理论是在 20 世纪 60 年代末提出的。\"","quoteAttribution":"《统计学习理论概览》, 弗拉基米尔·N·瓦普尼克, 《IEEE 神经网络汇刊》, 1999","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：理论 / VC 理论","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"统计学习理论是在 20 世纪 60 年代末提出的。\"<br>source：《统计学习理论概览》, 弗拉基米尔·N·瓦普尼克, 《IEEE 神经网络汇刊》, 1999"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"瓦普尼克 和 切尔沃年基斯 1971 年论文把泛化变成了关于一整类事件或假设上一致收敛的数学问题。瓦普尼克 1995 年著作随后系统总结了统计学习理论框架。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"关键展示点是“拟合样本”和“在未见数据上表现”之间的差距。VC 维提供了一种方法，用来理解模型灵活性何时有帮助、何时会带来过拟合风险。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 VC 理论视为机器学习的数学基础之一，同时也指出经典界对现代深度网络可能偏保守。它的长期影响在于为模型容量、泛化能力和有限样本学习提供了共同语言。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"quiz-1971-vc-theory-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"VC 理论主要帮助解释机器学习中的什么问题？","en":"What does VC theory mainly help explain in machine learning?"},"options":[{"zh":"为什么训练表现可能泛化或不能泛化到未见数据","en":"Why training performance may or may not generalize to unseen data"},{"zh":"如何把显示器做得更大","en":"How to make a monitor larger"},{"zh":"为什么所有数据集都有相同标签","en":"Why all datasets have the same labels"},{"zh":"如何从学习中去掉概率","en":"How to remove probability from learning"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"VC 维和一致收敛把样本量、模型容量、训练误差与预期测试表现联系起来。","en":"VC dimension and uniform convergence connect sample size, model capacity, training error and expected test behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-on-the-uniform-convergence-of-relative-frequencies"],"assetIds":["asset-1971-vc-theory-vladimir-vapnik"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":1971,"title":"VC Theory","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>VC theory explains why a model trained on limited examples can sometimes perform well on data it has never seen. Vapnik and Chervonenkis connected learning, probability, and model capacity through measures such as VC dimension. Their work became a foundation for statistical learning theory and shaped how machine learning thinks about generalization.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1971-vc-theory_vladimir-vapnik.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1971-vc-theory_generalization.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Statistical learning theory was introduced in the late 1960's.\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>An Overview of Statistical Learning Theory</em>, Vladimir N. Vapnik, IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks, 1999","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Theory / VC theory","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Statistical learning theory was introduced in the late 1960's.\"<br>source：<em>An Overview of Statistical Learning Theory</em>, Vladimir N. Vapnik, IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks, 1999"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"The 1971 Vapnik-Chervonenkis paper made generalization a mathematical question about uniform convergence across a whole class of events or hypotheses. Vapnik's 1995 book later synthesized the framework for statistical learning theory.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The key display idea is the gap between fitting examples and performing on unseen data. VC dimension gives a way to reason about when model flexibility helps and when it becomes overfitting risk.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat VC theory as one of the mathematical foundations of machine learning, while noting that classical bounds can be conservative for modern deep networks. Its long-term legacy is the language it gave researchers for model capacity, generalization, and learning from finite samples.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1971-vc-theory-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does VC theory mainly help explain in machine learning?","zh":"VC 理论主要帮助解释机器学习中的什么问题？"},"options":[{"en":"Why training performance may or may not generalize to unseen data","zh":"为什么训练表现可能泛化或不能泛化到未见数据"},{"en":"How to make a monitor larger","zh":"如何把显示器做得更大"},{"en":"Why all datasets have the same labels","zh":"为什么所有数据集都有相同标签"},{"en":"How to remove probability from learning","zh":"如何从学习中去掉概率"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"VC dimension and uniform convergence connect sample size, model capacity, training error and expected test behavior.","zh":"VC 维和一致收敛把样本量、模型容量、训练误差与预期测试表现联系起来。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["generalization","capacity"]}]}`

  - Legacy: `null`

  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"History","zh":"历史"},"label":{"en":"The Birth of Prolog","zh":"Prolog 的诞生"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1145/155360.155362"},{"type":{"en":"Archive","zh":"档案"},"label":{"en":"Prolog Heritage","zh":"Prolog Heritage"},"url":"https://www.prolog-heritage.org/en/Prolog_50.html"},{"type":{"en":"Language docs","zh":"语言文档"},"label":{"en":"SWI-Prolog documentation","zh":"SWI-Prolog documentation"},"url":"https://www.swi-prolog.org/pldoc/doc_for?object=manual"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-the-birth-of-prolog","type":{"zh":"历史","en":"History"},"label":{"zh":"Prolog 的诞生","en":"The Birth of Prolog"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1145/155360.155362","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-prolog-heritage","type":{"zh":"档案","en":"Archive"},"label":{"zh":"Prolog Heritage","en":"Prolog Heritage"},"url":"https://www.prolog-heritage.org/en/Prolog_50.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"archive"},{"id":"source-swi-prolog-documentation","type":{"zh":"语言文档","en":"Language docs"},"label":{"zh":"SWI-Prolog documentation","en":"SWI-Prolog documentation"},"url":"https://www.swi-prolog.org/pldoc/doc_for?object=manual","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"By the early 1970s, symbolic AI needed languages that could express rules, relations, and search without burying them under procedural code. This context helps viewers place PROLOG in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","zh":"到 1970 年代初，符号 AI 需要能表达规则、关系和搜索的语言，而不是把它们埋在过程式代码里。 这段背景帮助观众把PROLOG放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"A Prolog program is a database of relations. Query evaluation becomes a controlled search through logical consequences.","zh":"Prolog 程序是关系数据库。查询求值变成对逻辑后果的受控搜索。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Prolog as a landmark in logic programming and declarative computation. Its long-term legacy is the durable idea that facts, rules, unification, and backtracking can form an executable reasoning system.","zh":"专家通常把 Prolog 视为逻辑程序设计和声明式计算的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于证明事实、规则、合一和回溯可以组成可执行推理系统。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"到 1970 年代初，符号 AI 需要能表达规则、关系和搜索的语言，而不是把它们埋在过程式代码里。 这段背景帮助观众把PROLOG放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","en":"By the early 1970s, symbolic AI needed languages that could express rules, relations, and search without burying them under procedural code. This context helps viewers place PROLOG in the technical problems and research priorities of its time."},"sourceIds":["source-the-birth-of-prolog"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Prolog 程序是关系数据库。查询求值变成对逻辑后果的受控搜索。","en":"A Prolog program is a database of relations. Query evaluation becomes a controlled search through logical consequences."},"sourceIds":["source-the-birth-of-prolog"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Prolog 视为逻辑程序设计和声明式计算的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于证明事实、规则、合一和回溯可以组成可执行推理系统。","en":"Experts generally treat Prolog as a landmark in logic programming and declarative computation. Its long-term legacy is the durable idea that facts, rules, unification, and backtracking can form an executable reasoning system."},"sourceIds":["source-the-birth-of-prolog"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1973-prolog-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does a Prolog query mainly trigger?","zh":"Prolog 查询主要会触发什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A search for facts and rules that prove the query","zh":"对能证明查询的事实和规则进行搜索"},{"en":"A fixed image convolution","zh":"固定图像卷积"},{"en":"A random tree ensemble","zh":"随机树集成"},{"en":"A GPU-only matrix benchmark","zh":"只面向 GPU 的矩阵基准"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Prolog evaluates queries by unifying terms with facts and rules, then backtracking through alternatives when needed.","zh":"Prolog 通过将项与事实和规则合一来求值查询，并在需要时回溯尝试其他路径。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["language","logic"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1973-prolog-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Prolog 查询主要会触发什么？","en":"What does a Prolog query mainly trigger?"},"options":[{"zh":"对能证明查询的事实和规则进行搜索","en":"A search for facts and rules that prove the query"},{"zh":"固定图像卷积","en":"A fixed image convolution"},{"zh":"随机树集成","en":"A random tree ensemble"},{"zh":"只面向 GPU 的矩阵基准","en":"A GPU-only matrix benchmark"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Prolog 通过将项与事实和规则合一来求值查询，并在需要时回溯尝试其他路径。","en":"Prolog evaluates queries by unifying terms with facts and rules, then backtracking through alternatives when needed."},"sourceIds":["source-the-birth-of-prolog"],"assetIds":["asset-1973-prolog-alain-colmerauer"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1973","title":"PROLOG","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>PROLOG 让逻辑变得可执行。程序员不再只写一步步过程，而是写事实与规则，再提出查询，由系统通过合一和回溯求解。它把定理证明、自然语言处理和知识表示连接成一种实用的符号 AI 工具。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1973-prolog_alain-colmerauer.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1973-prolog_query-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1973-prolog_unification-trace.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"逻辑程序设计\"","quoteAttribution":"《Prolog 的诞生》, 阿兰·科尔梅罗尔、菲利普·鲁塞尔, 《ACM SIGPLAN 通讯》, 1993","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：语言 / PROLOG","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"逻辑程序设计\"<br>source：《Prolog 的诞生》, 阿兰·科尔梅罗尔、菲利普·鲁塞尔, 《ACM SIGPLAN 通讯》, 1993"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"到 1970 年代初，符号 AI 需要能表达规则、关系和搜索的语言，而不是把它们埋在过程式代码里。 这段背景帮助观众把PROLOG放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Prolog 程序是关系数据库。查询求值变成对逻辑后果的受控搜索。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Prolog 视为逻辑程序设计和声明式计算的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于证明事实、规则、合一和回溯可以组成可执行推理系统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1973-prolog-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does a Prolog query mainly trigger?","zh":"Prolog 查询主要会触发什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A search for facts and rules that prove the query","zh":"对能证明查询的事实和规则进行搜索"},{"en":"A fixed image convolution","zh":"固定图像卷积"},{"en":"A random tree ensemble","zh":"随机树集成"},{"en":"A GPU-only matrix benchmark","zh":"只面向 GPU 的矩阵基准"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Prolog evaluates queries by unifying terms with facts and rules, then backtracking through alternatives when needed.","zh":"Prolog 通过将项与事实和规则合一来求值查询，并在需要时回溯尝试其他路径。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["language","logic"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1973","title":"PROLOG","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>PROLOG 让逻辑变得可执行。程序员不再只写一步步过程，而是写事实与规则，再提出查询，由系统通过合一和回溯求解。它把定理证明、自然语言处理和知识表示连接成一种实用的符号 AI 工具。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1973-prolog_alain-colmerauer.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1973-prolog_query-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1973-prolog_unification-trace.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"逻辑程序设计\"","quoteAttribution":"《Prolog 的诞生》, 阿兰·科尔梅罗尔、菲利普·鲁塞尔, 《ACM SIGPLAN 通讯》, 1993","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：语言 / PROLOG","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"逻辑程序设计\"<br>source：《Prolog 的诞生》, 阿兰·科尔梅罗尔、菲利普·鲁塞尔, 《ACM SIGPLAN 通讯》, 1993"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"到 1970 年代初，符号 AI 需要能表达规则、关系和搜索的语言，而不是把它们埋在过程式代码里。 这段背景帮助观众把PROLOG放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Prolog 程序是关系数据库。查询求值变成对逻辑后果的受控搜索。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Prolog 视为逻辑程序设计和声明式计算的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于证明事实、规则、合一和回溯可以组成可执行推理系统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1973-prolog-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Prolog 查询主要会触发什么？","en":"What does a Prolog query mainly trigger?"},"options":[{"zh":"对能证明查询的事实和规则进行搜索","en":"A search for facts and rules that prove the query"},{"zh":"固定图像卷积","en":"A fixed image convolution"},{"zh":"随机树集成","en":"A random tree ensemble"},{"zh":"只面向 GPU 的矩阵基准","en":"A GPU-only matrix benchmark"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Prolog 通过将项与事实和规则合一来求值查询，并在需要时回溯尝试其他路径。","en":"Prolog evaluates queries by unifying terms with facts and rules, then backtracking through alternatives when needed."},"sourceIds":["source-the-birth-of-prolog"],"assetIds":["asset-1973-prolog-alain-colmerauer"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1973","title":"PROLOG","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>PROLOG made logic executable. Instead of writing step-by-step procedures, programmers wrote facts and rules, then asked queries that the system solved by unification and backtracking. The language joined theorem proving, natural-language work, and knowledge representation into a practical symbolic AI tool.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1973-prolog_alain-colmerauer.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1973-prolog_query-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1973-prolog_unification-trace.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"logic programming\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>The Birth of Prolog</em>, Alain Colmerauer and Philippe Roussel, ACM SIGPLAN Notices, 1993","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Language / PROLOG","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"logic programming\"<br>source：<em>The Birth of Prolog</em>, Alain Colmerauer and Philippe Roussel, ACM SIGPLAN Notices, 1993"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"By the early 1970s, symbolic AI needed languages that could express rules, relations, and search without burying them under procedural code. This context helps viewers place PROLOG in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"A Prolog program is a database of relations. Query evaluation becomes a controlled search through logical consequences.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Prolog as a landmark in logic programming and declarative computation. Its long-term legacy is the durable idea that facts, rules, unification, and backtracking can form an executable reasoning system.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1973-prolog-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does a Prolog query mainly trigger?","zh":"Prolog 查询主要会触发什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A search for facts and rules that prove the query","zh":"对能证明查询的事实和规则进行搜索"},{"en":"A fixed image convolution","zh":"固定图像卷积"},{"en":"A random tree ensemble","zh":"随机树集成"},{"en":"A GPU-only matrix benchmark","zh":"只面向 GPU 的矩阵基准"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Prolog evaluates queries by unifying terms with facts and rules, then backtracking through alternatives when needed.","zh":"Prolog 通过将项与事实和规则合一来求值查询，并在需要时回溯尝试其他路径。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["language","logic"]}]}`

### milestone-1974-frame

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`

  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"A Framework for Representing Knowledge","zh":"表示知识的一种框架"},"url":"https://courses.media.mit.edu/2004spring/mas966/Minsky%201974%20Framework%20for%20knowledge.pdf"},{"type":{"en":"Profile","zh":"人物资料"},"label":{"en":"Marvin Minsky obituary, MIT News","zh":"马文·明斯基讣告，麻省理工学院新闻"},"url":"https://news.mit.edu/2016/marvin-minsky-obituary-0125"},{"type":{"en":"Reference","zh":"参考资料"},"label":{"en":"Frame, MIT AI memo bibliographic record","zh":"框架论文：麻省理工学院 AI 备忘录书目记录"},"url":"https://dspace.mit.edu/handle/1721.1/6089"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-a-framework-for-representing-knowledge","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"表示知识的一种框架","en":"A Framework for Representing Knowledge"},"url":"https://courses.media.mit.edu/2004spring/mas966/Minsky%201974%20Framework%20for%20knowledge.pdf","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-marvin-minsky-obituary-mit-news","type":{"zh":"人物资料","en":"Profile"},"label":{"zh":"马文·明斯基讣告，麻省理工学院新闻","en":"Marvin Minsky obituary, MIT News"},"url":"https://news.mit.edu/2016/marvin-minsky-obituary-0125","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-frame-mit-ai-memo-bibliographic-record","type":{"zh":"参考资料","en":"Reference"},"label":{"zh":"框架论文：麻省理工学院 AI 备忘录书目记录","en":"Frame, MIT AI memo bibliographic record"},"url":"https://dspace.mit.edu/handle/1721.1/6089","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Symbolic AI needed richer structures than flat predicate lists. Frames offered reusable templates for scenes and concepts.","zh":"符号 AI 需要比扁平谓词列表更丰富的结构。框架为场景和概念提供可复用模板。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"A frame stores slots such as parts, roles, defaults, and attached procedures; missing information can be filled by expectations. The key mechanism is Structured slots with defaults and inheritance, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"框架存储部件、角色、默认值和附加过程等槽；缺失信息可以由预期补齐。 关键机制是带默认值和继承的槽结构，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat frames as a central knowledge-representation idea from symbolic AI. Their long-term legacy is the object-like organization of defaults, slots, and inheritance that influenced later knowledge bases, schemas, and semantic systems.","zh":"专家通常把框架视为符号 AI 中核心的知识表示思想。它的长期影响在于用类似对象的方式组织默认值、槽和继承，并影响了后来的知识库、模式和语义系统。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"符号 AI 需要比扁平谓词列表更丰富的结构。框架为场景和概念提供可复用模板。","en":"Symbolic AI needed richer structures than flat predicate lists. Frames offered reusable templates for scenes and concepts."},"sourceIds":["source-a-framework-for-representing-knowledge"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"框架存储部件、角色、默认值和附加过程等槽；缺失信息可以由预期补齐。 关键机制是带默认值和继承的槽结构，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"A frame stores slots such as parts, roles, defaults, and attached procedures; missing information can be filled by expectations. The key mechanism is Structured slots with defaults and inheritance, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-a-framework-for-representing-knowledge"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把框架视为符号 AI 中核心的知识表示思想。它的长期影响在于用类似对象的方式组织默认值、槽和继承，并影响了后来的知识库、模式和语义系统。","en":"Experts generally treat frames as a central knowledge-representation idea from symbolic AI. Their long-term legacy is the object-like organization of defaults, slots, and inheritance that influenced later knowledge bases, schemas, and semantic systems."},"sourceIds":["source-a-framework-for-representing-knowledge"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1974-frame-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is a frame mainly used for?","zh":"框架主要用来做什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Represent a stereotyped situation with slots and defaults","zh":"用槽和默认值表示典型情境"},{"en":"Normalize neural activations by minibatch","zh":"按小批量归一化神经激活"},{"en":"Search chess moves on custom chips","zh":"在定制芯片上搜索棋步"},{"en":"Draw t-SNE scatter plots only","zh":"只绘制 t-SNE 散点图"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Frames organize contextual knowledge into slots, default assumptions, and inherited structure.","zh":"框架把上下文知识组织成槽、默认假设和继承结构。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["knowledge-representation"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1974-frame-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"框架主要用来做什么？","en":"What is a frame mainly used for?"},"options":[{"zh":"用槽和默认值表示典型情境","en":"Represent a stereotyped situation with slots and defaults"},{"zh":"按小批量归一化神经激活","en":"Normalize neural activations by minibatch"},{"zh":"在定制芯片上搜索棋步","en":"Search chess moves on custom chips"},{"zh":"只绘制 t-SNE 散点图","en":"Draw t-SNE scatter plots only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"框架把上下文知识组织成槽、默认假设和继承结构。","en":"Frames organize contextual knowledge into slots, default assumptions, and inherited structure."},"sourceIds":["source-a-framework-for-representing-knowledge"],"assetIds":["asset-1974-frame-marvin-minsky"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1974","title":"框架","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>框架提出了一种把典型情境表示为槽、默认值、预期和过程组合的方式。它不把知识看成孤立事实，而是组织“通常成立什么”和“接下来该检查什么”。它影响了语义网络、面向对象知识系统，以及 AI 系统建模上下文的方式。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1974-frame_marvin-minsky.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1974-frame_slot-card.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1974-frame_inheritance.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"带默认值和继承的槽结构\"","quoteAttribution":"《表示知识的一种框架》, 马文·明斯基","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：知识表示 / 框架","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"带默认值和继承的槽结构\"<br>source：《表示知识的一种框架》, 马文·明斯基"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"符号 AI 需要比扁平谓词列表更丰富的结构。框架为场景和概念提供可复用模板。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"框架存储部件、角色、默认值和附加过程等槽；缺失信息可以由预期补齐。 关键机制是带默认值和继承的槽结构，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把框架视为符号 AI 中核心的知识表示思想。它的长期影响在于用类似对象的方式组织默认值、槽和继承，并影响了后来的知识库、模式和语义系统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1974-frame-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is a frame mainly used for?","zh":"框架主要用来做什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Represent a stereotyped situation with slots and defaults","zh":"用槽和默认值表示典型情境"},{"en":"Normalize neural activations by minibatch","zh":"按小批量归一化神经激活"},{"en":"Search chess moves on custom chips","zh":"在定制芯片上搜索棋步"},{"en":"Draw t-SNE scatter plots only","zh":"只绘制 t-SNE 散点图"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Frames organize contextual knowledge into slots, default assumptions, and inherited structure.","zh":"框架把上下文知识组织成槽、默认假设和继承结构。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["knowledge-representation"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1974","title":"框架","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>框架提出了一种把典型情境表示为槽、默认值、预期和过程组合的方式。它不把知识看成孤立事实，而是组织“通常成立什么”和“接下来该检查什么”。它影响了语义网络、面向对象知识系统，以及 AI 系统建模上下文的方式。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1974-frame_marvin-minsky.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1974-frame_slot-card.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1974-frame_inheritance.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"带默认值和继承的槽结构\"","quoteAttribution":"《表示知识的一种框架》, 马文·明斯基","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：知识表示 / 框架","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"带默认值和继承的槽结构\"<br>source：《表示知识的一种框架》, 马文·明斯基"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"符号 AI 需要比扁平谓词列表更丰富的结构。框架为场景和概念提供可复用模板。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"框架存储部件、角色、默认值和附加过程等槽；缺失信息可以由预期补齐。 关键机制是带默认值和继承的槽结构，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把框架视为符号 AI 中核心的知识表示思想。它的长期影响在于用类似对象的方式组织默认值、槽和继承，并影响了后来的知识库、模式和语义系统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1974-frame-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"框架主要用来做什么？","en":"What is a frame mainly used for?"},"options":[{"zh":"用槽和默认值表示典型情境","en":"Represent a stereotyped situation with slots and defaults"},{"zh":"按小批量归一化神经激活","en":"Normalize neural activations by minibatch"},{"zh":"在定制芯片上搜索棋步","en":"Search chess moves on custom chips"},{"zh":"只绘制 t-SNE 散点图","en":"Draw t-SNE scatter plots only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"框架把上下文知识组织成槽、默认假设和继承结构。","en":"Frames organize contextual knowledge into slots, default assumptions, and inherited structure."},"sourceIds":["source-a-framework-for-representing-knowledge"],"assetIds":["asset-1974-frame-marvin-minsky"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1974","title":"Frame","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Frames proposed a way to represent stereotyped situations as structured bundles of slots, defaults, expectations, and procedures. Instead of treating knowledge as isolated facts, frames organize what is normally true and what to check next. They influenced semantic networks, object-oriented knowledge systems, and the way AI systems model context.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1974-frame_marvin-minsky.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1974-frame_slot-card.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1974-frame_inheritance.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Structured slots with defaults and inheritance\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>A Framework for Representing Knowledge</em>, Marvin Minsky","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Knowledge representation / Frame","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Structured slots with defaults and inheritance\"<br>source：<em>A Framework for Representing Knowledge</em>, Marvin Minsky"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Symbolic AI needed richer structures than flat predicate lists. Frames offered reusable templates for scenes and concepts.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"A frame stores slots such as parts, roles, defaults, and attached procedures; missing information can be filled by expectations. The key mechanism is Structured slots with defaults and inheritance, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat frames as a central knowledge-representation idea from symbolic AI. Their long-term legacy is the object-like organization of defaults, slots, and inheritance that influenced later knowledge bases, schemas, and semantic systems.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1974-frame-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is a frame mainly used for?","zh":"框架主要用来做什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Represent a stereotyped situation with slots and defaults","zh":"用槽和默认值表示典型情境"},{"en":"Normalize neural activations by minibatch","zh":"按小批量归一化神经激活"},{"en":"Search chess moves on custom chips","zh":"在定制芯片上搜索棋步"},{"en":"Draw t-SNE scatter plots only","zh":"只绘制 t-SNE 散点图"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Frames organize contextual knowledge into slots, default assumptions, and inherited structure.","zh":"框架把上下文知识组织成槽、默认假设和继承结构。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["knowledge-representation"]}]}`
