### milestone-1975-genetic-algorithm

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1975"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Book","zh":"图书"},"label":{"en":"Adaptation in Natural and Artificial Systems","zh":"自然系统与人工系统中的适应"},"url":"https://mitpress.mit.edu/9780262581110/adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems/"},{"type":{"en":"Toolkit","zh":"工具包"},"label":{"en":"DEAP evolutionary computation framework","zh":"DEAP evolutionary computation framework"},"url":"https://deap.readthedocs.io/en/master/"},{"type":{"en":"Toolkit","zh":"工具包"},"label":{"en":"ECJ evolutionary computation system","zh":"ECJ evolutionary computation system"},"url":"https://cs.gmu.edu/~eclab/projects/ecj/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems","type":{"zh":"图书","en":"Book"},"label":{"zh":"自然系统与人工系统中的适应","en":"Adaptation in Natural and Artificial Systems"},"url":"https://mitpress.mit.edu/9780262581110/adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"book"},{"id":"source-deap-evolutionary-computation-framework","type":{"zh":"工具包","en":"Toolkit"},"label":{"zh":"DEAP evolutionary computation framework","en":"DEAP evolutionary computation framework"},"url":"https://deap.readthedocs.io/en/master/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"toolkit"},{"id":"source-ecj-evolutionary-computation-system","type":{"zh":"工具包","en":"Toolkit"},"label":{"zh":"ECJ evolutionary computation system","en":"ECJ evolutionary computation system"},"url":"https://cs.gmu.edu/~eclab/projects/ecj/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"toolkit"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Before deep learning dominated AI, search was one of the field’s central metaphors. Holland brought biological adaptation into computation, making it possible to study learning and optimization in artificial populations.","zh":"在深度学习主导 AI 之前，搜索是这个领域的核心隐喻之一。霍兰德 将生物适应引入计算，使研究人工种群中的学习与优化成为可能。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"A genetic algorithm does not improve one solution directly. It evolves a population by repeatedly scoring, selecting, recombining, and mutating candidates.","zh":"遗传算法不是直接改进单个解，而是反复评分、选择、重组和变异候选解，让一个种群逐步演化。 关键机制是基于种群的进化搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat genetic algorithms as useful search heuristics for difficult design spaces, not as a general theory of intelligence. Their long-term legacy is population-based exploration for problems where gradients are unavailable, objectives are awkward, or candidate designs must be evolved.","zh":"专家通常把遗传算法视为困难设计空间中的有用搜索启发式方法，而不是通用智能理论。它们的长期影响在于基于种群的探索，适用于没有梯度、目标函数棘手或候选设计需要演化的任务。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"在深度学习主导 AI 之前，搜索是这个领域的核心隐喻之一。霍兰德 将生物适应引入计算，使研究人工种群中的学习与优化成为可能。","en":"Before deep learning dominated AI, search was one of the field’s central metaphors. Holland brought biological adaptation into computation, making it possible to study learning and optimization in artificial populations."},"sourceIds":["source-adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"遗传算法不是直接改进单个解，而是反复评分、选择、重组和变异候选解，让一个种群逐步演化。","en":"A genetic algorithm does not improve one solution directly. It evolves a population by repeatedly scoring, selecting, recombining, and mutating candidates."},"sourceIds":["source-adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把遗传算法视为困难设计空间中的有用搜索启发式方法，而不是通用智能理论。它们的长期影响在于基于种群的探索，适用于没有梯度、目标函数棘手或候选设计需要演化的任务。","en":"Experts generally treat genetic algorithms as useful search heuristics for difficult design spaces, not as a general theory of intelligence. Their long-term legacy is population-based exploration for problems where gradients are unavailable, objectives are awkward, or candidate designs must be evolved."},"sourceIds":["source-adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1975-genetic-algorithm-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does a genetic algorithm evolve over time?","zh":"遗传算法随时间演化的是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A population of candidate solutions","zh":"一组候选解种群"},{"en":"Only a single fixed answer","zh":"只有一个固定答案"},{"en":"A handwritten theorem proof only","zh":"仅一个手写定理证明"},{"en":"The monitor resolution","zh":"显示器分辨率"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Genetic algorithms maintain many candidates, select fitter ones, recombine them, and mutate them to continue search.","zh":"遗传算法维护多个候选解，选择表现更好的个体，进行重组和变异来继续搜索。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["search","optimization"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"quiz-1975-genetic-algorithm-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"遗传算法随时间演化的是什么？","en":"What does a genetic algorithm evolve over time?"},"options":[{"zh":"一组候选解种群","en":"A population of candidate solutions"},{"zh":"只有一个固定答案","en":"Only a single fixed answer"},{"zh":"仅一个手写定理证明","en":"A handwritten theorem proof only"},{"zh":"显示器分辨率","en":"The monitor resolution"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"遗传算法维护多个候选解，选择表现更好的个体，进行重组和变异来继续搜索。","en":"Genetic algorithms maintain many candidates, select fitter ones, recombine them, and mutate them to continue search."},"sourceIds":["source-adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems"],"assetIds":["asset-1975-genetic-algorithm-john-henry-holland"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1975","title":"遗传算法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>John 霍兰德 将一种搜索方式形式化：维护候选解种群，选择表现更好的个体，重组片段，并加入变异。遗传算法成为 AI 搜索、优化、复杂系统和人工生命之间持久的桥梁。它在历史上尤其重要，因为它把探索、变化和选择变成了可编程的设计原则。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1975-genetic-algorithm_john-henry-holland.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1975-genetic-algorithm_population-cycle.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1975-genetic-algorithm_chromosome-crossover.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"自然与人工系统中的适应\"","quoteAttribution":"《自然系统与人工系统中的适应》, 约翰·H·霍兰德, 密歇根大学出版社 / 麻省理工学院出版社版本, 1975","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：搜索与优化 / 遗传算法","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"自然与人工系统中的适应\"<br>source：《自然系统与人工系统中的适应》, 约翰·H·霍兰德, 密歇根大学出版社 / 麻省理工学院出版社版本, 1975"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"在深度学习主导 AI 之前，搜索是这个领域的核心隐喻之一。霍兰德 将生物适应引入计算，使研究人工种群中的学习与优化成为可能。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"遗传算法不是直接改进单个解，而是反复评分、选择、重组和变异候选解，让一个种群逐步演化。 关键机制是基于种群的进化搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把遗传算法视为困难设计空间中的有用搜索启发式方法，而不是通用智能理论。它们的长期影响在于基于种群的探索，适用于没有梯度、目标函数棘手或候选设计需要演化的任务。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1975-genetic-algorithm-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does a genetic algorithm evolve over time?","zh":"遗传算法随时间演化的是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A population of candidate solutions","zh":"一组候选解种群"},{"en":"Only a single fixed answer","zh":"只有一个固定答案"},{"en":"A handwritten theorem proof only","zh":"仅一个手写定理证明"},{"en":"The monitor resolution","zh":"显示器分辨率"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Genetic algorithms maintain many candidates, select fitter ones, recombine them, and mutate them to continue search.","zh":"遗传算法维护多个候选解，选择表现更好的个体，进行重组和变异来继续搜索。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["search","optimization"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1975","title":"遗传算法","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>John 霍兰德 将一种搜索方式形式化：维护候选解种群，选择表现更好的个体，重组片段，并加入变异。遗传算法成为 AI 搜索、优化、复杂系统和人工生命之间持久的桥梁。它在历史上尤其重要，因为它把探索、变化和选择变成了可编程的设计原则。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1975-genetic-algorithm_john-henry-holland.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1975-genetic-algorithm_population-cycle.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1975-genetic-algorithm_chromosome-crossover.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"自然与人工系统中的适应\"","quoteAttribution":"《自然系统与人工系统中的适应》, 约翰·H·霍兰德, 密歇根大学出版社 / 麻省理工学院出版社版本, 1975","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：搜索与优化 / 遗传算法","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"自然与人工系统中的适应\"<br>source：《自然系统与人工系统中的适应》, 约翰·H·霍兰德, 密歇根大学出版社 / 麻省理工学院出版社版本, 1975"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"在深度学习主导 AI 之前，搜索是这个领域的核心隐喻之一。霍兰德 将生物适应引入计算，使研究人工种群中的学习与优化成为可能。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"遗传算法不是直接改进单个解，而是反复评分、选择、重组和变异候选解，让一个种群逐步演化。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把遗传算法视为困难设计空间中的有用搜索启发式方法，而不是通用智能理论。它们的长期影响在于基于种群的探索，适用于没有梯度、目标函数棘手或候选设计需要演化的任务。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"quiz-1975-genetic-algorithm-ai100","storylineId":"bench-council-ai100","question":{"zh":"遗传算法随时间演化的是什么？","en":"What does a genetic algorithm evolve over time?"},"options":[{"zh":"一组候选解种群","en":"A population of candidate solutions"},{"zh":"只有一个固定答案","en":"Only a single fixed answer"},{"zh":"仅一个手写定理证明","en":"A handwritten theorem proof only"},{"zh":"显示器分辨率","en":"The monitor resolution"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"遗传算法维护多个候选解，选择表现更好的个体，进行重组和变异来继续搜索。","en":"Genetic algorithms maintain many candidates, select fitter ones, recombine them, and mutate them to continue search."},"sourceIds":["source-adaptation-in-natural-and-artificial-systems"],"assetIds":["asset-1975-genetic-algorithm-john-henry-holland"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1975","title":"Genetic Algorithms","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>John Holland formalized a way to search by maintaining a population of candidates, selecting fitter variants, recombining pieces, and injecting mutation. Genetic algorithms became a durable bridge between AI search, optimization, complex systems, and artificial life. They are especially useful historically because they made exploration, variation, and selection into programmable design principles.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1975-genetic-algorithm_john-henry-holland.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1975-genetic-algorithm_population-cycle.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1975-genetic-algorithm_chromosome-crossover.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"adaptation in natural and artificial systems\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Adaptation in Natural and Artificial Systems</em>, John H. Holland, University of Michigan Press / MIT Press edition, 1975"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Before deep learning dominated AI, search was one of the field’s central metaphors. Holland brought biological adaptation into computation, making it possible to study learning and optimization in artificial populations.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"A genetic algorithm does not improve one solution directly. It evolves a population by repeatedly scoring, selecting, recombining, and mutating candidates.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat genetic algorithms as useful search heuristics for difficult design spaces, not as a general theory of intelligence. Their long-term legacy is population-based exploration for problems where gradients are unavailable, objectives are awkward, or candidate designs must be evolved.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1975-genetic-algorithm-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does a genetic algorithm evolve over time?","zh":"遗传算法随时间演化的是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A population of candidate solutions","zh":"一组候选解种群"},{"en":"Only a single fixed answer","zh":"只有一个固定答案"},{"en":"A handwritten theorem proof only","zh":"仅一个手写定理证明"},{"en":"The monitor resolution","zh":"显示器分辨率"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Genetic algorithms maintain many candidates, select fitter ones, recombine them, and mutate them to continue search.","zh":"遗传算法维护多个候选解，选择表现更好的个体，进行重组和变异来继续搜索。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["search","optimization"]}]}`

### milestone-1980-xcon-r1

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1978-1980"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"R1: An Expert in the Computer Systems Domain","zh":"R1：计算机系统领域的专家"},"url":"https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/8022"},{"type":{"en":"Retrospective","zh":"回顾"},"label":{"en":"R1 Revisited: Four Years in the Trenches","zh":"重访 R1：一线四年"},"url":"https://ojs.aaai.org/aimagazine/index.php/aimagazine/article/view/445"},{"type":{"en":"Overview","zh":"概览"},"label":{"en":"XCON overview","zh":"XCON 概览"},"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xcon"},{"type":{"en":"Image source","zh":"图片来源"},"label":{"en":"DEC VAX-11/780 photo","zh":"DEC VAX-11/780 照片"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:LCM_-_DEC_VAX_11-780-5_-_01.jpg"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-r1-an-expert-in-the-computer-systems-domain","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"R1：计算机系统领域的专家","en":"R1: An Expert in the Computer Systems Domain"},"url":"https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/8022","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-r1-revisited-four-years-in-the-trenches","type":{"zh":"回顾","en":"Retrospective"},"label":{"zh":"重访 R1：一线四年","en":"R1 Revisited: Four Years in the Trenches"},"url":"https://ojs.aaai.org/aimagazine/index.php/aimagazine/article/view/445","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-xcon-overview","type":{"zh":"概览","en":"Overview"},"label":{"zh":"XCON 概览","en":"XCON overview"},"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xcon","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-dec-vax-11-780-photo","type":{"zh":"图片来源","en":"Image source"},"label":{"zh":"DEC VAX-11/780 照片","en":"DEC VAX-11/780 photo"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:LCM_-_DEC_VAX_11-780-5_-_01.jpg","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Computer systems were sold as many interacting components, and human configuration errors could delay or break orders. This context helps viewers place XCON-R1 in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","zh":"计算机系统由许多相互作用的组件销售，人为配置错误可能延误订单或导致错误交付。 这段背景帮助观众把XCON / R1 专家系统放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Production rules matched facts in working memory, fired actions, and incrementally built a valid hardware configuration. The key mechanism is OPS5 production-rule configuration, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"产生式规则匹配工作记忆中的事实，触发动作，并逐步构建有效硬件配置。 关键机制是OPS5 产生式规则配置，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat XCON/R1 as a landmark industrial expert system and a proof that knowledge engineering could deliver business value. Its long-term legacy is the case-study role it plays in expert-system maintenance, rule management, and applied AI deployment.","zh":"专家通常把 XCON/R1 视为工业专家系统的标志性案例，也证明知识工程能够产生商业价值。它的长期影响在于成为专家系统维护、规则管理和应用 AI 部署的标准案例。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"计算机系统由许多相互作用的组件销售，人为配置错误可能延误订单或导致错误交付。 这段背景帮助观众把XCON / R1 专家系统放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","en":"Computer systems were sold as many interacting components, and human configuration errors could delay or break orders. This context helps viewers place XCON-R1 in the technical problems and research priorities of its time."},"sourceIds":["source-r1-an-expert-in-the-computer-systems-domain"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"产生式规则匹配工作记忆中的事实，触发动作，并逐步构建有效硬件配置。 关键机制是OPS5 产生式规则配置，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"Production rules matched facts in working memory, fired actions, and incrementally built a valid hardware configuration. The key mechanism is OPS5 production-rule configuration, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-r1-an-expert-in-the-computer-systems-domain"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 XCON/R1 视为工业专家系统的标志性案例，也证明知识工程能够产生商业价值。它的长期影响在于成为专家系统维护、规则管理和应用 AI 部署的标准案例。","en":"Experts generally treat XCON/R1 as a landmark industrial expert system and a proof that knowledge engineering could deliver business value. Its long-term legacy is the case-study role it plays in expert-system maintenance, rule management, and applied AI deployment."},"sourceIds":["source-r1-an-expert-in-the-computer-systems-domain"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1980-xcon-r1-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did XCON/R1 configure?","zh":"XCON/R1 主要配置什么？"},"options":[{"en":"DEC VAX computer orders using production rules","zh":"用产生式规则配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单"},{"en":"Protein folds using diffusion","zh":"用扩散模型预测蛋白质折叠"},{"en":"Image clusters with eigenvectors","zh":"用特征向量聚类图像"},{"en":"Jeopardy! clues with endgame tables","zh":"用残局表回答 Jeopardy! 线索"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"R1/XCON encoded configuration expertise as rules that assembled valid VAX component orders.","zh":"R1/XCON 把配置专长编码为规则，用来装配有效的 VAX 组件订单。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["expert-system","production-rules"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1980-xcon-r1-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"XCON/R1 主要配置什么？","en":"What did XCON/R1 configure?"},"options":[{"zh":"用产生式规则配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单","en":"DEC VAX computer orders using production rules"},{"zh":"用扩散模型预测蛋白质折叠","en":"Protein folds using diffusion"},{"zh":"用特征向量聚类图像","en":"Image clusters with eigenvectors"},{"zh":"用残局表回答 Jeopardy! 线索","en":"Jeopardy! clues with endgame tables"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"R1/XCON 把配置专长编码为规则，用来装配有效的 VAX 组件订单。","en":"R1/XCON encoded configuration expertise as rules that assembled valid VAX component orders."},"sourceIds":["source-r1-an-expert-in-the-computer-systems-domain"],"assetIds":["asset-1980-xcon-r1-rule-configurator"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1978-1980","title":"XCON / R1 专家系统","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>XCON 把专家系统研究转化为可见的工业成功。它以产生式规则构建，根据客户需求、组件约束和装配知识配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单，在商业规模上减少昂贵的配置错误。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/71/LCM_-_DEC_VAX_11-780-5_-_01.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/89/VAX_11_780_CPU_Backplane.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1980-xcon-r1_rule-configurator.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1980-xcon-r1_order-flow.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"产生式规则配置真实订单\"","quoteAttribution":"《R1：计算机系统领域的专家》, 约翰·麦克德莫特","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：专家系统 / XCON / R1 专家系统","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"产生式规则配置真实订单\"<br>source：《R1：计算机系统领域的专家》, 约翰·麦克德莫特"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"计算机系统由许多相互作用的组件销售，人为配置错误可能延误订单或导致错误交付。 这段背景帮助观众把XCON / R1 专家系统放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"产生式规则匹配工作记忆中的事实，触发动作，并逐步构建有效硬件配置。 关键机制是OPS5 产生式规则配置，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 XCON/R1 视为工业专家系统的标志性案例，也证明知识工程能够产生商业价值。它的长期影响在于成为专家系统维护、规则管理和应用 AI 部署的标准案例。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1980-xcon-r1-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did XCON/R1 configure?","zh":"XCON/R1 主要配置什么？"},"options":[{"en":"DEC VAX computer orders using production rules","zh":"用产生式规则配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单"},{"en":"Protein folds using diffusion","zh":"用扩散模型预测蛋白质折叠"},{"en":"Image clusters with eigenvectors","zh":"用特征向量聚类图像"},{"en":"Jeopardy! clues with endgame tables","zh":"用残局表回答 Jeopardy! 线索"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"R1/XCON encoded configuration expertise as rules that assembled valid VAX component orders.","zh":"R1/XCON 把配置专长编码为规则，用来装配有效的 VAX 组件订单。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["expert-system","production-rules"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1978-1980","title":"XCON / R1 专家系统","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>XCON 把专家系统研究转化为可见的工业成功。它以产生式规则构建，根据客户需求、组件约束和装配知识配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单，在商业规模上减少昂贵的配置错误。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/71/LCM_-_DEC_VAX_11-780-5_-_01.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/89/VAX_11_780_CPU_Backplane.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1980-xcon-r1_rule-configurator.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1980-xcon-r1_order-flow.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"产生式规则配置真实订单\"","quoteAttribution":"《R1：计算机系统领域的专家》, 约翰·麦克德莫特","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：专家系统 / XCON / R1 专家系统","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"产生式规则配置真实订单\"<br>source：《R1：计算机系统领域的专家》, 约翰·麦克德莫特"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"计算机系统由许多相互作用的组件销售，人为配置错误可能延误订单或导致错误交付。 这段背景帮助观众把XCON / R1 专家系统放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"产生式规则匹配工作记忆中的事实，触发动作，并逐步构建有效硬件配置。 关键机制是OPS5 产生式规则配置，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 XCON/R1 视为工业专家系统的标志性案例，也证明知识工程能够产生商业价值。它的长期影响在于成为专家系统维护、规则管理和应用 AI 部署的标准案例。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1980-xcon-r1-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"XCON/R1 主要配置什么？","en":"What did XCON/R1 configure?"},"options":[{"zh":"用产生式规则配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单","en":"DEC VAX computer orders using production rules"},{"zh":"用扩散模型预测蛋白质折叠","en":"Protein folds using diffusion"},{"zh":"用特征向量聚类图像","en":"Image clusters with eigenvectors"},{"zh":"用残局表回答 Jeopardy! 线索","en":"Jeopardy! clues with endgame tables"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"R1/XCON 把配置专长编码为规则，用来装配有效的 VAX 组件订单。","en":"R1/XCON encoded configuration expertise as rules that assembled valid VAX component orders."},"sourceIds":["source-r1-an-expert-in-the-computer-systems-domain"],"assetIds":["asset-1980-xcon-r1-rule-configurator"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1978-1980","title":"XCON-R1","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>XCON turned expert-system research into a visible industrial success. Built with production rules, it configured DEC VAX computer orders by matching customer requirements, component constraints, and assembly knowledge, reducing costly configuration errors at commercial scale.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/71/LCM_-_DEC_VAX_11-780-5_-_01.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/89/VAX_11_780_CPU_Backplane.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1980-xcon-r1_rule-configurator.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1980-xcon-r1_order-flow.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Production rules configured real orders\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>R1: An Expert in the Computer Systems Domain</em>, John McDermott","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Expert system / XCON-R1","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Production rules configured real orders\"<br>source：<em>R1: An Expert in the Computer Systems Domain</em>, John McDermott"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Computer systems were sold as many interacting components, and human configuration errors could delay or break orders. This context helps viewers place XCON-R1 in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Production rules matched facts in working memory, fired actions, and incrementally built a valid hardware configuration. The key mechanism is OPS5 production-rule configuration, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat XCON/R1 as a landmark industrial expert system and a proof that knowledge engineering could deliver business value. Its long-term legacy is the case-study role it plays in expert-system maintenance, rule management, and applied AI deployment.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1980-xcon-r1-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did XCON/R1 configure?","zh":"XCON/R1 主要配置什么？"},"options":[{"en":"DEC VAX computer orders using production rules","zh":"用产生式规则配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单"},{"en":"Protein folds using diffusion","zh":"用扩散模型预测蛋白质折叠"},{"en":"Image clusters with eigenvectors","zh":"用特征向量聚类图像"},{"en":"Jeopardy! clues with endgame tables","zh":"用残局表回答 Jeopardy! 线索"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"R1/XCON encoded configuration expertise as rules that assembled valid VAX component orders.","zh":"R1/XCON 把配置专长编码为规则，用来装配有效的 VAX 组件订单。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["expert-system","production-rules"]}]}`

### milestone-1982-hopfield-network

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1982"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Neural Networks and Physical Systems","zh":"神经网络与物理系统"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.79.8.2554"},{"type":{"en":"Profile","zh":"人物"},"label":{"en":"Nobel Prize: John J. Hopfield facts","zh":"Nobel Prize: 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德 facts"},"url":"https://www.nobelprize.org/prizes/physics/2024/hopfield/facts/"},{"type":{"en":"Institution","zh":"机构"},"label":{"en":"Princeton Neuroscience Institute profile","zh":"Princeton Neuroscience Institute profile"},"url":"https://pni.princeton.edu/people/john-j-hopfield"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-neural-networks-and-physical-systems","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"神经网络与物理系统","en":"Neural Networks and Physical Systems"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.79.8.2554","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-nobel-prize-john-j-hopfield-facts","type":{"zh":"人物","en":"Profile"},"label":{"zh":"Nobel Prize: 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德 facts","en":"Nobel Prize: John J. Hopfield facts"},"url":"https://www.nobelprize.org/prizes/physics/2024/hopfield/facts/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-princeton-neuroscience-institute-profile","type":{"zh":"机构","en":"Institution"},"label":{"zh":"Princeton Neuroscience Institute profile","en":"Princeton Neuroscience Institute profile"},"url":"https://pni.princeton.edu/people/john-j-hopfield","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Before deep learning, researchers were already asking how large sets of simple units could compute collectively. Hopfield gave this question an energy-based formulation.","zh":"在深度学习之前，研究者已经在追问大量简单单元如何集体计算。Hopfield 给这个问题提供了基于能量的表述。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The network updates units to reduce an energy function, so stored memories become stable attractors. The key mechanism is Attractor dynamics and energy minimization, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"网络更新单元以降低能量函数，因此被存储的记忆会成为稳定吸引子。 关键机制是吸引子动力学与能量最小化，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Hopfield networks as central to the history of energy-based neural computation. Their long-term legacy is the connection between memory, optimization, attractor dynamics, and statistical physics.","zh":"专家通常把 Hopfield 网络视为基于能量的神经计算史中的核心成果。它的长期影响在于连接了记忆、优化、吸引子动力学和统计物理。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"在深度学习之前，研究者已经在追问大量简单单元如何集体计算。Hopfield 给这个问题提供了基于能量的表述。","en":"Before deep learning, researchers were already asking how large sets of simple units could compute collectively. Hopfield gave this question an energy-based formulation."},"sourceIds":["source-neural-networks-and-physical-systems"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"网络更新单元以降低能量函数，因此被存储的记忆会成为稳定吸引子。 关键机制是吸引子动力学与能量最小化，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"The network updates units to reduce an energy function, so stored memories become stable attractors. The key mechanism is Attractor dynamics and energy minimization, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-neural-networks-and-physical-systems"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Hopfield 网络视为基于能量的神经计算史中的核心成果。它的长期影响在于连接了记忆、优化、吸引子动力学和统计物理。","en":"Experts generally treat Hopfield networks as central to the history of energy-based neural computation. Their long-term legacy is the connection between memory, optimization, attractor dynamics, and statistical physics."},"sourceIds":["source-neural-networks-and-physical-systems"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1982-hopfield-network-quiz-1","question":{"en":"In a Hopfield network, what does a stored pattern act like?","zh":"在 Hopfield 网络中，被存储的模式像什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A stable attractor in an energy landscape","zh":"能量地形中的稳定吸引子"},{"en":"A fixed dropout probability","zh":"固定 dropout 概率"},{"en":"A web-scale image label","zh":"网页规模图像标签"},{"en":"A single-shot bounding box","zh":"单次检测框"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Hopfield networks store memories as stable states; noisy inputs can relax toward those states.","zh":"Hopfield 网络把记忆存为稳定状态；带噪输入可以向这些状态收敛。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["neural-network","memory"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1982-hopfield-network-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"在 Hopfield 网络中，被存储的模式像什么？","en":"In a Hopfield network, what does a stored pattern act like?"},"options":[{"zh":"能量地形中的稳定吸引子","en":"A stable attractor in an energy landscape"},{"zh":"固定 dropout 概率","en":"A fixed dropout probability"},{"zh":"网页规模图像标签","en":"A web-scale image label"},{"zh":"单次检测框","en":"A single-shot bounding box"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Hopfield 网络把记忆存为稳定状态；带噪输入可以向这些状态收敛。","en":"Hopfield networks store memories as stable states; noisy inputs can relax toward those states."},"sourceIds":["source-neural-networks-and-physical-systems"],"assetIds":["asset-1982-hopfield-network-john-hopfield"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1982","title":"Hopfield 网络","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Hopfield 网络把神经计算与物理学连接起来。一个模式可以作为能量地形中的吸引子被存储，带噪输入则会收敛回最接近的记忆。它把联想记忆、优化和神经动力学放进同一个概念框架。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1982-hopfield-network_john-hopfield.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1982-hopfield-network_energy-basin.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1982-hopfield-network_memory-grid.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"神经网络与物理系统\"","quoteAttribution":"《具有涌现集体计算能力的神经网络与物理系统》, 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德, 《美国国家科学院院刊》, 1982","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：神经网络 / Hopfield 网络","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"神经网络与物理系统\"<br>source：《具有涌现集体计算能力的神经网络与物理系统》, 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德, 《美国国家科学院院刊》, 1982"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"在深度学习之前，研究者已经在追问大量简单单元如何集体计算。Hopfield 给这个问题提供了基于能量的表述。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"网络更新单元以降低能量函数，因此被存储的记忆会成为稳定吸引子。 关键机制是吸引子动力学与能量最小化，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Hopfield 网络视为基于能量的神经计算史中的核心成果。它的长期影响在于连接了记忆、优化、吸引子动力学和统计物理。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1982-hopfield-network-quiz-1","question":{"en":"In a Hopfield network, what does a stored pattern act like?","zh":"在 Hopfield 网络中，被存储的模式像什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A stable attractor in an energy landscape","zh":"能量地形中的稳定吸引子"},{"en":"A fixed dropout probability","zh":"固定 dropout 概率"},{"en":"A web-scale image label","zh":"网页规模图像标签"},{"en":"A single-shot bounding box","zh":"单次检测框"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Hopfield networks store memories as stable states; noisy inputs can relax toward those states.","zh":"Hopfield 网络把记忆存为稳定状态；带噪输入可以向这些状态收敛。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["neural-network","memory"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1982","title":"Hopfield 网络","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Hopfield 网络把神经计算与物理学连接起来。一个模式可以作为能量地形中的吸引子被存储，带噪输入则会收敛回最接近的记忆。它把联想记忆、优化和神经动力学放进同一个概念框架。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1982-hopfield-network_john-hopfield.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1982-hopfield-network_energy-basin.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1982-hopfield-network_memory-grid.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"神经网络与物理系统\"","quoteAttribution":"《具有涌现集体计算能力的神经网络与物理系统》, 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德, 《美国国家科学院院刊》, 1982","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：神经网络 / Hopfield 网络","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"神经网络与物理系统\"<br>source：《具有涌现集体计算能力的神经网络与物理系统》, 约翰·J·霍普菲尔德, 《美国国家科学院院刊》, 1982"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"在深度学习之前，研究者已经在追问大量简单单元如何集体计算。Hopfield 给这个问题提供了基于能量的表述。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"网络更新单元以降低能量函数，因此被存储的记忆会成为稳定吸引子。 关键机制是吸引子动力学与能量最小化，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Hopfield 网络视为基于能量的神经计算史中的核心成果。它的长期影响在于连接了记忆、优化、吸引子动力学和统计物理。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1982-hopfield-network-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"在 Hopfield 网络中，被存储的模式像什么？","en":"In a Hopfield network, what does a stored pattern act like?"},"options":[{"zh":"能量地形中的稳定吸引子","en":"A stable attractor in an energy landscape"},{"zh":"固定 dropout 概率","en":"A fixed dropout probability"},{"zh":"网页规模图像标签","en":"A web-scale image label"},{"zh":"单次检测框","en":"A single-shot bounding box"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Hopfield 网络把记忆存为稳定状态；带噪输入可以向这些状态收敛。","en":"Hopfield networks store memories as stable states; noisy inputs can relax toward those states."},"sourceIds":["source-neural-networks-and-physical-systems"],"assetIds":["asset-1982-hopfield-network-john-hopfield"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1982","title":"Hopfield Network","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Hopfield networks connected neural computation with physics. A pattern could be stored as an attractor in an energy landscape, and a noisy input could settle back into the closest memory. This made associative memory, optimization, and neural dynamics part of the same conceptual frame.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1982-hopfield-network_john-hopfield.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1982-hopfield-network_energy-basin.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1982-hopfield-network_memory-grid.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"neural networks and physical systems\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Neural Networks and Physical Systems with Emergent Collective Computational Abilities</em>, John J. Hopfield, Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 1982","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Neural Network / Hopfield network","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"neural networks and physical systems\"<br>source：<em>Neural Networks and Physical Systems with Emergent Collective Computational Abilities</em>, John J. Hopfield, Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 1982"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Before deep learning, researchers were already asking how large sets of simple units could compute collectively. Hopfield gave this question an energy-based formulation.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The network updates units to reduce an energy function, so stored memories become stable attractors. The key mechanism is Attractor dynamics and energy minimization, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Hopfield networks as central to the history of energy-based neural computation. Their long-term legacy is the connection between memory, optimization, attractor dynamics, and statistical physics.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1982-hopfield-network-quiz-1","question":{"en":"In a Hopfield network, what does a stored pattern act like?","zh":"在 Hopfield 网络中，被存储的模式像什么？"},"options":[{"en":"A stable attractor in an energy landscape","zh":"能量地形中的稳定吸引子"},{"en":"A fixed dropout probability","zh":"固定 dropout 概率"},{"en":"A web-scale image label","zh":"网页规模图像标签"},{"en":"A single-shot bounding box","zh":"单次检测框"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Hopfield networks store memories as stable states; noisy inputs can relax toward those states.","zh":"Hopfield 网络把记忆存为稳定状态；带噪输入可以向这些状态收敛。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["neural-network","memory"]}]}`

### milestone-1983-simulated-annealing

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"1983"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Optimization by Simulated Annealing","zh":"模拟退火优化"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.220.4598.671"},{"type":{"en":"Optimizer docs","zh":"优化器文档"},"label":{"en":"SciPy dual_annealing","zh":"SciPy dual_annealing"},"url":"https://docs.scipy.org/doc/scipy/reference/generated/scipy.optimize.dual_annealing.html"},{"type":{"en":"Notebook","zh":"笔记本"},"label":{"en":"Hedibert course PDF mirror","zh":"Hedibert course PDF mirror"},"url":"https://hedibert.org/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/1983KirkpatrickGelattVecchi.pdf"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-optimization-by-simulated-annealing","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"模拟退火优化","en":"Optimization by Simulated Annealing"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.220.4598.671","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-scipy-dual-annealing","type":{"zh":"优化器文档","en":"Optimizer docs"},"label":{"zh":"SciPy dual_annealing","en":"SciPy dual_annealing"},"url":"https://docs.scipy.org/doc/scipy/reference/generated/scipy.optimize.dual_annealing.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-hedibert-course-pdf-mirror","type":{"zh":"笔记本","en":"Notebook"},"label":{"zh":"Hedibert course PDF mirror","en":"Hedibert course PDF mirror"},"url":"https://hedibert.org/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/1983KirkpatrickGelattVecchi.pdf","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"book"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Many AI and engineering problems had enormous search spaces where greedy improvement got stuck. Simulated annealing offered a principled way to make controlled uphill moves.","zh":"许多 AI 与工程问题都有巨大搜索空间，贪心改进很容易卡住。模拟退火提供了一种有原则地进行受控“上坡”移动的方法。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"At high temperature, the algorithm explores boldly. As the system cools, it increasingly commits to lower-cost states, imitating the settling of physical materials.","zh":"高温时，算法大胆探索；系统降温后，它越来越倾向低成本状态，模仿物理材料的稳定过程。 关键机制是带降温计划的概率搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat simulated annealing as a classic metaheuristic for escaping local optima, not as a guarantee of easy global optimization. Its long-term legacy is the cooling metaphor for scheduling, routing, placement, and other hard combinatorial searches.","zh":"专家通常把模拟退火视为用于跳出局部最优的经典元启发式方法，而不是轻松获得全局最优的保证。它的长期影响在于降温隐喻被用于调度、路径规划、布局和其他困难组合搜索。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"许多 AI 与工程问题都有巨大搜索空间，贪心改进很容易卡住。模拟退火提供了一种有原则地进行受控“上坡”移动的方法。","en":"Many AI and engineering problems had enormous search spaces where greedy improvement got stuck. Simulated annealing offered a principled way to make controlled uphill moves."},"sourceIds":["source-optimization-by-simulated-annealing"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"高温时，算法大胆探索；系统降温后，它越来越倾向低成本状态，模仿物理材料的稳定过程。 关键机制是带降温计划的概率搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"At high temperature, the algorithm explores boldly. As the system cools, it increasingly commits to lower-cost states, imitating the settling of physical materials."},"sourceIds":["source-optimization-by-simulated-annealing"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把模拟退火视为用于跳出局部最优的经典元启发式方法，而不是轻松获得全局最优的保证。它的长期影响在于降温隐喻被用于调度、路径规划、布局和其他困难组合搜索。","en":"Experts generally treat simulated annealing as a classic metaheuristic for escaping local optima, not as a guarantee of easy global optimization. Its long-term legacy is the cooling metaphor for scheduling, routing, placement, and other hard combinatorial searches."},"sourceIds":["source-optimization-by-simulated-annealing"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1983-simulated-annealing-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why can simulated annealing accept a worse move?","zh":"模拟退火为什么会接受较差移动？"},"options":[{"en":"To escape local optima while temperature is still high","zh":"在温度较高时逃离局部最优"},{"en":"Because it never evaluates solutions","zh":"因为它从不评估解"},{"en":"To force every answer to be wrong","zh":"为了强制所有答案错误"},{"en":"Because it only sorts text","zh":"因为它只排序文本"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Early exploration allows uphill moves with some probability; cooling gradually makes the search more selective.","zh":"早期探索允许以一定概率进行上坡移动；降温会逐渐让搜索更挑剔。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["optimization","search"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1983-simulated-annealing-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"模拟退火为什么会接受较差移动？","en":"Why can simulated annealing accept a worse move?"},"options":[{"zh":"在温度较高时逃离局部最优","en":"To escape local optima while temperature is still high"},{"zh":"因为它从不评估解","en":"Because it never evaluates solutions"},{"zh":"为了强制所有答案错误","en":"To force every answer to be wrong"},{"zh":"因为它只排序文本","en":"Because it only sorts text"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"早期探索允许以一定概率进行上坡移动；降温会逐渐让搜索更挑剔。","en":"Early exploration allows uphill moves with some probability; cooling gradually makes the search more selective."},"sourceIds":["source-optimization-by-simulated-annealing"],"assetIds":["asset-1983-simulated-annealing-scott-kirkpatrick"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1983","title":"模拟退火","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>模拟退火借鉴冶金过程：温度高时，搜索可以接受较差移动以扩大探索；温度降低后，它变得更挑剔。柯克帕特里克、Gelatt 和 Vecchi 展示了这一思想如何处理困难优化问题。该方法成为连接物理、AI 搜索、运筹学和组合优化的经典桥梁。</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1983-simulated-annealing_scott-kirkpatrick.gif","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1983-simulated-annealing_energy-landscape.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1983-simulated-annealing_temperature-schedule.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"通过模拟退火进行优化\"","quoteAttribution":"《模拟退火优化》, 斯科特·柯克帕特里克, C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr.、马里奥·P·维基, 《科学》, 1983","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：优化算法 / 模拟退火","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"通过模拟退火进行优化\"<br>source：《模拟退火优化》, 斯科特·柯克帕特里克, C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr.、马里奥·P·维基, 《科学》, 1983"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"许多 AI 与工程问题都有巨大搜索空间，贪心改进很容易卡住。模拟退火提供了一种有原则地进行受控“上坡”移动的方法。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"高温时，算法大胆探索；系统降温后，它越来越倾向低成本状态，模仿物理材料的稳定过程。 关键机制是带降温计划的概率搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把模拟退火视为用于跳出局部最优的经典元启发式方法，而不是轻松获得全局最优的保证。它的长期影响在于降温隐喻被用于调度、路径规划、布局和其他困难组合搜索。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1983-simulated-annealing-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why can simulated annealing accept a worse move?","zh":"模拟退火为什么会接受较差移动？"},"options":[{"en":"To escape local optima while temperature is still high","zh":"在温度较高时逃离局部最优"},{"en":"Because it never evaluates solutions","zh":"因为它从不评估解"},{"en":"To force every answer to be wrong","zh":"为了强制所有答案错误"},{"en":"Because it only sorts text","zh":"因为它只排序文本"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Early exploration allows uphill moves with some probability; cooling gradually makes the search more selective.","zh":"早期探索允许以一定概率进行上坡移动；降温会逐渐让搜索更挑剔。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["optimization","search"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1983","title":"模拟退火","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>模拟退火借鉴冶金过程：温度高时，搜索可以接受较差移动以扩大探索；温度降低后，它变得更挑剔。柯克帕特里克、Gelatt 和 Vecchi 展示了这一思想如何处理困难优化问题。该方法成为连接物理、AI 搜索、运筹学和组合优化的经典桥梁。</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1983-simulated-annealing_scott-kirkpatrick.gif","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1983-simulated-annealing_energy-landscape.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1983-simulated-annealing_temperature-schedule.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"通过模拟退火进行优化\"","quoteAttribution":"《模拟退火优化》, 斯科特·柯克帕特里克, C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr.、马里奥·P·维基, 《科学》, 1983","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：优化算法 / 模拟退火","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"通过模拟退火进行优化\"<br>source：《模拟退火优化》, 斯科特·柯克帕特里克, C·丹尼尔·格拉特 Jr.、马里奥·P·维基, 《科学》, 1983"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"许多 AI 与工程问题都有巨大搜索空间，贪心改进很容易卡住。模拟退火提供了一种有原则地进行受控“上坡”移动的方法。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"高温时，算法大胆探索；系统降温后，它越来越倾向低成本状态，模仿物理材料的稳定过程。 关键机制是带降温计划的概率搜索，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把模拟退火视为用于跳出局部最优的经典元启发式方法，而不是轻松获得全局最优的保证。它的长期影响在于降温隐喻被用于调度、路径规划、布局和其他困难组合搜索。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1983-simulated-annealing-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"模拟退火为什么会接受较差移动？","en":"Why can simulated annealing accept a worse move?"},"options":[{"zh":"在温度较高时逃离局部最优","en":"To escape local optima while temperature is still high"},{"zh":"因为它从不评估解","en":"Because it never evaluates solutions"},{"zh":"为了强制所有答案错误","en":"To force every answer to be wrong"},{"zh":"因为它只排序文本","en":"Because it only sorts text"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"早期探索允许以一定概率进行上坡移动；降温会逐渐让搜索更挑剔。","en":"Early exploration allows uphill moves with some probability; cooling gradually makes the search more selective."},"sourceIds":["source-optimization-by-simulated-annealing"],"assetIds":["asset-1983-simulated-annealing-scott-kirkpatrick"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1983","title":"Simulated Annealing","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Simulated annealing borrows from metallurgy: when temperature is high, the search can accept worse moves and explore; as temperature cools, it becomes more selective. Kirkpatrick, Gelatt, and Vecchi showed how this idea could attack difficult optimization problems. The method became a classic bridge between physics, AI search, operations research, and combinatorial optimization.</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1983-simulated-annealing_scott-kirkpatrick.gif","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1983-simulated-annealing_energy-landscape.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1983-simulated-annealing_temperature-schedule.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"optimization by simulated annealing\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Optimization by Simulated Annealing</em>, Scott Kirkpatrick, C. Daniel Gelatt Jr., and Mario P. Vecchi, Science, 1983","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Optimization / Simulated annealing","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"optimization by simulated annealing\"<br>source：<em>Optimization by Simulated Annealing</em>, Scott Kirkpatrick, C. Daniel Gelatt Jr., and Mario P. Vecchi, Science, 1983"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Many AI and engineering problems had enormous search spaces where greedy improvement got stuck. Simulated annealing offered a principled way to make controlled uphill moves.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"At high temperature, the algorithm explores boldly. As the system cools, it increasingly commits to lower-cost states, imitating the settling of physical materials.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat simulated annealing as a classic metaheuristic for escaping local optima, not as a guarantee of easy global optimization. Its long-term legacy is the cooling metaphor for scheduling, routing, placement, and other hard combinatorial searches.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1983-simulated-annealing-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why can simulated annealing accept a worse move?","zh":"模拟退火为什么会接受较差移动？"},"options":[{"en":"To escape local optima while temperature is still high","zh":"在温度较高时逃离局部最优"},{"en":"Because it never evaluates solutions","zh":"因为它从不评估解"},{"en":"To force every answer to be wrong","zh":"为了强制所有答案错误"},{"en":"Because it only sorts text","zh":"因为它只排序文本"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Early exploration allows uphill moves with some probability; cooling gradually makes the search more selective.","zh":"早期探索允许以一定概率进行上坡移动；降温会逐渐让搜索更挑剔。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["optimization","search"]}]}`

### milestone-1984-cart

- Kind: changed

  - Legacy: `null`

- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Book","zh":"图书"},"label":{"en":"Classification and Regression Trees","zh":"分类与回归树"},"url":"https://www.routledge.com/Classification-and-RegressionTrees/Breiman-Friedman-Stone-Olshen/p/book/9780412048418"},{"type":{"en":"Model docs","zh":"模型文档"},"label":{"en":"scikit-learn DecisionTreeClassifier","zh":"scikit-learn DecisionTreeClassifier"},"url":"https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/generated/sklearn.tree.DecisionTreeClassifier.html"},{"type":{"en":"Package","zh":"软件包"},"label":{"en":"R rpart package","zh":"R rpart package"},"url":"https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rpart/index.html"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-classification-and-regression-trees","type":{"zh":"图书","en":"Book"},"label":{"zh":"分类与回归树","en":"Classification and Regression Trees"},"url":"https://www.routledge.com/Classification-and-RegressionTrees/Breiman-Friedman-Stone-Olshen/p/book/9780412048418","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"book"},{"id":"source-scikit-learn-decisiontreeclassifier","type":{"zh":"模型文档","en":"Model docs"},"label":{"zh":"scikit-learn DecisionTreeClassifier","en":"scikit-learn DecisionTreeClassifier"},"url":"https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/generated/sklearn.tree.DecisionTreeClassifier.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-r-rpart-package","type":{"zh":"软件包","en":"Package"},"label":{"zh":"R rpart package","en":"R rpart package"},"url":"https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rpart/index.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Decision rules were attractive because they were interpretable, but they needed a disciplined statistical procedure. CART supplied that procedure for both categorical and numeric outcomes.","zh":"决策规则很有吸引力，因为它们可解释，但它们需要有纪律的统计过程。CART 为分类与数值输出都提供了这样的过程。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"CART grows a tree by choosing splits that make child nodes more homogeneous. It then prunes the tree so the final model balances fit and simplicity.","zh":"CART 通过选择让子节点更同质的划分来生成树，再进行剪枝，使最终模型平衡拟合度与简洁性。 关键机制是递归划分与剪枝，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat CART as a foundational interpretable model and the basic unit behind stronger tree ensembles. Its long-term legacy is the split-and-prune logic used in explanation, tabular modeling, random forests, and gradient boosting.","zh":"专家通常把 CART 视为基础性的可解释模型，也是更强树集成方法背后的基本单元。它的长期影响在于划分与剪枝逻辑被用于解释、表格建模、随机森林和梯度提升。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"决策规则很有吸引力，因为它们可解释，但它们需要有纪律的统计过程。CART 为分类与数值输出都提供了这样的过程。","en":"Decision rules were attractive because they were interpretable, but they needed a disciplined statistical procedure. CART supplied that procedure for both categorical and numeric outcomes."},"sourceIds":["source-classification-and-regression-trees"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"CART 通过选择让子节点更同质的划分来生成树，再进行剪枝，使最终模型平衡拟合度与简洁性。 关键机制是递归划分与剪枝，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"CART grows a tree by choosing splits that make child nodes more homogeneous. It then prunes the tree so the final model balances fit and simplicity."},"sourceIds":["source-classification-and-regression-trees"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 CART 视为基础性的可解释模型，也是更强树集成方法背后的基本单元。它的长期影响在于划分与剪枝逻辑被用于解释、表格建模、随机森林和梯度提升。","en":"Experts generally treat CART as a foundational interpretable model and the basic unit behind stronger tree ensembles. Its long-term legacy is the split-and-prune logic used in explanation, tabular modeling, random forests, and gradient boosting."},"sourceIds":["source-classification-and-regression-trees"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1984-cart-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does CART use pruning for?","zh":"CART 为什么使用剪枝？"},"options":[{"en":"To reduce overfitting after growing a tree","zh":"在生成树后减少过拟合"},{"en":"To make every split random forever","zh":"让所有划分永远随机"},{"en":"To remove all features from data","zh":"从数据中移除所有特征"},{"en":"To turn trees into images only","zh":"把树只变成图像"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"CART can grow a large tree and then prune it back to balance accuracy and simplicity.","zh":"CART 可以先生成较大的树，再通过剪枝平衡准确性和简洁性。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["decision-trees","machine-learning"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1984-cart-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"CART 为什么使用剪枝？","en":"What does CART use pruning for?"},"options":[{"zh":"在生成树后减少过拟合","en":"To reduce overfitting after growing a tree"},{"zh":"让所有划分永远随机","en":"To make every split random forever"},{"zh":"从数据中移除所有特征","en":"To remove all features from data"},{"zh":"把树只变成图像","en":"To turn trees into images only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"CART 可以先生成较大的树，再通过剪枝平衡准确性和简洁性。","en":"CART can grow a large tree and then prune it back to balance accuracy and simplicity."},"sourceIds":["source-classification-and-regression-trees"],"assetIds":["asset-1984-cart-leo-breiman"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1984","title":"CART 决策树","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>CART 为决策树提供了持久的统计形式：递归划分数据、度量不纯度、生成树，再通过剪枝控制过拟合。该方法让模型可以解释为 if-then 路径，同时能处理非线性交互。它成为随机森林、梯度提升和现代树集成方法的基础。</p>","figures":["","","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1984-cart_leo-breiman.gif","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cart_split-regions.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cart_pruning-curve.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"分类与回归树\"","quoteAttribution":"《分类与回归树》, 利奥·布雷曼, 杰罗姆·H·弗里德曼、理查德·A·奥尔申、查尔斯·J·斯通, 沃兹沃思 / 劳特利奇专著, 1984","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：决策树 / CART 决策树","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"分类与回归树\"<br>source：《分类与回归树》, 利奥·布雷曼, 杰罗姆·H·弗里德曼、理查德·A·奥尔申、查尔斯·J·斯通, 沃兹沃思 / 劳特利奇专著, 1984"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"决策规则很有吸引力，因为它们可解释，但它们需要有纪律的统计过程。CART 为分类与数值输出都提供了这样的过程。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"CART 通过选择让子节点更同质的划分来生成树，再进行剪枝，使最终模型平衡拟合度与简洁性。 关键机制是递归划分与剪枝，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 CART 视为基础性的可解释模型，也是更强树集成方法背后的基本单元。它的长期影响在于划分与剪枝逻辑被用于解释、表格建模、随机森林和梯度提升。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1984-cart-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does CART use pruning for?","zh":"CART 为什么使用剪枝？"},"options":[{"en":"To reduce overfitting after growing a tree","zh":"在生成树后减少过拟合"},{"en":"To make every split random forever","zh":"让所有划分永远随机"},{"en":"To remove all features from data","zh":"从数据中移除所有特征"},{"en":"To turn trees into images only","zh":"把树只变成图像"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"CART can grow a large tree and then prune it back to balance accuracy and simplicity.","zh":"CART 可以先生成较大的树，再通过剪枝平衡准确性和简洁性。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["decision-trees","machine-learning"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1984","title":"CART 决策树","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>CART 为决策树提供了持久的统计形式：递归划分数据、度量不纯度、生成树，再通过剪枝控制过拟合。该方法让模型可以解释为 if-then 路径，同时能处理非线性交互。它成为随机森林、梯度提升和现代树集成方法的基础。</p>","figures":["","","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1984-cart_leo-breiman.gif","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cart_split-regions.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cart_pruning-curve.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"分类与回归树\"","quoteAttribution":"《分类与回归树》, 利奥·布雷曼, 杰罗姆·H·弗里德曼、理查德·A·奥尔申、查尔斯·J·斯通, 沃兹沃思 / 劳特利奇专著, 1984","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：决策树 / CART 决策树","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"分类与回归树\"<br>source：《分类与回归树》, 利奥·布雷曼, 杰罗姆·H·弗里德曼、理查德·A·奥尔申、查尔斯·J·斯通, 沃兹沃思 / 劳特利奇专著, 1984"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"决策规则很有吸引力，因为它们可解释，但它们需要有纪律的统计过程。CART 为分类与数值输出都提供了这样的过程。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"CART 通过选择让子节点更同质的划分来生成树，再进行剪枝，使最终模型平衡拟合度与简洁性。 关键机制是递归划分与剪枝，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 CART 视为基础性的可解释模型，也是更强树集成方法背后的基本单元。它的长期影响在于划分与剪枝逻辑被用于解释、表格建模、随机森林和梯度提升。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1984-cart-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"CART 为什么使用剪枝？","en":"What does CART use pruning for?"},"options":[{"zh":"在生成树后减少过拟合","en":"To reduce overfitting after growing a tree"},{"zh":"让所有划分永远随机","en":"To make every split random forever"},{"zh":"从数据中移除所有特征","en":"To remove all features from data"},{"zh":"把树只变成图像","en":"To turn trees into images only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"CART 可以先生成较大的树，再通过剪枝平衡准确性和简洁性。","en":"CART can grow a large tree and then prune it back to balance accuracy and simplicity."},"sourceIds":["source-classification-and-regression-trees"],"assetIds":["asset-1984-cart-leo-breiman"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1984","title":"CART","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>CART gave decision trees a durable statistical form: recursively split data, measure impurity, grow a tree, and prune it back to control overfitting. The method made models interpretable as if-then paths while still handling nonlinear interactions. It became a foundation for random forests, gradient boosting, and modern tree ensembles.</p>","figures":["","","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1984-cart_leo-breiman.gif","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cart_split-regions.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cart_pruning-curve.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"classification and regression trees\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Classification and Regression Trees</em>, Leo Breiman, Jerome H. Friedman, Richard A. Olshen, and Charles J. Stone, Wadsworth / Routledge monograph, 1984","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Decision Trees / CART","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"classification and regression trees\"<br>source：<em>Classification and Regression Trees</em>, Leo Breiman, Jerome H. Friedman, Richard A. Olshen, and Charles J. Stone, Wadsworth / Routledge monograph, 1984"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Decision rules were attractive because they were interpretable, but they needed a disciplined statistical procedure. CART supplied that procedure for both categorical and numeric outcomes.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"CART grows a tree by choosing splits that make child nodes more homogeneous. It then prunes the tree so the final model balances fit and simplicity.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat CART as a foundational interpretable model and the basic unit behind stronger tree ensembles. Its long-term legacy is the split-and-prune logic used in explanation, tabular modeling, random forests, and gradient boosting.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1984-cart-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What does CART use pruning for?","zh":"CART 为什么使用剪枝？"},"options":[{"en":"To reduce overfitting after growing a tree","zh":"在生成树后减少过拟合"},{"en":"To make every split random forever","zh":"让所有划分永远随机"},{"en":"To remove all features from data","zh":"从数据中移除所有特征"},{"en":"To turn trees into images only","zh":"把树只变成图像"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"CART can grow a large tree and then prune it back to balance accuracy and simplicity.","zh":"CART 可以先生成较大的树，再通过剪枝平衡准确性和简洁性。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["decision-trees","machine-learning"]}]}`

  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-building-large-knowledge-based-systems","type":{"zh":"专著","en":"Book"},"label":{"zh":"构建大型知识系统","en":"Building Large Knowledge-Based Systems"},"url":"https://dl.acm.org/doi/book/10.5555/70571","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"book"},{"id":"source-the-evolution-of-cycl","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"CycL 的演化","en":"The Evolution of CycL"},"url":"https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/122296.122308","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-cyc","type":{"zh":"官方页面","en":"Official page"},"label":{"zh":"Cyc","en":"Cyc"},"url":"https://cyc.com/","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"project-page"},{"id":"source-cyc-projects-logo-image","type":{"zh":"图片来源","en":"Image source"},"label":{"zh":"Cyc 项目标识图片","en":"Cyc projects logo image"},"url":"https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Cyc_Projects_Logos.png","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"project-page"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Expert systems worked in narrow domains but broke easily when ordinary background knowledge was missing. This context helps viewers place Cyc in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","zh":"专家系统能在狭窄领域工作，但缺少日常背景知识时很容易崩溃。 这段背景帮助观众把Cyc 常识知识库放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Cyc organizes facts and rules into an ontology with contextual microtheories, then uses inference to answer questions across that structure. The key mechanism is Large symbolic ontology and microtheories, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","zh":"Cyc 把事实与规则组织为带上下文微理论的本体，并用推理在该结构上回答问题。 关键机制是大型符号本体与微理论，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Cyc as one of the most ambitious symbolic-AI attempts to encode common sense explicitly. Its long-term legacy is keeping debates alive about knowledge engineering, hybrid reasoning, ontologies, and the limits of data-only learning.","zh":"专家通常把 Cyc 视为最雄心勃勃的符号 AI 尝试之一，目标是显式编码常识。它的长期影响在于持续推动关于知识工程、混合推理、本体和纯数据学习局限性的讨论。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"专家系统能在狭窄领域工作，但缺少日常背景知识时很容易崩溃。 这段背景帮助观众把Cyc 常识知识库放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","en":"Expert systems worked in narrow domains but broke easily when ordinary background knowledge was missing. This context helps viewers place Cyc in the technical problems and research priorities of its time."},"sourceIds":["source-building-large-knowledge-based-systems"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Cyc 把事实与规则组织为带上下文微理论的本体，并用推理在该结构上回答问题。 关键机制是大型符号本体与微理论，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","en":"Cyc organizes facts and rules into an ontology with contextual microtheories, then uses inference to answer questions across that structure. The key mechanism is Large symbolic ontology and microtheories, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior."},"sourceIds":["source-building-large-knowledge-based-systems"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Cyc 视为最雄心勃勃的符号 AI 尝试之一，目标是显式编码常识。它的长期影响在于持续推动关于知识工程、混合推理、本体和纯数据学习局限性的讨论。","en":"Experts generally treat Cyc as one of the most ambitious symbolic-AI attempts to encode common sense explicitly. Its long-term legacy is keeping debates alive about knowledge engineering, hybrid reasoning, ontologies, and the limits of data-only learning."},"sourceIds":["source-building-large-knowledge-based-systems"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1984-cyc-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Cyc try to make explicit for AI systems?","zh":"Cyc 试图为 AI 系统显式表示什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Common-sense knowledge as an ontology and rule base","zh":"作为本体与规则库的常识知识"},{"en":"Only raw image pixels","zh":"只有原始图像像素"},{"en":"Only endgame checkers tables","zh":"只有跳棋残局表"},{"en":"A single gradient update","zh":"单个梯度更新"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Cyc is a long-running symbolic AI project centered on explicit common-sense knowledge and inference.","zh":"Cyc 是长期运行的符号 AI 项目，核心是显式常识知识与推理。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["knowledge-representation","common-sense"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1984-cyc-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Cyc 试图为 AI 系统显式表示什么？","en":"What did Cyc try to make explicit for AI systems?"},"options":[{"zh":"作为本体与规则库的常识知识","en":"Common-sense knowledge as an ontology and rule base"},{"zh":"只有原始图像像素","en":"Only raw image pixels"},{"zh":"只有跳棋残局表","en":"Only endgame checkers tables"},{"zh":"单个梯度更新","en":"A single gradient update"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Cyc 是长期运行的符号 AI 项目，核心是显式常识知识与推理。","en":"Cyc is a long-running symbolic AI project centered on explicit common-sense knowledge and inference."},"sourceIds":["source-building-large-knowledge-based-systems"],"assetIds":["asset-1984-cyc-douglas-lenat"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1984","title":"Cyc 常识知识库","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Cyc 追求一个大胆的符号 AI 设想：常识可以被显式表示为大规模本体与规则库。其知识工程师编码概念、关系、微理论和推理规则，使软件能够超越狭窄专家系统领域进行推理。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1984-cyc_douglas-lenat.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/40/Cyc_Projects_Logos.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cyc_microtheories.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cyc_common-sense-rule.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"把常识显式化为知识\"","quoteAttribution":"《构建大型知识系统》, 道格拉斯·B·莱纳特、R·V·古哈","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：知识表示 / Cyc 常识知识库","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"把常识显式化为知识\"<br>source：《构建大型知识系统》, 道格拉斯·B·莱纳特、R·V·古哈"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"专家系统能在狭窄领域工作，但缺少日常背景知识时很容易崩溃。 这段背景帮助观众把Cyc 常识知识库放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Cyc 把事实与规则组织为带上下文微理论的本体，并用推理在该结构上回答问题。 关键机制是大型符号本体与微理论，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Cyc 视为最雄心勃勃的符号 AI 尝试之一，目标是显式编码常识。它的长期影响在于持续推动关于知识工程、混合推理、本体和纯数据学习局限性的讨论。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1984-cyc-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Cyc try to make explicit for AI systems?","zh":"Cyc 试图为 AI 系统显式表示什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Common-sense knowledge as an ontology and rule base","zh":"作为本体与规则库的常识知识"},{"en":"Only raw image pixels","zh":"只有原始图像像素"},{"en":"Only endgame checkers tables","zh":"只有跳棋残局表"},{"en":"A single gradient update","zh":"单个梯度更新"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Cyc is a long-running symbolic AI project centered on explicit common-sense knowledge and inference.","zh":"Cyc 是长期运行的符号 AI 项目，核心是显式常识知识与推理。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["knowledge-representation","common-sense"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1984","title":"Cyc 常识知识库","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就","subtitle":"AI 百大成就","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Cyc 追求一个大胆的符号 AI 设想：常识可以被显式表示为大规模本体与规则库。其知识工程师编码概念、关系、微理论和推理规则，使软件能够超越狭窄专家系统领域进行推理。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1984-cyc_douglas-lenat.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/40/Cyc_Projects_Logos.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cyc_microtheories.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cyc_common-sense-rule.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"把常识显式化为知识\"","quoteAttribution":"《构建大型知识系统》, 道格拉斯·B·莱纳特、R·V·古哈","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：知识表示 / Cyc 常识知识库","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"把常识显式化为知识\"<br>source：《构建大型知识系统》, 道格拉斯·B·莱纳特、R·V·古哈"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"专家系统能在狭窄领域工作，但缺少日常背景知识时很容易崩溃。 这段背景帮助观众把Cyc 常识知识库放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Cyc 把事实与规则组织为带上下文微理论的本体，并用推理在该结构上回答问题。 关键机制是大型符号本体与微理论，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Cyc 视为最雄心勃勃的符号 AI 尝试之一，目标是显式编码常识。它的长期影响在于持续推动关于知识工程、混合推理、本体和纯数据学习局限性的讨论。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1984-cyc-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Cyc 试图为 AI 系统显式表示什么？","en":"What did Cyc try to make explicit for AI systems?"},"options":[{"zh":"作为本体与规则库的常识知识","en":"Common-sense knowledge as an ontology and rule base"},{"zh":"只有原始图像像素","en":"Only raw image pixels"},{"zh":"只有跳棋残局表","en":"Only endgame checkers tables"},{"zh":"单个梯度更新","en":"A single gradient update"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Cyc 是长期运行的符号 AI 项目，核心是显式常识知识与推理。","en":"Cyc is a long-running symbolic AI project centered on explicit common-sense knowledge and inference."},"sourceIds":["source-building-large-knowledge-based-systems"],"assetIds":["asset-1984-cyc-douglas-lenat"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1984","title":"Cyc","category":"BenchCouncil AI100 Achievements","subtitle":"AI Top 100 Achievements","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Cyc pursued an audacious symbolic-AI premise: common sense can be represented explicitly as a large ontology and rule base. Its knowledge engineers encoded concepts, relations, microtheories, and inference rules so software could reason beyond narrow expert-system domains.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1984-cyc_douglas-lenat.jpg","https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/40/Cyc_Projects_Logos.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cyc_microtheories.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1984-cyc_common-sense-rule.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Common sense as explicit knowledge\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Building Large Knowledge-Based Systems</em>, Douglas B. Lenat and R. V. Guha","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Knowledge representation / Cyc","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Common sense as explicit knowledge\"<br>source：<em>Building Large Knowledge-Based Systems</em>, Douglas B. Lenat and R. V. Guha"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Expert systems worked in narrow domains but broke easily when ordinary background knowledge was missing. This context helps viewers place Cyc in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Cyc organizes facts and rules into an ontology with contextual microtheories, then uses inference to answer questions across that structure. The key mechanism is Large symbolic ontology and microtheories, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Cyc as one of the most ambitious symbolic-AI attempts to encode common sense explicitly. Its long-term legacy is keeping debates alive about knowledge engineering, hybrid reasoning, ontologies, and the limits of data-only learning.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1984-cyc-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Cyc try to make explicit for AI systems?","zh":"Cyc 试图为 AI 系统显式表示什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Common-sense knowledge as an ontology and rule base","zh":"作为本体与规则库的常识知识"},{"en":"Only raw image pixels","zh":"只有原始图像像素"},{"en":"Only endgame checkers tables","zh":"只有跳棋残局表"},{"en":"A single gradient update","zh":"单个梯度更新"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Cyc is a long-running symbolic AI project centered on explicit common-sense knowledge and inference.","zh":"Cyc 是长期运行的符号 AI 项目，核心是显式常识知识与推理。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["knowledge-representation","common-sense"]}]}`
