- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Checkers was complex enough to challenge search algorithms but structured enough for decades of endgame database construction.","zh":"跳棋足够复杂，可以挑战搜索算法；同时结构足够明确，适合长期构建残局数据库。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Chinook paired forward search with solved endgame tables, letting the program connect current choices to proven late-game outcomes.","zh":"Chinook 将前向搜索与已求解残局表结合，使程序能把当前选择连接到被证明的终局结果。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Chinook as a landmark in game-solving research and high-performance search. Its long-term legacy is showing how expert evaluation, alpha-beta search, opening knowledge, and endgame databases can combine to approach perfect play.","zh":"专家通常把 Chinook 视为游戏求解研究和高性能搜索的里程碑。它的长期影响在于展示专家评估、alpha-beta 搜索、开局知识和残局数据库如何结合并逼近完美对弈。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"跳棋足够复杂，可以挑战搜索算法；同时结构足够明确，适合长期构建残局数据库。","en":"Checkers was complex enough to challenge search algorithms but structured enough for decades of endgame database construction."},"sourceIds":["source-chinook-project-home"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Chinook 将前向搜索与已求解残局表结合，使程序能把当前选择连接到被证明的终局结果。","en":"Chinook paired forward search with solved endgame tables, letting the program connect current choices to proven late-game outcomes."},"sourceIds":["source-chinook-project-home"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Chinook 视为游戏求解研究和高性能搜索的里程碑。它的长期影响在于展示专家评估、alpha-beta 搜索、开局知识和残局数据库如何结合并逼近完美对弈。","en":"Experts generally treat Chinook as a landmark in game-solving research and high-performance search. Its long-term legacy is showing how expert evaluation, alpha-beta search, opening knowledge, and endgame databases can combine to approach perfect play."},"sourceIds":["source-chinook-project-home"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1994-chinook-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Chinook eventually prove about checkers?","zh":"Chinook 最终证明了跳棋的什么性质？"},"options":[{"en":"Perfect play from both sides leads to a draw","zh":"双方完美对弈会导致和棋"},{"en":"Every game is won by the first move","zh":"每局都由第一步直接获胜"},{"en":"Search is unnecessary in games","zh":"游戏中不需要搜索"},{"en":"Only language models can play checkers","zh":"只有语言模型能下跳棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"The Chinook team used search and endgame databases to weakly solve checkers as a draw under perfect play.","zh":"Chinook 团队用搜索和残局数据库弱求解跳棋，证明完美对弈下为和棋。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["game-ai","search"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1994-chinook-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Chinook 最终证明了跳棋的什么性质？","en":"What did Chinook eventually prove about checkers?"},"options":[{"zh":"双方完美对弈会导致和棋","en":"Perfect play from both sides leads to a draw"},{"zh":"每局都由第一步直接获胜","en":"Every game is won by the first move"},{"zh":"游戏中不需要搜索","en":"Search is unnecessary in games"},{"zh":"只有语言模型能下跳棋","en":"Only language models can play checkers"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Chinook 团队用搜索和残局数据库弱求解跳棋，证明完美对弈下为和棋。","en":"The Chinook team used search and endgame databases to weakly solve checkers as a draw under perfect play."},"sourceIds":["source-chinook-project-home"],"assetIds":["asset-1994-chinook-homepage"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1989-2007","title":"Chinook 跳棋程序","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Chinook 把游戏 AI 从竞技对弈推进到数学求解。阿尔伯塔大学团队结合开局库、深层 alpha-beta 搜索、专家评估和庞大残局数据库，最终证明跳棋在完美对弈下结果为和棋。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/0d/Jonathan_Schaeffer.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/source/1994-chinook_homepage.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1994-chinook_endgame-database.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1994-chinook_perfect-play.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"跳棋完美对弈结果为和棋\"","quoteAttribution":"《跳棋已被求解》, 乔纳森·谢弗等","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：游戏 / Chinook 跳棋程序","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"跳棋完美对弈结果为和棋\"<br>source：《跳棋已被求解》, 乔纳森·谢弗等"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"跳棋足够复杂，可以挑战搜索算法；同时结构足够明确，适合长期构建残局数据库。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Chinook 将前向搜索与已求解残局表结合，使程序能把当前选择连接到被证明的终局结果。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Chinook 视为游戏求解研究和高性能搜索的里程碑。它的长期影响在于展示专家评估、alpha-beta 搜索、开局知识和残局数据库如何结合并逼近完美对弈。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1994-chinook-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Chinook eventually prove about checkers?","zh":"Chinook 最终证明了跳棋的什么性质？"},"options":[{"en":"Perfect play from both sides leads to a draw","zh":"双方完美对弈会导致和棋"},{"en":"Every game is won by the first move","zh":"每局都由第一步直接获胜"},{"en":"Search is unnecessary in games","zh":"游戏中不需要搜索"},{"en":"Only language models can play checkers","zh":"只有语言模型能下跳棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"The Chinook team used search and endgame databases to weakly solve checkers as a draw under perfect play.","zh":"Chinook 团队用搜索和残局数据库弱求解跳棋，证明完美对弈下为和棋。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["game-ai","search"]}]}`

- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1989-2007","title":"Chinook","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Chinook pushed game AI from competitive play toward mathematical solution. The University of Alberta team combined opening books, deep alpha-beta search, expert evaluation, and enormous endgame databases, eventually proving that perfect play in checkers leads to a draw.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/0d/Jonathan_Schaeffer.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/source/1994-chinook_homepage.png","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1994-chinook_endgame-database.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1994-chinook_perfect-play.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Perfect play in checkers is a draw\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Checkers Is Solved</em>, Jonathan Schaeffer et al.","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Game / Chinook","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Perfect play in checkers is a draw\"<br>source：<em>Checkers Is Solved</em>, Jonathan Schaeffer et al."},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Checkers was complex enough to challenge search algorithms but structured enough for decades of endgame database construction.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Chinook paired forward search with solved endgame tables, letting the program connect current choices to proven late-game outcomes.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Chinook as a landmark in game-solving research and high-performance search. Its long-term legacy is showing how expert evaluation, alpha-beta search, opening knowledge, and endgame databases can combine to approach perfect play.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1994-chinook-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Chinook eventually prove about checkers?","zh":"Chinook 最终证明了跳棋的什么性质？"},"options":[{"en":"Perfect play from both sides leads to a draw","zh":"双方完美对弈会导致和棋"},{"en":"Every game is won by the first move","zh":"每局都由第一步直接获胜"},{"en":"Search is unnecessary in games","zh":"游戏中不需要搜索"},{"en":"Only language models can play checkers","zh":"只有语言模型能下跳棋"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"The Chinook team used search and endgame databases to weakly solve checkers as a draw under perfect play.","zh":"Chinook 团队用搜索和残局数据库弱求解跳棋，证明完美对弈下为和棋。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["game-ai","search"]}]}`

- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Computer chess had advanced for decades through better search, evaluation, and hardware. Deep Blue made that lineage visible on a global stage.","zh":"计算机国际象棋几十年来依靠搜索、评估和硬件进步。深蓝 把这条路线带到全球舞台。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The machine searched many candidate moves deeply, pruning losing branches and scoring positions with chess knowledge.","zh":"机器深入搜索候选走法，剪掉劣势分支，并用棋类知识给局面打分。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Deep Blue as a landmark in specialized search, evaluation, and high-performance game AI. Its long-term legacy is shaping public expectations for AI milestones and serving as a reference point for later game systems such as AlphaGo.","zh":"专家通常把深蓝视为专用搜索、局面评估和高性能游戏 AI 的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于塑造了公众对 AI 里程碑的期待，并成为 AlphaGo 等后续游戏系统的参照点。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"计算机国际象棋几十年来依靠搜索、评估和硬件进步。深蓝 把这条路线带到全球舞台。","en":"Computer chess had advanced for decades through better search, evaluation, and hardware. Deep Blue made that lineage visible on a global stage."},"sourceIds":["source-murray-campbell-ibm-research"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"机器深入搜索候选走法，剪掉劣势分支，并用棋类知识给局面打分。","en":"The machine searched many candidate moves deeply, pruning losing branches and scoring positions with chess knowledge."},"sourceIds":["source-murray-campbell-ibm-research"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把深蓝视为专用搜索、局面评估和高性能游戏 AI 的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于塑造了公众对 AI 里程碑的期待，并成为 AlphaGo 等后续游戏系统的参照点。","en":"Experts generally treat Deep Blue as a landmark in specialized search, evaluation, and high-performance game AI. Its long-term legacy is shaping public expectations for AI milestones and serving as a reference point for later game systems such as AlphaGo."},"sourceIds":["source-murray-campbell-ibm-research"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1997-deep-blue-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What was Deep Blue especially built to do?","zh":"Deep Blue 尤其被构建来做什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Search and evaluate chess positions at massive scale","zh":"大规模搜索并评估国际象棋局面"},{"en":"Generate word embeddings","zh":"生成词嵌入"},{"en":"Cluster image pixels with t-SNE","zh":"用 t-SNE 聚类图像像素"},{"en":"Infer Bayesian network structure from text only","zh":"只从文本推断贝叶斯网络结构"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Deep Blue combined alpha-beta search, handcrafted chess evaluation, and specialized hardware.","zh":"Deep Blue 结合了 alpha-beta 搜索、手工棋局评估和专用硬件。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["game-ai","search"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1997-deep-blue-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Deep Blue 尤其被构建来做什么？","en":"What was Deep Blue especially built to do?"},"options":[{"zh":"大规模搜索并评估国际象棋局面","en":"Search and evaluate chess positions at massive scale"},{"zh":"生成词嵌入","en":"Generate word embeddings"},{"zh":"用 t-SNE 聚类图像像素","en":"Cluster image pixels with t-SNE"},{"zh":"只从文本推断贝叶斯网络结构","en":"Infer Bayesian network structure from text only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Deep Blue 结合了 alpha-beta 搜索、手工棋局评估和专用硬件。","en":"Deep Blue combined alpha-beta search, handcrafted chess evaluation, and specialized hardware."},"sourceIds":["source-murray-campbell-ibm-research"],"assetIds":["asset-1997-deep-blue-murray-campbell"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1997","title":"深蓝","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>深蓝 成为第一个在正式比赛中击败卫冕世界冠军的计算机系统。它结合了强力 alpha-beta 搜索、国际象棋专用评估、开局/残局知识和定制 VLSI 硬件。这是一个公众转折点：AI 可以在高度符号化的游戏中击败顶尖人类专家。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1997-deep-blue_murray-campbell.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_search-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_chip-board.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"专用国际象棋搜索硬件\"","quoteAttribution":"《深蓝期刊论文》, 默里·坎贝尔","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：博弈 AI / 深蓝","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"专用国际象棋搜索硬件\"<br>source：《深蓝期刊论文》, 默里·坎贝尔"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"计算机国际象棋几十年来依靠搜索、评估和硬件进步。深蓝 把这条路线带到全球舞台。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"机器深入搜索候选走法，剪掉劣势分支，并用棋类知识给局面打分。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把深蓝视为专用搜索、局面评估和高性能游戏 AI 的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于塑造了公众对 AI 里程碑的期待，并成为 AlphaGo 等后续游戏系统的参照点。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-deep-blue-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What was Deep Blue especially built to do?","zh":"Deep Blue 尤其被构建来做什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Search and evaluate chess positions at massive scale","zh":"大规模搜索并评估国际象棋局面"},{"en":"Generate word embeddings","zh":"生成词嵌入"},{"en":"Cluster image pixels with t-SNE","zh":"用 t-SNE 聚类图像像素"},{"en":"Infer Bayesian network structure from text only","zh":"只从文本推断贝叶斯网络结构"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Deep Blue combined alpha-beta search, handcrafted chess evaluation, and specialized hardware.","zh":"Deep Blue 结合了 alpha-beta 搜索、手工棋局评估和专用硬件。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["game-ai","search"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1997","title":"深蓝","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>深蓝 成为第一个在正式比赛中击败卫冕世界冠军的计算机系统。它结合了强力 alpha-beta 搜索、国际象棋专用评估、开局/残局知识和定制 VLSI 硬件。这是一个公众转折点：AI 可以在高度符号化的游戏中击败顶尖人类专家。</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1997-deep-blue_murray-campbell.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_search-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_chip-board.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"专用国际象棋搜索硬件\"","quoteAttribution":"《深蓝期刊论文》, 默里·坎贝尔","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：博弈 AI / 深蓝","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"专用国际象棋搜索硬件\"<br>source：《深蓝期刊论文》, 默里·坎贝尔"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"计算机国际象棋几十年来依靠搜索、评估和硬件进步。深蓝 把这条路线带到全球舞台。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"机器深入搜索候选走法，剪掉劣势分支，并用棋类知识给局面打分。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把深蓝视为专用搜索、局面评估和高性能游戏 AI 的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于塑造了公众对 AI 里程碑的期待，并成为 AlphaGo 等后续游戏系统的参照点。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-deep-blue-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Deep Blue 尤其被构建来做什么？","en":"What was Deep Blue especially built to do?"},"options":[{"zh":"大规模搜索并评估国际象棋局面","en":"Search and evaluate chess positions at massive scale"},{"zh":"生成词嵌入","en":"Generate word embeddings"},{"zh":"用 t-SNE 聚类图像像素","en":"Cluster image pixels with t-SNE"},{"zh":"只从文本推断贝叶斯网络结构","en":"Infer Bayesian network structure from text only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Deep Blue 结合了 alpha-beta 搜索、手工棋局评估和专用硬件。","en":"Deep Blue combined alpha-beta search, handcrafted chess evaluation, and specialized hardware."},"sourceIds":["source-murray-campbell-ibm-research"],"assetIds":["asset-1997-deep-blue-murray-campbell"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1997","title":"Deep Blue","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Deep Blue became the first computer system to defeat the reigning world chess champion in a regulation match. The achievement mixed brute-force alpha-beta search, chess-specific evaluation, opening/endgame knowledge, and custom VLSI hardware. It marked a public turning point: AI could beat elite human expertise in a highly symbolic game.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1997-deep-blue_murray-campbell.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_search-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_chip-board.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Specialized chess search hardware\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Deep Blue journal article</em>, Murray Campbell","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Game AI / Deep Blue","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Specialized chess search hardware\"<br>source：<em>Deep Blue journal article</em>, Murray Campbell"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Computer chess had advanced for decades through better search, evaluation, and hardware. Deep Blue made that lineage visible on a global stage.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The machine searched many candidate moves deeply, pruning losing branches and scoring positions with chess knowledge.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Deep Blue as a landmark in specialized search, evaluation, and high-performance game AI. Its long-term legacy is shaping public expectations for AI milestones and serving as a reference point for later game systems such as AlphaGo.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-deep-blue-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What was Deep Blue especially built to do?","zh":"Deep Blue 尤其被构建来做什么？"},"options":[{"en":"Search and evaluate chess positions at massive scale","zh":"大规模搜索并评估国际象棋局面"},{"en":"Generate word embeddings","zh":"生成词嵌入"},{"en":"Cluster image pixels with t-SNE","zh":"用 t-SNE 聚类图像像素"},{"en":"Infer Bayesian network structure from text only","zh":"只从文本推断贝叶斯网络结构"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Deep Blue combined alpha-beta search, handcrafted chess evaluation, and specialized hardware.","zh":"Deep Blue 结合了 alpha-beta 搜索、手工棋局评估和专用硬件。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["game-ai","search"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1997","title":"Deep Blue","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Deep Blue became the first computer system to defeat the reigning world chess champion in a regulation match. The achievement mixed brute-force alpha-beta search, chess-specific evaluation, opening/endgame knowledge, and custom VLSI hardware. It marked a public turning point: AI could beat elite human expertise in a highly symbolic game.</p>","figures":[""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/1997-deep-blue_murray-campbell.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_search-tree.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-deep-blue_chip-board.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Specialized chess search hardware\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Deep Blue journal article</em>, Murray Campbell","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Game AI / Deep Blue","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"Specialized chess search hardware\"<br>source：<em>Deep Blue journal article</em>, Murray Campbell"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Computer chess had advanced for decades through better search, evaluation, and hardware. Its long-term legacy is shaping public expectations for AI milestones and serving as a reference point for later game systems such as AlphaGo.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-deep-blue-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Deep Blue 尤其被构建来做什么？","en":"What was Deep Blue especially built to do?"},"options":[{"zh":"大规模搜索并评估国际象棋局面","en":"Search and evaluate chess positions at massive scale"},{"zh":"生成词嵌入","en":"Generate word embeddings"},{"zh":"用 t-SNE 聚类图像像素","en":"Cluster image pixels with t-SNE"},{"zh":"只从文本推断贝叶斯网络结构","en":"Infer Bayesian network structure from text only"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Deep Blue 结合了 alpha-beta 搜索、手工棋局评估和专用硬件。","en":"Deep Blue combined alpha-beta search, handcrafted chess evaluation, and specialized hardware."},"sourceIds":["source-murray-campbell-ibm-research"],"assetIds":["asset-1997-deep-blue-murray-campbell"]}]}`

### milestone-gaming-ai-1997-logistello

  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Official page","zh":"官方页面"},"label":{"en":"Logistello homepage","zh":"Logistello 主页"},"url":"https://skatgame.net/mburo/log.html"},{"type":{"en":"Match report","zh":"对局报告"},"label":{"en":"Murakami vs. Logistello","zh":"村上健对 Logistello"},"url":"https://skatgame.net/mburo/event.html"},{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Statistical Feature Combination","zh":"统计特征组合论文"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/cs/9512106"},{"type":{"en":"Publication list","zh":"论文列表"},"label":{"en":"Michael Buro publications","zh":"迈克尔·布罗论文列表"},"url":"https://skatgame.net/mburo/publications.html"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-logistello-homepage","type":{"zh":"官方页面","en":"Official page"},"label":{"zh":"Logistello 主页","en":"Logistello homepage"},"url":"https://skatgame.net/mburo/log.html","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"project-page"},{"id":"source-murakami-vs-logistello","type":{"zh":"对局报告","en":"Match report"},"label":{"zh":"村上健对 Logistello","en":"Murakami vs. Logistello"},"url":"https://skatgame.net/mburo/event.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-statistical-feature-combination","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"统计特征组合论文","en":"Statistical Feature Combination"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/cs/9512106","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-michael-buro-publications","type":{"zh":"论文列表","en":"Publication list"},"label":{"zh":"迈克尔·布罗论文列表","en":"Michael Buro publications"},"url":"https://skatgame.net/mburo/publications.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Othello was small enough for deep search but rich enough that shallow material counting failed. By the 1990s, the key bottleneck was not just speed but how accurately a program could evaluate unstable midgame positions.","zh":"黑白棋足够紧凑，可以进行深层搜索；但它又足够复杂，不能只靠浅层子数统计。到 1990 年代，关键瓶颈不只是速度，而是程序能否准确评估不稳定的中盘局面。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Logistello treated evaluation as a statistical learning problem over board patterns and game phases. Search still mattered, but the learned evaluator gave search a sharper sense of which positions were strategically promising.","zh":"Logistello 把评估函数看成一个跨棋盘模式和阶段的统计学习问题。搜索仍然重要，但学习到的评估器让搜索更清楚哪些局面具有战略潜力。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Logistello as a bridge between classical game-tree search and machine-learned evaluation functions. Its legacy is the lesson that search quality can change dramatically when evaluation parameters are learned from large game-position corpora.","zh":"专家通常把 Logistello 视为经典博弈树搜索与机器学习评估函数之间的桥梁。它的长期影响在于说明：当评估参数来自大规模棋局语料学习时，搜索质量会发生显著变化。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"黑白棋足够紧凑，可以进行深层搜索；但它又足够复杂，不能只靠浅层子数统计。到 1990 年代，关键瓶颈不只是速度，而是程序能否准确评估不稳定的中盘局面。","en":"Othello was small enough for deep search but rich enough that shallow material counting failed. By the 1990s, the key bottleneck was not just speed but how accurately a program could evaluate unstable midgame positions."},"sourceIds":["source-logistello-homepage"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Logistello 把评估函数看成一个跨棋盘模式和阶段的统计学习问题。搜索仍然重要，但学习到的评估器让搜索更清楚哪些局面具有战略潜力。","en":"Logistello treated evaluation as a statistical learning problem over board patterns and game phases. Search still mattered, but the learned evaluator gave search a sharper sense of which positions were strategically promising."},"sourceIds":["source-logistello-homepage"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Logistello 视为经典博弈树搜索与机器学习评估函数之间的桥梁。它的长期影响在于说明：当评估参数来自大规模棋局语料学习时，搜索质量会发生显著变化。","en":"Experts generally treat Logistello as a bridge between classical game-tree search and machine-learned evaluation functions. Its legacy is the lesson that search quality can change dramatically when evaluation parameters are learned from large game-position corpora."},"sourceIds":["source-logistello-homepage"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"1997-logistello-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What made Logistello stronger than older Othello programs?","zh":"Logistello 为什么比早期黑白棋程序更强？"},"options":[{"en":"It learned pattern-based evaluation weights and combined them with selective search","zh":"它学习基于棋盘模式的评估权重，并与选择性搜索结合"},{"en":"It guessed moves randomly","zh":"它随机猜测走法"},{"en":"It ignored endgames","zh":"它忽略残局"},{"en":"It used only speech recognition","zh":"它只使用语音识别"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Logistello paired learned evaluation features with fast search and endgame solving.","zh":"Logistello 将学习型评估特征、快速搜索和残局求解结合起来。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","1997-logistello"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"1997-logistello-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Logistello 为什么比早期黑白棋程序更强？","en":"What made Logistello stronger than older Othello programs?"},"options":[{"zh":"它学习基于棋盘模式的评估权重，并与选择性搜索结合","en":"It learned pattern-based evaluation weights and combined them with selective search"},{"zh":"它随机猜测走法","en":"It guessed moves randomly"},{"zh":"它忽略残局","en":"It ignored endgames"},{"zh":"它只使用语音识别","en":"It used only speech recognition"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Logistello 将学习型评估特征、快速搜索和残局求解结合起来。","en":"Logistello paired learned evaluation features with fast search and endgame solving."},"sourceIds":["source-logistello-homepage"],"assetIds":["asset-1997-logistello-pattern-eval"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1997","title":"Logistello：黑白棋评估函数学习","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Logistello 在 1997 年黑白棋对局中以 6 比 0 击败世界冠军村上健。Michael Buro 将选择性博弈树搜索、基于棋盘模式的评估、统计特征学习、开局库学习和强残局求解结合起来，说明学习得到的评估函数可以在紧凑棋盘游戏中超过手工启发式规则。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-logistello_pattern-eval.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"村上健 0 比 6 负于 Logistello\"","quoteAttribution":"《年度黑白棋对局》, 迈克尔·布罗 / NEC 研究院","quoteLabel":"赛事记录","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：黑白棋 / Logistello","commentarySections":[{"label":"赛事记录","html":"\"村上健 0 比 6 负于 Logistello\"<br>source：《年度黑白棋对局》, 迈克尔·布罗 / NEC 研究院"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"黑白棋足够紧凑，可以进行深层搜索；但它又足够复杂，不能只靠浅层子数统计。到 1990 年代，关键瓶颈不只是速度，而是程序能否准确评估不稳定的中盘局面。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Logistello 把评估函数看成一个跨棋盘模式和阶段的统计学习问题。搜索仍然重要，但学习到的评估器让搜索更清楚哪些局面具有战略潜力。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Logistello 视为经典博弈树搜索与机器学习评估函数之间的桥梁。它的长期影响在于说明：当评估参数来自大规模棋局语料学习时，搜索质量会发生显著变化。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-logistello-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What made Logistello stronger than older Othello programs?","zh":"Logistello 为什么比早期黑白棋程序更强？"},"options":[{"en":"It learned pattern-based evaluation weights and combined them with selective search","zh":"它学习基于棋盘模式的评估权重，并与选择性搜索结合"},{"en":"It guessed moves randomly","zh":"它随机猜测走法"},{"en":"It ignored endgames","zh":"它忽略残局"},{"en":"It used only speech recognition","zh":"它只使用语音识别"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Logistello paired learned evaluation features with fast search and endgame solving.","zh":"Logistello 将学习型评估特征、快速搜索和残局求解结合起来。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","1997-logistello"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1997","title":"Logistello：黑白棋评估函数学习","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Logistello 在 1997 年黑白棋对局中以 6 比 0 击败世界冠军村上健。Michael Buro 将选择性博弈树搜索、基于棋盘模式的评估、统计特征学习、开局库学习和强残局求解结合起来，说明学习得到的评估函数可以在紧凑棋盘游戏中超过手工启发式规则。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-logistello_pattern-eval.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"村上健 0 比 6 负于 Logistello\"","quoteAttribution":"《年度黑白棋对局》, 迈克尔·布罗 / NEC 研究院","quoteLabel":"赛事记录","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：黑白棋 / Logistello","commentarySections":[{"label":"赛事记录","html":"\"村上健 0 比 6 负于 Logistello\"<br>source：《年度黑白棋对局》, 迈克尔·布罗 / NEC 研究院"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"黑白棋足够紧凑，可以进行深层搜索；但它又足够复杂，不能只靠浅层子数统计。到 1990 年代，关键瓶颈不只是速度，而是程序能否准确评估不稳定的中盘局面。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Logistello 把评估函数看成一个跨棋盘模式和阶段的统计学习问题。搜索仍然重要，但学习到的评估器让搜索更清楚哪些局面具有战略潜力。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Logistello 视为经典博弈树搜索与机器学习评估函数之间的桥梁。它的长期影响在于说明：当评估参数来自大规模棋局语料学习时，搜索质量会发生显著变化。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-logistello-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Logistello 为什么比早期黑白棋程序更强？","en":"What made Logistello stronger than older Othello programs?"},"options":[{"zh":"它学习基于棋盘模式的评估权重，并与选择性搜索结合","en":"It learned pattern-based evaluation weights and combined them with selective search"},{"zh":"它随机猜测走法","en":"It guessed moves randomly"},{"zh":"它忽略残局","en":"It ignored endgames"},{"zh":"它只使用语音识别","en":"It used only speech recognition"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Logistello 将学习型评估特征、快速搜索和残局求解结合起来。","en":"Logistello paired learned evaluation features with fast search and endgame solving."},"sourceIds":["source-logistello-homepage"],"assetIds":["asset-1997-logistello-pattern-eval"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"1997","title":"Logistello: Learning Evaluation for Othello","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Logistello defeated world champion Takeshi Murakami 6-0 in a 1997 Othello match. Michael Buro combined selective game-tree search, pattern-based evaluation, statistical feature learning, opening-book learning, and strong endgame solving, showing that learned evaluation could outperform hand-crafted heuristics in a compact board game.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-logistello_pattern-eval.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Takeshi Murakami (0) vs. Logistello (6)\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>The Othello Match of the Year</em>, Michael Buro / NEC Research Institute","quoteLabel":"Match record","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Othello / Logistello","commentarySections":[{"label":"Match record","html":"\"Takeshi Murakami (0) vs. Logistello (6)\"<br>source：<em>The Othello Match of the Year</em>, Michael Buro / NEC Research Institute"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Othello was small enough for deep search but rich enough that shallow material counting failed. By the 1990s, the key bottleneck was not just speed but how accurately a program could evaluate unstable midgame positions.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Logistello treated evaluation as a statistical learning problem over board patterns and game phases. Search still mattered, but the learned evaluator gave search a sharper sense of which positions were strategically promising.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Logistello as a bridge between classical game-tree search and machine-learned evaluation functions. Its legacy is the lesson that search quality can change dramatically when evaluation parameters are learned from large game-position corpora.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-logistello-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What made Logistello stronger than older Othello programs?","zh":"Logistello 为什么比早期黑白棋程序更强？"},"options":[{"en":"It learned pattern-based evaluation weights and combined them with selective search","zh":"它学习基于棋盘模式的评估权重，并与选择性搜索结合"},{"en":"It guessed moves randomly","zh":"它随机猜测走法"},{"en":"It ignored endgames","zh":"它忽略残局"},{"en":"It used only speech recognition","zh":"它只使用语音识别"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Logistello paired learned evaluation features with fast search and endgame solving.","zh":"Logistello 将学习型评估特征、快速搜索和残局求解结合起来。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","1997-logistello"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"1997","title":"Logistello: Learning Evaluation for Othello","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Logistello defeated world champion Takeshi Murakami 6-0 in a 1997 Othello match. Michael Buro combined selective game-tree search, pattern-based evaluation, statistical feature learning, opening-book learning, and strong endgame solving, showing that learned evaluation could outperform hand-crafted heuristics in a compact board game.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/1997-logistello_pattern-eval.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Takeshi Murakami (0) vs. Logistello (6)\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>The Othello Match of the Year</em>, Michael Buro / NEC Research Institute","quoteLabel":"Match record","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Othello / Logistello","commentarySections":[{"label":"Match record","html":"\"Takeshi Murakami (0) vs. Logistello (6)\"<br>source：<em>The Othello Match of the Year</em>, Michael Buro / NEC Research Institute"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Othello was small enough for deep search but rich enough that shallow material counting failed. By the 1990s, the key bottleneck was not just speed but how accurately a program could evaluate unstable midgame positions.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Logistello treated evaluation as a statistical learning problem over board patterns and game phases. Search still mattered, but the learned evaluator gave search a sharper sense of which positions were strategically promising.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Logistello as a bridge between classical game-tree search and machine-learned evaluation functions. Its legacy is the lesson that search quality can change dramatically when evaluation parameters are learned from large game-position corpora.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"1997-logistello-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Logistello 为什么比早期黑白棋程序更强？","en":"What made Logistello stronger than older Othello programs?"},"options":[{"zh":"它学习基于棋盘模式的评估权重，并与选择性搜索结合","en":"It learned pattern-based evaluation weights and combined them with selective search"},{"zh":"它随机猜测走法","en":"It guessed moves randomly"},{"zh":"它忽略残局","en":"It ignored endgames"},{"zh":"它只使用语音识别","en":"It used only speech recognition"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Logistello 将学习型评估特征、快速搜索和残局求解结合起来。","en":"Logistello paired learned evaluation features with fast search and endgame solving."},"sourceIds":["source-logistello-homepage"],"assetIds":["asset-1997-logistello-pattern-eval"]}]}`

### milestone-gaming-ai-2000s-alphacat

- Kind: changed

- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Tournament archive","zh":"赛事档案"},"label":{"en":"ICGA Chinese Chess page","zh":"ICGA 中国象棋页面"},"url":"https://www.game-ai-forum.org/icga-tournaments/game.php?id=13"},{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Comparison Training for Computer Chinese Chess","zh":"面向计算机中国象棋的比较训练"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1801.07411"},{"type":{"en":"Game rules / background","zh":"规则与背景"},"label":{"en":"Xiangqi overview","zh":"中国象棋概览"},"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xiangqi"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-icga-chinese-chess-page","type":{"zh":"赛事档案","en":"Tournament archive"},"label":{"zh":"ICGA 中国象棋页面","en":"ICGA Chinese Chess page"},"url":"https://www.game-ai-forum.org/icga-tournaments/game.php?id=13","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"archive"},{"id":"source-comparison-training-for-computer-chinese-chess","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"面向计算机中国象棋的比较训练","en":"Comparison Training for Computer Chinese Chess"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1801.07411","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-xiangqi-overview","type":{"zh":"规则与背景","en":"Game rules / background"},"label":{"zh":"中国象棋概览","en":"Xiangqi overview"},"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xiangqi","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Xiangqi is close enough to chess that search and evaluation are natural starting points. It is also different enough that cannon captures, palace restrictions, river effects, and repetition rules force engine authors to redesign board representation and tactical evaluation.","zh":"中国象棋与国际象棋足够接近，因此搜索和评估是自然起点。它又足够不同：炮的隔子打、九宫限制、过河规则和长打规则，迫使引擎作者重新设计棋盘表示和战术评估。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"The practical route was not one universal trick but a stack of domain-aware engineering. Fast move generation, aggressive alpha-beta pruning, opening knowledge, and tuned evaluation matrices worked together to survive a highly tactical search space.","zh":"实用路线不是一个万能技巧，而是一组面向领域的工程组合。快速走法生成、激进 alpha-beta 剪枝、开局知识和调校后的评估矩阵共同作用，才能应对高度战术化的搜索空间。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat strong xiangqi engines as evidence that classical search remains powerful when it is deeply adapted to a game. This line also foreshadowed later learned-evaluation work, where handcrafted piece-square matrices were gradually complemented by automatically tuned weights.","zh":"专家通常把强中国象棋引擎视为证据：只要深度适配具体游戏，经典搜索仍然非常有力。这条路线也预示了后来的学习型评估工作，手工兵种位置表逐步被自动调校权重补充。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"中国象棋与国际象棋足够接近，因此搜索和评估是自然起点。它又足够不同：炮的隔子打、九宫限制、过河规则和长打规则，迫使引擎作者重新设计棋盘表示和战术评估。","en":"Xiangqi is close enough to chess that search and evaluation are natural starting points. It is also different enough that cannon captures, palace restrictions, river effects, and repetition rules force engine authors to redesign board representation and tactical evaluation."},"sourceIds":["source-icga-chinese-chess-page"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"实用路线不是一个万能技巧，而是一组面向领域的工程组合。快速走法生成、激进 alpha-beta 剪枝、开局知识和调校后的评估矩阵共同作用，才能应对高度战术化的搜索空间。","en":"The practical route was not one universal trick but a stack of domain-aware engineering. Fast move generation, aggressive alpha-beta pruning, opening knowledge, and tuned evaluation matrices worked together to survive a highly tactical search space."},"sourceIds":["source-icga-chinese-chess-page"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把强中国象棋引擎视为证据：只要深度适配具体游戏，经典搜索仍然非常有力。这条路线也预示了后来的学习型评估工作，手工兵种位置表逐步被自动调校权重补充。","en":"Experts generally treat strong xiangqi engines as evidence that classical search remains powerful when it is deeply adapted to a game. This line also foreshadowed later learned-evaluation work, where handcrafted piece-square matrices were gradually complemented by automatically tuned weights."},"sourceIds":["source-icga-chinese-chess-page"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2000s-alphacat-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why does Chinese chess need domain-specific engine design?","zh":"为什么中国象棋需要面向领域的引擎设计？"},"options":[{"en":"Its cannons, palace, river, and asymmetric pieces change legal moves and evaluation","zh":"炮、九宫、楚河汉界和非对称兵种会改变合法走法与局面评估"},{"en":"It has no board","zh":"它没有棋盘"},{"en":"All pieces move identically","zh":"所有棋子走法完全一样"},{"en":"Hidden cards decide every move","zh":"每一步都由暗牌决定"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Xiangqi engines must encode the game geometry before search and evaluation can work well.","zh":"中国象棋引擎必须先编码游戏几何，搜索和评估才能有效工作。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2000s-alphacat"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2000s-alphacat-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么中国象棋需要面向领域的引擎设计？","en":"Why does Chinese chess need domain-specific engine design?"},"options":[{"zh":"炮、九宫、楚河汉界和非对称兵种会改变合法走法与局面评估","en":"Its cannons, palace, river, and asymmetric pieces change legal moves and evaluation"},{"zh":"它没有棋盘","en":"It has no board"},{"zh":"所有棋子走法完全一样","en":"All pieces move identically"},{"zh":"每一步都由暗牌决定","en":"Hidden cards decide every move"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"中国象棋引擎必须先编码游戏几何，搜索和评估才能有效工作。","en":"Xiangqi engines must encode the game geometry before search and evaluation can work well."},"sourceIds":["source-icga-chinese-chess-page"],"assetIds":["asset-2000s-alphacat-xiangqi-search"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2000s","title":"中国象棋引擎与 AlphaCat","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>中国象棋让游戏 AI 面对非对称兵种、炮、九宫、楚河汉界、长将长捉规则以及高度战术化的攻杀。issue 中要求的 AlphaCat 在这里作为 2000 年代象棋引擎浪潮的一部分呈现：极大极小搜索、位棋盘或紧凑棋盘编码、开局知识和调校评估函数，是通向强棋力的主要实践路线。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2000s-alphacat_xiangqi-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"中国象棋：16 次赛事，38 个程序\"","quoteAttribution":"《ICGA 赛事：中国象棋》, 国际计算机博弈协会赛事档案","quoteLabel":"赛事档案","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：中国象棋 / AlphaCat","commentarySections":[{"label":"赛事档案","html":"\"中国象棋：16 次赛事，38 个程序\"<br>source：《ICGA 赛事：中国象棋》, 国际计算机博弈协会赛事档案"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"中国象棋与国际象棋足够接近，因此搜索和评估是自然起点。它又足够不同：炮的隔子打、九宫限制、过河规则和长打规则，迫使引擎作者重新设计棋盘表示和战术评估。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"实用路线不是一个万能技巧，而是一组面向领域的工程组合。快速走法生成、激进 alpha-beta 剪枝、开局知识和调校后的评估矩阵共同作用，才能应对高度战术化的搜索空间。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把强中国象棋引擎视为证据：只要深度适配具体游戏，经典搜索仍然非常有力。这条路线也预示了后来的学习型评估工作，手工兵种位置表逐步被自动调校权重补充。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2000s-alphacat-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why does Chinese chess need domain-specific engine design?","zh":"为什么中国象棋需要面向领域的引擎设计？"},"options":[{"en":"Its cannons, palace, river, and asymmetric pieces change legal moves and evaluation","zh":"炮、九宫、楚河汉界和非对称兵种会改变合法走法与局面评估"},{"en":"It has no board","zh":"它没有棋盘"},{"en":"All pieces move identically","zh":"所有棋子走法完全一样"},{"en":"Hidden cards decide every move","zh":"每一步都由暗牌决定"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Xiangqi engines must encode the game geometry before search and evaluation can work well.","zh":"中国象棋引擎必须先编码游戏几何，搜索和评估才能有效工作。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2000s-alphacat"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2000s","title":"中国象棋引擎与 AlphaCat","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>中国象棋让游戏 AI 面对非对称兵种、炮、九宫、楚河汉界、长将长捉规则以及高度战术化的攻杀。issue 中要求的 AlphaCat 在这里作为 2000 年代象棋引擎浪潮的一部分呈现：极大极小搜索、位棋盘或紧凑棋盘编码、开局知识和调校评估函数，是通向强棋力的主要实践路线。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2000s-alphacat_xiangqi-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"中国象棋：16 次赛事，38 个程序\"","quoteAttribution":"《ICGA 赛事：中国象棋》, 国际计算机博弈协会赛事档案","quoteLabel":"赛事档案","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：中国象棋 / AlphaCat","commentarySections":[{"label":"赛事档案","html":"\"中国象棋：16 次赛事，38 个程序\"<br>source：《ICGA 赛事：中国象棋》, 国际计算机博弈协会赛事档案"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"中国象棋与国际象棋足够接近，因此搜索和评估是自然起点。它又足够不同：炮的隔子打、九宫限制、过河规则和长打规则，迫使引擎作者重新设计棋盘表示和战术评估。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"实用路线不是一个万能技巧，而是一组面向领域的工程组合。快速走法生成、激进 alpha-beta 剪枝、开局知识和调校后的评估矩阵共同作用，才能应对高度战术化的搜索空间。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把强中国象棋引擎视为证据：只要深度适配具体游戏，经典搜索仍然非常有力。这条路线也预示了后来的学习型评估工作，手工兵种位置表逐步被自动调校权重补充。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2000s-alphacat-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么中国象棋需要面向领域的引擎设计？","en":"Why does Chinese chess need domain-specific engine design?"},"options":[{"zh":"炮、九宫、楚河汉界和非对称兵种会改变合法走法与局面评估","en":"Its cannons, palace, river, and asymmetric pieces change legal moves and evaluation"},{"zh":"它没有棋盘","en":"It has no board"},{"zh":"所有棋子走法完全一样","en":"All pieces move identically"},{"zh":"每一步都由暗牌决定","en":"Hidden cards decide every move"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"中国象棋引擎必须先编码游戏几何，搜索和评估才能有效工作。","en":"Xiangqi engines must encode the game geometry before search and evaluation can work well."},"sourceIds":["source-icga-chinese-chess-page"],"assetIds":["asset-2000s-alphacat-xiangqi-search"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2000s","title":"Chinese Chess Engines and AlphaCat","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Chinese chess made game AI confront asymmetric pieces, cannons, palaces, rivers, repetition rules, and very tactical attacking play. The issue-requested AlphaCat entry is represented here as part of the broader 2000s xiangqi-engine wave, where minimax search, bitboards or compact board encodings, opening knowledge, and tuned evaluation functions became the practical path to strong play.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2000s-alphacat_xiangqi-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Chinese Chess: 16 tournaments, 38 programs\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>ICGA Tournaments: Chinese Chess</em>, International Computer Games Association tournament archive","quoteLabel":"Tournament archive","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Chinese Chess / AlphaCat","commentarySections":[{"label":"Tournament archive","html":"\"Chinese Chess: 16 tournaments, 38 programs\"<br>source：<em>ICGA Tournaments: Chinese Chess</em>, International Computer Games Association tournament archive"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Xiangqi is close enough to chess that search and evaluation are natural starting points. It is also different enough that cannon captures, palace restrictions, river effects, and repetition rules force engine authors to redesign board representation and tactical evaluation.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"The practical route was not one universal trick but a stack of domain-aware engineering. Fast move generation, aggressive alpha-beta pruning, opening knowledge, and tuned evaluation matrices worked together to survive a highly tactical search space.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat strong xiangqi engines as evidence that classical search remains powerful when it is deeply adapted to a game. This line also foreshadowed later learned-evaluation work, where handcrafted piece-square matrices were gradually complemented by automatically tuned weights.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2000s-alphacat-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why does Chinese chess need domain-specific engine design?","zh":"为什么中国象棋需要面向领域的引擎设计？"},"options":[{"en":"Its cannons, palace, river, and asymmetric pieces change legal moves and evaluation","zh":"炮、九宫、楚河汉界和非对称兵种会改变合法走法与局面评估"},{"en":"It has no board","zh":"它没有棋盘"},{"en":"All pieces move identically","zh":"所有棋子走法完全一样"},{"en":"Hidden cards decide every move","zh":"每一步都由暗牌决定"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Xiangqi engines must encode the game geometry before search and evaluation can work well.","zh":"中国象棋引擎必须先编码游戏几何，搜索和评估才能有效工作。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2000s-alphacat"]}]}`

- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Preprint","zh":"预印本"},"label":{"en":"Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning","zh":"用深度强化学习玩 Atari"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1312.5602"},{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning","zh":"Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning"},"url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nature14236"},{"type":{"en":"Project note","zh":"项目说明"},"label":{"en":"Google DeepMind: Deep Reinforcement Learning","zh":"谷歌 DeepMind: Deep Reinforcement Learning"},"url":"https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/deep-reinforcement-learning/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-playing-atari-with-deep-reinforcement-learning","type":{"zh":"预印本","en":"Preprint"},"label":{"zh":"用深度强化学习玩 Atari","en":"Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1312.5602","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-human-level-control-through-deep-reinforcement-learning","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning","en":"Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning"},"url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nature14236","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-google-deepmind-deep-reinforcement-learning","type":{"zh":"项目说明","en":"Project note"},"label":{"zh":"谷歌 DeepMind: Deep Reinforcement Learning","en":"Google DeepMind: Deep Reinforcement Learning"},"url":"https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/deep-reinforcement-learning/","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"project-page"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Classic reinforcement learning had strong theory, but scaling from raw pixels to control remained difficult. DQN made that scaling visible.","zh":"经典强化学习有坚实理论，但从原始像素扩展到控制任务仍然困难。DQN 让这种扩展变得可见。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Experience replay breaks correlations in recent experience, while a target network stabilizes value updates.","zh":"经验回放打破近期经验的相关性，目标网络则稳定价值更新。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat DQN as the breakthrough that made deep reinforcement learning visible and concrete. Its long-term legacy is the neural loop connecting perception, action, reward, replay, and value learning, despite ongoing sample-efficiency and stability challenges.","zh":"专家通常把 DQN 视为让深度强化学习变得可见且具体的突破。它的长期影响在于把感知、行动、奖励、经验回放和价值学习接成神经循环，尽管样本效率和稳定性问题仍存在。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"经典强化学习有坚实理论，但从原始像素扩展到控制任务仍然困难。DQN 让这种扩展变得可见。","en":"Classic reinforcement learning had strong theory, but scaling from raw pixels to control remained difficult. DQN made that scaling visible."},"sourceIds":["source-playing-atari-with-deep-reinforcement-learning"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"经验回放打破近期经验的相关性，目标网络则稳定价值更新。","en":"Experience replay breaks correlations in recent experience, while a target network stabilizes value updates."},"sourceIds":["source-playing-atari-with-deep-reinforcement-learning"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 DQN 视为让深度强化学习变得可见且具体的突破。它的长期影响在于把感知、行动、奖励、经验回放和价值学习接成神经循环，尽管样本效率和稳定性问题仍存在。","en":"Experts generally treat DQN as the breakthrough that made deep reinforcement learning visible and concrete. Its long-term legacy is the neural loop connecting perception, action, reward, replay, and value learning, despite ongoing sample-efficiency and stability challenges."},"sourceIds":["source-playing-atari-with-deep-reinforcement-learning"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2013-dqn-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Which two tricks helped stabilize DQN training?","zh":"哪两个技巧帮助稳定 DQN 训练？"},"options":[{"en":"Experience replay and a target network","zh":"经验回放和目标网络"},{"en":"Only handwritten rules and no learning","zh":"只有手写规则且不学习"},{"en":"WordNet labels and synsets only","zh":"只有 WordNet 标签和 synsets"},{"en":"Randomly deleting all rewards","zh":"随机删除所有奖励"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Replay samples past transitions, while the target network slows down the moving target in Q-learning updates.","zh":"经验回放采样过去转移，目标网络则减慢 Q 学习更新中的移动目标。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["reinforcement-learning","deep-learning"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2013-dqn-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"哪两个技巧帮助稳定 DQN 训练？","en":"Which two tricks helped stabilize DQN training?"},"options":[{"zh":"经验回放和目标网络","en":"Experience replay and a target network"},{"zh":"只有手写规则且不学习","en":"Only handwritten rules and no learning"},{"zh":"只有 WordNet 标签和 synsets","en":"WordNet labels and synsets only"},{"zh":"随机删除所有奖励","en":"Randomly deleting all rewards"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"经验回放采样过去转移，目标网络则减慢 Q 学习更新中的移动目标。","en":"Replay samples past transitions, while the target network slows down the moving target in Q-learning updates."},"sourceIds":["source-playing-atari-with-deep-reinforcement-learning"],"assetIds":["asset-2013-dqn-volodymyr-mnih"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2013","title":"深度 Q 网络","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>DQN 把深度神经网络与强化学习结合起来，让 Atari 成为标志性基准。智能体用经验回放和目标网络直接从像素学习价值函数，在多款游戏上取得强表现。它成为经典强化学习走向深度强化学习的关键桥梁。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/2013-dqn_volodymyr-mnih.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2013-dqn_replay-buffer.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2013-dqn_q-control.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"用深度强化学习玩 Atari\"","quoteAttribution":"《用深度强化学习玩 Atari》, 沃洛迪米尔·姆尼赫等, DeepMind，2013","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：强化学习 / 深度 Q 网络","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"用深度强化学习玩 Atari\"<br>source：《用深度强化学习玩 Atari》, 沃洛迪米尔·姆尼赫等, DeepMind，2013"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"经典强化学习有坚实理论，但从原始像素扩展到控制任务仍然困难。DQN 让这种扩展变得可见。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"经验回放打破近期经验的相关性，目标网络则稳定价值更新。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 DQN 视为让深度强化学习变得可见且具体的突破。它的长期影响在于把感知、行动、奖励、经验回放和价值学习接成神经循环，尽管样本效率和稳定性问题仍存在。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2013-dqn-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Which two tricks helped stabilize DQN training?","zh":"哪两个技巧帮助稳定 DQN 训练？"},"options":[{"en":"Experience replay and a target network","zh":"经验回放和目标网络"},{"en":"Only handwritten rules and no learning","zh":"只有手写规则且不学习"},{"en":"WordNet labels and synsets only","zh":"只有 WordNet 标签和 synsets"},{"en":"Randomly deleting all rewards","zh":"随机删除所有奖励"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Replay samples past transitions, while the target network slows down the moving target in Q-learning updates.","zh":"经验回放采样过去转移，目标网络则减慢 Q 学习更新中的移动目标。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["reinforcement-learning","deep-learning"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2013","title":"深度 Q 网络","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>DQN 把深度神经网络与强化学习结合起来，让 Atari 成为标志性基准。智能体用经验回放和目标网络直接从像素学习价值函数，在多款游戏上取得强表现。它成为经典强化学习走向深度强化学习的关键桥梁。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/2013-dqn_volodymyr-mnih.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2013-dqn_replay-buffer.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2013-dqn_q-control.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"用深度强化学习玩 Atari\"","quoteAttribution":"《用深度强化学习玩 Atari》, 沃洛迪米尔·姆尼赫等, DeepMind，2013","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：强化学习 / 深度 Q 网络","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"用深度强化学习玩 Atari\"<br>source：《用深度强化学习玩 Atari》, 沃洛迪米尔·姆尼赫等, DeepMind，2013"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"经典强化学习有坚实理论，但从原始像素扩展到控制任务仍然困难。DQN 让这种扩展变得可见。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"经验回放打破近期经验的相关性，目标网络则稳定价值更新。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 DQN 视为让深度强化学习变得可见且具体的突破。它的长期影响在于把感知、行动、奖励、经验回放和价值学习接成神经循环，尽管样本效率和稳定性问题仍存在。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2013-dqn-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"哪两个技巧帮助稳定 DQN 训练？","en":"Which two tricks helped stabilize DQN training?"},"options":[{"zh":"经验回放和目标网络","en":"Experience replay and a target network"},{"zh":"只有手写规则且不学习","en":"Only handwritten rules and no learning"},{"zh":"只有 WordNet 标签和 synsets","en":"WordNet labels and synsets only"},{"zh":"随机删除所有奖励","en":"Randomly deleting all rewards"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"经验回放采样过去转移，目标网络则减慢 Q 学习更新中的移动目标。","en":"Replay samples past transitions, while the target network slows down the moving target in Q-learning updates."},"sourceIds":["source-playing-atari-with-deep-reinforcement-learning"],"assetIds":["asset-2013-dqn-volodymyr-mnih"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2013","title":"Deep Q Network","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>DQN joined deep neural networks with reinforcement learning and made Atari a landmark benchmark. The agent learned values directly from pixels using experience replay and a target network, reaching strong performance across multiple games. It became a central bridge from classic RL to deep RL.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/2013-dqn_volodymyr-mnih.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2013-dqn_replay-buffer.svg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2013-dqn_q-control.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"playing Atari with deep reinforcement learning\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning</em>, Volodymyr Mnih et al., DeepMind, 2013","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Reinforcement learning / Deep Q Network","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"playing Atari with deep reinforcement learning\"<br>source：<em>Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning</em>, Volodymyr Mnih et al., DeepMind, 2013"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Classic reinforcement learning had strong theory, but scaling from raw pixels to control remained difficult. DQN made that scaling visible.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Experience replay breaks correlations in recent experience, while a target network stabilizes value updates.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat DQN as the breakthrough that made deep reinforcement learning visible and concrete. Its long-term legacy is the neural loop connecting perception, action, reward, replay, and value learning, despite ongoing sample-efficiency and stability challenges.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2013-dqn-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Which two tricks helped stabilize DQN training?","zh":"哪两个技巧帮助稳定 DQN 训练？"},"options":[{"en":"Experience replay and a target network","zh":"经验回放和目标网络"},{"en":"Only handwritten rules and no learning","zh":"只有手写规则且不学习"},{"en":"WordNet labels and synsets only","zh":"只有 WordNet 标签和 synsets"},{"en":"Randomly deleting all rewards","zh":"随机删除所有奖励"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Replay samples past transitions, while the target network slows down the moving target in Q-learning updates.","zh":"经验回放采样过去转移，目标网络则减慢 Q 学习更新中的移动目标。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["reinforcement-learning","deep-learning"]}]}`

- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2016-alphago-quiz-1","question":{"en":"AlphaGo did not just search harder. What did it learn to guide search?","zh":"AlphaGo 不只是“搜得更多”。它学会了什么来引导搜索？"},"options":[{"en":"Policy priors and value estimates","zh":"策略先验和价值估计"},{"en":"The referee's handwriting","zh":"裁判的笔迹"},{"en":"Only the board color","zh":"只有棋盘颜色"},{"en":"A fixed first move for every game","zh":"每盘棋固定第一手"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Policy networks narrow candidate moves, value networks estimate positions, and tree search plans ahead.","zh":"策略网络缩小候选落子，价值网络评估局面，树搜索向前规划。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["games","search"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2016-alphago-quiz-1","storylineId":"gaming-ai","question":{"zh":"AlphaGo 不只是“搜得更多”。它学会了什么来引导搜索？","en":"AlphaGo did not just search harder. What did it learn to guide search?"},"options":[{"zh":"策略先验和价值估计","en":"Policy priors and value estimates"},{"zh":"裁判的笔迹","en":"The referee's handwriting"},{"zh":"只有棋盘颜色","en":"Only the board color"},{"zh":"每盘棋固定第一手","en":"A fixed first move for every game"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"策略网络缩小候选落子，价值网络评估局面，树搜索向前规划。","en":"Policy networks narrow candidate moves, value networks estimate positions, and tree search plans ahead."},"sourceIds":[],"assetIds":[]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":2016,"title":"AlphaGo","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>AlphaGo 结合深度神经网络、蒙特卡洛树搜索和自我对弈强化学习。2016 年与李世石的对局让 AI 的战略能力被全球观众看见。它证明 AI 可以在一个长期被认为难以靠蛮力搜索解决的领域中学习直觉与规划。</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/2016-alphago_lee-sedol.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2016-alphago_policy-value-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"围棋长期以来被视为人工智能最具挑战性的经典游戏。\"","quoteAttribution":"《用深度神经网络和树搜索掌握围棋》, 戴维·席尔瓦等, 《自然》, 2016","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100：强化学习 / AlphaGo","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"围棋长期以来被视为人工智能最具挑战性的经典游戏。\"<br>source：《用深度神经网络和树搜索掌握围棋》, 戴维·席尔瓦等, 《自然》, 2016"},{"label":"论文材料","html":"《自然》 论文解释了它的混合设计：策略网络缩小搜索范围，价值网络评估棋盘局面，蒙特卡洛树搜索选择落子。后来的 AlphaGo Zero 进一步展示了自我对弈如何减少对专家棋谱的依赖。","link":null},{"label":"博客 / API 材料","html":"DeepMind 的 AlphaGo 页面和 AlphaGo Zero 博客适合做叙事材料。若要做现代交互演示，可结合 KataGo 分析引擎 API 与公开 SGF 棋谱，展示名局附近的胜率变化、策略建议和搜索分支。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 AlphaGo 视为标志性展示，说明深度学习、搜索和强化学习可以在复杂领域超越顶尖人类直觉。它的长期影响在于自我对弈和神经搜索模式影响了后来的游戏 AI、规划系统以及公众对 AI 突破的期待。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2016-alphago-quiz-1","question":{"en":"AlphaGo did not just search harder. What did it learn to guide search?","zh":"AlphaGo 不只是“搜得更多”。它学会了什么来引导搜索？"},"options":[{"en":"Policy priors and value estimates","zh":"策略先验和价值估计"},{"en":"The referee's handwriting","zh":"裁判的笔迹"},{"en":"Only the board color","zh":"只有棋盘颜色"},{"en":"A fixed first move for every game","zh":"每盘棋固定第一手"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Policy networks narrow candidate moves, value networks estimate positions, and tree search plans ahead.","zh":"策略网络缩小候选落子，价值网络评估局面，树搜索向前规划。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["games","search"]}]}`

What did it learn to guide search?"},"options":[{"zh":"策略先验和价值估计","en":"Policy priors and value estimates"},{"zh":"裁判的笔迹","en":"The referee's handwriting"},{"zh":"只有棋盘颜色","en":"Only the board color"},{"zh":"每盘棋固定第一手","en":"A fixed first move for every game"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"策略网络缩小候选落子，价值网络评估局面，树搜索向前规划。","en":"Policy networks narrow candidate moves, value networks estimate positions, and tree search plans ahead."},"sourceIds":[],"assetIds":[]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":2016,"title":"AlphaGo","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>AlphaGo combined deep neural networks, Monte Carlo tree search and reinforcement learning through self-play. Its 2016 match against Lee Sedol made AI's strategic progress visible to a global audience. The system showed that AI could learn both intuition and planning in a domain long considered too complex for brute-force search.</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/photos/2016-alphago_lee-sedol.jpg","resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2016-alphago_policy-value-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"The game of Go has long been viewed as the most challenging of classic games for artificial intelligence.\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search</em>, David Silver et al., Nature, 2016","quoteLabel":"","quotePage":"BenchCouncil AI100: Reinforcement learning / AlphaGo","commentarySections":[{"label":"quoteExcerpt","html":"\"The game of Go has long been viewed as the most challenging of classic games for artificial intelligence.\"<br>source：<em>Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search</em>, David Silver et al., Nature, 2016"},{"label":"Published Paper","html":"The Nature paper explains the hybrid design: policy networks narrow the search, value networks evaluate board positions, and Monte Carlo tree search chooses moves. AlphaGo Zero later showed how self-play could remove the need for expert game data.","link":null},{"label":"Blog / API Materials","html":"DeepMind's AlphaGo pages and AlphaGo Zero blog are good narrative sources. For a modern interactive demo, KataGo's analysis engine API and public SGF game records can show win-rate shifts, policy suggestions and search variations around famous moves.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat AlphaGo as a landmark demonstration that deep learning, search, and reinforcement learning could surpass elite human intuition in a complex domain. Its long-term legacy is the self-play and neural search pattern that shaped later game AI, planning systems, and public expectations for AI breakthroughs.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2016-alphago-quiz-1","question":{"en":"AlphaGo did not just search harder. What did it learn to guide search?","zh":"AlphaGo 不只是“搜得更多”。它学会了什么来引导搜索？"},"options":[{"en":"Policy priors and value estimates","zh":"策略先验和价值估计"},{"en":"The referee's handwriting","zh":"裁判的笔迹"},{"en":"Only the board color","zh":"只有棋盘颜色"},{"en":"A fixed first move for every game","zh":"每盘棋固定第一手"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Policy networks narrow candidate moves, value networks estimate positions, and tree search plans ahead.","zh":"策略网络缩小候选落子，价值网络评估局面，树搜索向前规划。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"BenchCouncil AI100 achievement notes","zh":"BenchCouncil AI100 成就内容"}},"tags":["games","search"]}]}`

  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-science-paper","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"Science 论文","en":"Science paper"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aar6404","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-arxiv-preprint","type":{"zh":"预印本","en":"Preprint"},"label":{"zh":"arXiv 预印本","en":"arXiv preprint"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1712.01815","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-deepmind-alphazero-blog","type":{"zh":"博客","en":"Blog"},"label":{"zh":"DeepMind AlphaZero 博客","en":"DeepMind AlphaZero blog"},"url":"https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/alphazero-shedding-new-light-on-chess-shogi-and-go/","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"official-page"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"AlphaGo still used human expert games and Go-specific training stages. AlphaZero asked whether self-play could carry the learning burden across multiple games with only the rules as input.","zh":"AlphaGo 仍然使用人类专家棋谱和围棋专用训练阶段。AlphaZero 进一步追问：自我博弈能否只依靠规则，在多个游戏中承担主要学习负担。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"A neural network predicts move probabilities and game outcomes. Tree search improves action choice, self-play generates new experience, and the network absorbs the improved behavior in the next training cycle.","zh":"神经网络预测走法概率和胜负结果。树搜索改进行动选择，自我博弈产生新经验，网络再在下一轮训练中吸收这些改进行为。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat AlphaZero as the cleanest public statement of the neural-search self-play paradigm. Its legacy is the idea that strong play can emerge from rule-based simulation plus learned policy-value guidance, a pattern that later influenced MuZero and other planning systems.","zh":"专家通常把 AlphaZero 视为神经搜索自我博弈范式最清晰的公开表达。它的长期影响在于提出：强棋力可以从规则仿真与学习型策略-价值引导中涌现，这一模式后来影响了 MuZero 等规划系统。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"AlphaGo 仍然使用人类专家棋谱和围棋专用训练阶段。AlphaZero 进一步追问：自我博弈能否只依靠规则，在多个游戏中承担主要学习负担。","en":"AlphaGo still used human expert games and Go-specific training stages. AlphaZero asked whether self-play could carry the learning burden across multiple games with only the rules as input."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"神经网络预测走法概率和胜负结果。树搜索改进行动选择，自我博弈产生新经验，网络再在下一轮训练中吸收这些改进行为。","en":"A neural network predicts move probabilities and game outcomes. Tree search improves action choice, self-play generates new experience, and the network absorbs the improved behavior in the next training cycle."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 AlphaZero 视为神经搜索自我博弈范式最清晰的公开表达。它的长期影响在于提出：强棋力可以从规则仿真与学习型策略-价值引导中涌现，这一模式后来影响了 MuZero 等规划系统。","en":"Experts generally treat AlphaZero as the cleanest public statement of the neural-search self-play paradigm. Its legacy is the idea that strong play can emerge from rule-based simulation plus learned policy-value guidance, a pattern that later influenced MuZero and other planning systems."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2017-alphazero-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did AlphaZero remove from the earlier game-AI pipeline?","zh":"AlphaZero 从早期游戏 AI 流程中去掉了什么依赖？"},"options":[{"en":"Human games, opening books, and handcrafted evaluation functions","zh":"人类棋谱、开局库和手工评估函数"},{"en":"The game rules themselves","zh":"游戏规则本身"},{"en":"All tree search","zh":"所有树搜索"},{"en":"Every neural network","zh":"所有神经网络"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"AlphaZero still used rules and search, but generated its own training data through self-play.","zh":"AlphaZero 仍使用规则和搜索，但通过自我博弈生成训练数据。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2017-alphazero"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2017-alphazero-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"AlphaZero 从早期游戏 AI 流程中去掉了什么依赖？","en":"What did AlphaZero remove from the earlier game-AI pipeline?"},"options":[{"zh":"人类棋谱、开局库和手工评估函数","en":"Human games, opening books, and handcrafted evaluation functions"},{"zh":"游戏规则本身","en":"The game rules themselves"},{"zh":"所有树搜索","en":"All tree search"},{"zh":"所有神经网络","en":"Every neural network"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"AlphaZero 仍使用规则和搜索，但通过自我博弈生成训练数据。","en":"AlphaZero still used rules and search, but generated its own training data through self-play."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2017-alphazero-self-play-loop"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2017-2018","title":"AlphaZero","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>AlphaZero 展示了同一套自我博弈强化学习系统可以仅凭游戏规则掌握围棋、国际象棋和将棋。它用神经网络的策略-价值学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索取代人工评估函数与开局库，让棋牌游戏 AI 从单一游戏程序走向通用方法。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2017-alphazero_self-play-loop.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"一种通用强化学习算法\"","quoteAttribution":"《通过自我博弈掌握国际象棋、将棋和围棋的通用强化学习算法》, David Silver 等，Science，2018","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：AlphaZero","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"一种通用强化学习算法\"<br>source：《通过自我博弈掌握国际象棋、将棋和围棋的通用强化学习算法》, David Silver 等，Science，2018"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"AlphaGo 仍然使用人类专家棋谱和围棋专用训练阶段。AlphaZero 进一步追问：自我博弈能否只依靠规则，在多个游戏中承担主要学习负担。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"神经网络预测走法概率和胜负结果。树搜索改进行动选择，自我博弈产生新经验，网络再在下一轮训练中吸收这些改进行为。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 AlphaZero 视为神经搜索自我博弈范式最清晰的公开表达。它的长期影响在于提出：强棋力可以从规则仿真与学习型策略-价值引导中涌现，这一模式后来影响了 MuZero 等规划系统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2017-alphazero-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did AlphaZero remove from the earlier game-AI pipeline?","zh":"AlphaZero 从早期游戏 AI 流程中去掉了什么依赖？"},"options":[{"en":"Human games, opening books, and handcrafted evaluation functions","zh":"人类棋谱、开局库和手工评估函数"},{"en":"The game rules themselves","zh":"游戏规则本身"},{"en":"All tree search","zh":"所有树搜索"},{"en":"Every neural network","zh":"所有神经网络"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"AlphaZero still used rules and search, but generated its own training data through self-play.","zh":"AlphaZero 仍使用规则和搜索，但通过自我博弈生成训练数据。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2017-alphazero"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2017-2018","title":"AlphaZero","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>AlphaZero 展示了同一套自我博弈强化学习系统可以仅凭游戏规则掌握围棋、国际象棋和将棋。它用神经网络的策略-价值学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索取代人工评估函数与开局库，让棋牌游戏 AI 从单一游戏程序走向通用方法。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2017-alphazero_self-play-loop.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"一种通用强化学习算法\"","quoteAttribution":"《通过自我博弈掌握国际象棋、将棋和围棋的通用强化学习算法》, David Silver 等，Science，2018","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：AlphaZero","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"一种通用强化学习算法\"<br>source：《通过自我博弈掌握国际象棋、将棋和围棋的通用强化学习算法》, David Silver 等，Science，2018"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"AlphaGo 仍然使用人类专家棋谱和围棋专用训练阶段。AlphaZero 进一步追问：自我博弈能否只依靠规则，在多个游戏中承担主要学习负担。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"神经网络预测走法概率和胜负结果。树搜索改进行动选择，自我博弈产生新经验，网络再在下一轮训练中吸收这些改进行为。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 AlphaZero 视为神经搜索自我博弈范式最清晰的公开表达。它的长期影响在于提出：强棋力可以从规则仿真与学习型策略-价值引导中涌现，这一模式后来影响了 MuZero 等规划系统。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2017-alphazero-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"AlphaZero 从早期游戏 AI 流程中去掉了什么依赖？","en":"What did AlphaZero remove from the earlier game-AI pipeline?"},"options":[{"zh":"人类棋谱、开局库和手工评估函数","en":"Human games, opening books, and handcrafted evaluation functions"},{"zh":"游戏规则本身","en":"The game rules themselves"},{"zh":"所有树搜索","en":"All tree search"},{"zh":"所有神经网络","en":"Every neural network"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"AlphaZero 仍使用规则和搜索，但通过自我博弈生成训练数据。","en":"AlphaZero still used rules and search, but generated its own training data through self-play."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2017-alphazero-self-play-loop"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2017-2018","title":"AlphaZero","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>AlphaZero showed that one self-play reinforcement learning system could master Go, chess, and shogi from game rules alone. It replaced handcrafted evaluation and opening books with neural policy-value learning plus Monte Carlo tree search, turning board-game AI into a general recipe rather than a single-game program.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2017-alphazero_self-play-loop.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"a general reinforcement learning algorithm\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>A general reinforcement learning algorithm that masters chess, shogi, and Go through self-play</em>, David Silver et al., Science, 2018","quoteLabel":"Paper cue","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: AlphaZero","commentarySections":[{"label":"Paper cue","html":"\"a general reinforcement learning algorithm\"<br>source：<em>A general reinforcement learning algorithm that masters chess, shogi, and Go through self-play</em>, David Silver et al., Science, 2018"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"AlphaGo still used human expert games and Go-specific training stages. AlphaZero asked whether self-play could carry the learning burden across multiple games with only the rules as input.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"A neural network predicts move probabilities and game outcomes. Tree search improves action choice, self-play generates new experience, and the network absorbs the improved behavior in the next training cycle.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat AlphaZero as the cleanest public statement of the neural-search self-play paradigm. Its legacy is the idea that strong play can emerge from rule-based simulation plus learned policy-value guidance, a pattern that later influenced MuZero and other planning systems.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2017-alphazero-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did AlphaZero remove from the earlier game-AI pipeline?","zh":"AlphaZero 从早期游戏 AI 流程中去掉了什么依赖？"},"options":[{"en":"Human games, opening books, and handcrafted evaluation functions","zh":"人类棋谱、开局库和手工评估函数"},{"en":"The game rules themselves","zh":"游戏规则本身"},{"en":"All tree search","zh":"所有树搜索"},{"en":"Every neural network","zh":"所有神经网络"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"AlphaZero still used rules and search, but generated its own training data through self-play.","zh":"AlphaZero 仍使用规则和搜索，但通过自我博弈生成训练数据。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2017-alphazero"]}]}`
