  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Science paper","zh":"Science 论文"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aao1733"},{"type":{"en":"News report","zh":"新闻报道"},"label":{"en":"CMU Libratus release","zh":"CMU Libratus 新闻稿"},"url":"https://www.cmu.edu/news/stories/archives/2017/january/AI-beats-poker-pros.html"},{"type":{"en":"Preprint","zh":"预印本"},"label":{"en":"Safe and Nested Subgame Solving","zh":"安全嵌套子局求解论文"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1705.02955"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-science-paper","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"Science 论文","en":"Science paper"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aao1733","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-cmu-libratus-release","type":{"zh":"新闻报道","en":"News report"},"label":{"zh":"CMU Libratus 新闻稿","en":"CMU Libratus release"},"url":"https://www.cmu.edu/news/stories/archives/2017/january/AI-beats-poker-pros.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-safe-and-nested-subgame-solving","type":{"zh":"预印本","en":"Preprint"},"label":{"zh":"安全嵌套子局求解论文","en":"Safe and Nested Subgame Solving"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1705.02955","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Poker added hidden cards, bluffing, and uncertainty to the game-AI story. Unlike chess or Go, the correct action depends on ranges of possible private hands and on what opponents believe you might hold.","zh":"扑克把暗牌、诈唬和不确定性加入了游戏 AI 叙事。不同于国际象棋或围棋，正确行动取决于可能暗牌范围，以及对手认为你可能持有什么牌。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Libratus solved a compact abstraction before the match and used real-time subgame solving during difficult hands. It then analyzed each day for exploitable patterns and patched the strategy overnight.","zh":"Libratus 在赛前求解紧凑抽象策略，并在困难手牌中使用实时子局求解。它随后分析每天对局中的可利用模式，并在夜间修补策略。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Libratus as a turning point for large imperfect-information games. Its legacy is showing that abstraction, equilibrium reasoning, and targeted repair can defeat elite humans even when the real state is partly hidden.","zh":"专家通常把 Libratus 视为大型不完全信息博弈的转折点。它的长期影响在于证明：即使真实状态部分隐藏，抽象、均衡推理和定向修补仍能击败顶尖人类。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"扑克把暗牌、诈唬和不确定性加入了游戏 AI 叙事。不同于国际象棋或围棋，正确行动取决于可能暗牌范围，以及对手认为你可能持有什么牌。","en":"Poker added hidden cards, bluffing, and uncertainty to the game-AI story. Unlike chess or Go, the correct action depends on ranges of possible private hands and on what opponents believe you might hold."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Libratus 在赛前求解紧凑抽象策略，并在困难手牌中使用实时子局求解。它随后分析每天对局中的可利用模式，并在夜间修补策略。","en":"Libratus solved a compact abstraction before the match and used real-time subgame solving during difficult hands. It then analyzed each day for exploitable patterns and patched the strategy overnight."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Libratus 视为大型不完全信息博弈的转折点。它的长期影响在于证明：即使真实状态部分隐藏，抽象、均衡推理和定向修补仍能击败顶尖人类。","en":"Experts generally treat Libratus as a turning point for large imperfect-information games. Its legacy is showing that abstraction, equilibrium reasoning, and targeted repair can defeat elite humans even when the real state is partly hidden."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2017-libratus-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What challenge did Libratus address in poker?","zh":"Libratus 在扑克中主要解决了什么挑战？"},"options":[{"en":"Hidden information and equilibrium reasoning in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em","zh":"一对一无限注德州扑克中的隐藏信息与均衡推理"},{"en":"Recognizing handwritten digits","zh":"识别手写数字"},{"en":"Solving protein folding","zh":"求解蛋白质折叠"},{"en":"Sorting images by color","zh":"按颜色排序图像"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Libratus treated poker as an imperfect-information strategy problem rather than a visible-board search task.","zh":"Libratus 把扑克看作不完全信息策略问题，而不是可见棋盘搜索任务。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2017-libratus"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2017-libratus-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Libratus 在扑克中主要解决了什么挑战？","en":"What challenge did Libratus address in poker?"},"options":[{"zh":"一对一无限注德州扑克中的隐藏信息与均衡推理","en":"Hidden information and equilibrium reasoning in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em"},{"zh":"识别手写数字","en":"Recognizing handwritten digits"},{"zh":"求解蛋白质折叠","en":"Solving protein folding"},{"zh":"按颜色排序图像","en":"Sorting images by color"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Libratus 把扑克看作不完全信息策略问题，而不是可见棋盘搜索任务。","en":"Libratus treated poker as an imperfect-information strategy problem rather than a visible-board search task."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2017-libratus-cfr-solving"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2017","title":"Libratus","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Libratus 在一对一无限注德州扑克中击败顶尖职业牌手，而这类游戏包含隐藏信息和巨大的决策空间。它结合抽象博弈求解、实时残局求解和每日赛后自我改进，证明游戏 AI 可以走出完全信息棋盘。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2017-libratus_cfr-solving.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"面向一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI\"","quoteAttribution":"《一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI：Libratus 击败顶级职业牌手》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2017","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：Libratus","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"面向一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI\"<br>source：《一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI：Libratus 击败顶级职业牌手》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2017"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"扑克把暗牌、诈唬和不确定性加入了游戏 AI 叙事。不同于国际象棋或围棋，正确行动取决于可能暗牌范围，以及对手认为你可能持有什么牌。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Libratus 在赛前求解紧凑抽象策略，并在困难手牌中使用实时子局求解。它随后分析每天对局中的可利用模式，并在夜间修补策略。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Libratus 视为大型不完全信息博弈的转折点。它的长期影响在于证明：即使真实状态部分隐藏，抽象、均衡推理和定向修补仍能击败顶尖人类。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2017-libratus-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What challenge did Libratus address in poker?","zh":"Libratus 在扑克中主要解决了什么挑战？"},"options":[{"en":"Hidden information and equilibrium reasoning in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em","zh":"一对一无限注德州扑克中的隐藏信息与均衡推理"},{"en":"Recognizing handwritten digits","zh":"识别手写数字"},{"en":"Solving protein folding","zh":"求解蛋白质折叠"},{"en":"Sorting images by color","zh":"按颜色排序图像"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Libratus treated poker as an imperfect-information strategy problem rather than a visible-board search task.","zh":"Libratus 把扑克看作不完全信息策略问题，而不是可见棋盘搜索任务。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2017-libratus"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2017","title":"Libratus","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Libratus 在一对一无限注德州扑克中击败顶尖职业牌手，而这类游戏包含隐藏信息和巨大的决策空间。它结合抽象博弈求解、实时残局求解和每日赛后自我改进，证明游戏 AI 可以走出完全信息棋盘。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2017-libratus_cfr-solving.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"面向一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI\"","quoteAttribution":"《一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI：Libratus 击败顶级职业牌手》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2017","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：Libratus","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"面向一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI\"<br>source：《一对一无限注扑克的超人 AI：Libratus 击败顶级职业牌手》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2017"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"扑克把暗牌、诈唬和不确定性加入了游戏 AI 叙事。不同于国际象棋或围棋，正确行动取决于可能暗牌范围，以及对手认为你可能持有什么牌。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Libratus 在赛前求解紧凑抽象策略，并在困难手牌中使用实时子局求解。它随后分析每天对局中的可利用模式，并在夜间修补策略。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Libratus 视为大型不完全信息博弈的转折点。它的长期影响在于证明：即使真实状态部分隐藏，抽象、均衡推理和定向修补仍能击败顶尖人类。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2017-libratus-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Libratus 在扑克中主要解决了什么挑战？","en":"What challenge did Libratus address in poker?"},"options":[{"zh":"一对一无限注德州扑克中的隐藏信息与均衡推理","en":"Hidden information and equilibrium reasoning in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em"},{"zh":"识别手写数字","en":"Recognizing handwritten digits"},{"zh":"求解蛋白质折叠","en":"Solving protein folding"},{"zh":"按颜色排序图像","en":"Sorting images by color"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Libratus 把扑克看作不完全信息策略问题，而不是可见棋盘搜索任务。","en":"Libratus treated poker as an imperfect-information strategy problem rather than a visible-board search task."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2017-libratus-cfr-solving"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2017","title":"Libratus","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Libratus defeated top professionals in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em, a game with hidden information and enormous decision spaces. It combined abstract game solving, real-time endgame solving, and self-improvement after each day of play, proving that game AI could move beyond perfect-information boards.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2017-libratus_cfr-solving.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"superhuman AI for heads-up no-limit poker\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Superhuman AI for heads-up no-limit poker: Libratus beats top professionals</em>, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2017","quoteLabel":"Paper cue","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Libratus","commentarySections":[{"label":"Paper cue","html":"\"superhuman AI for heads-up no-limit poker\"<br>source：<em>Superhuman AI for heads-up no-limit poker: Libratus beats top professionals</em>, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2017"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Poker added hidden cards, bluffing, and uncertainty to the game-AI story. Unlike chess or Go, the correct action depends on ranges of possible private hands and on what opponents believe you might hold.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Libratus solved a compact abstraction before the match and used real-time subgame solving during difficult hands. It then analyzed each day for exploitable patterns and patched the strategy overnight.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Libratus as a turning point for large imperfect-information games. Its legacy is showing that abstraction, equilibrium reasoning, and targeted repair can defeat elite humans even when the real state is partly hidden.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2017-libratus-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What challenge did Libratus address in poker?","zh":"Libratus 在扑克中主要解决了什么挑战？"},"options":[{"en":"Hidden information and equilibrium reasoning in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em","zh":"一对一无限注德州扑克中的隐藏信息与均衡推理"},{"en":"Recognizing handwritten digits","zh":"识别手写数字"},{"en":"Solving protein folding","zh":"求解蛋白质折叠"},{"en":"Sorting images by color","zh":"按颜色排序图像"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Libratus treated poker as an imperfect-information strategy problem rather than a visible-board search task.","zh":"Libratus 把扑克看作不完全信息策略问题，而不是可见棋盘搜索任务。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2017-libratus"]}]}`

- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Nature paper","zh":"Nature 论文"},"url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-020-03051-4"},{"type":{"en":"Preprint","zh":"预印本"},"label":{"en":"arXiv preprint","zh":"arXiv 预印本"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1911.08265"},{"type":{"en":"Blog","zh":"博客"},"label":{"en":"DeepMind MuZero blog","zh":"DeepMind MuZero 博客"},"url":"https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/muzero-mastering-go-chess-shogi-and-atari-without-rules/"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-nature-paper","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"Nature 论文","en":"Nature paper"},"url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-020-03051-4","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-arxiv-preprint","type":{"zh":"预印本","en":"Preprint"},"label":{"zh":"arXiv 预印本","en":"arXiv preprint"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1911.08265","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-deepmind-muzero-blog","type":{"zh":"博客","en":"Blog"},"label":{"zh":"DeepMind MuZero 博客","en":"DeepMind MuZero blog"},"url":"https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/muzero-mastering-go-chess-shogi-and-atari-without-rules/","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"official-page"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"AlphaZero searched using known rules, while many reinforcement-learning agents learned from pixels without explicit lookahead. MuZero connected these two worlds by learning a model that was useful for planning even when the exact rules were not supplied.","zh":"AlphaZero 依赖已知规则搜索，而许多强化学习智能体从像素学习但缺少显式前瞻。MuZero 通过学习一个对规划有用的模型，把这两个世界连接起来，即使没有提供精确规则也能工作。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Instead of predicting every future observation, MuZero learns a latent dynamics model for rewards, values, policies, and search. The model is judged by whether it helps decisions, not by whether it reconstructs the full world.","zh":"MuZero 不预测每个未来观测，而是学习面向奖励、价值、策略和搜索的潜在动力学模型。这个模型按是否帮助决策来评价，而不是按是否重建完整世界来评价。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat MuZero as a landmark in learned-model planning. Its legacy is showing that model-based reinforcement learning can combine the strengths of AlphaZero-style search with experience-driven model learning.","zh":"专家通常把 MuZero 视为学习模型规划的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于说明：基于模型的强化学习可以结合 AlphaZero 式搜索和经验驱动模型学习的优势。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"AlphaZero 依赖已知规则搜索，而许多强化学习智能体从像素学习但缺少显式前瞻。MuZero 通过学习一个对规划有用的模型，把这两个世界连接起来，即使没有提供精确规则也能工作。","en":"AlphaZero searched using known rules, while many reinforcement-learning agents learned from pixels without explicit lookahead. MuZero connected these two worlds by learning a model that was useful for planning even when the exact rules were not supplied."},"sourceIds":["source-nature-paper"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"MuZero 不预测每个未来观测，而是学习面向奖励、价值、策略和搜索的潜在动力学模型。这个模型按是否帮助决策来评价，而不是按是否重建完整世界来评价。","en":"Instead of predicting every future observation, MuZero learns a latent dynamics model for rewards, values, policies, and search. The model is judged by whether it helps decisions, not by whether it reconstructs the full world."},"sourceIds":["source-nature-paper"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 MuZero 视为学习模型规划的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于说明：基于模型的强化学习可以结合 AlphaZero 式搜索和经验驱动模型学习的优势。","en":"Experts generally treat MuZero as a landmark in learned-model planning. Its legacy is showing that model-based reinforcement learning can combine the strengths of AlphaZero-style search with experience-driven model learning."},"sourceIds":["source-nature-paper"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2019-muzero-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the key difference between MuZero and AlphaZero?","zh":"MuZero 与 AlphaZero 的关键区别是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"MuZero learns a compact model for planning instead of being given exact environment dynamics","zh":"MuZero 学习用于规划的紧凑模型，而不是直接获得精确环境动力学"},{"en":"MuZero cannot use search","zh":"MuZero 不能使用搜索"},{"en":"MuZero only plays poker","zh":"MuZero 只玩扑克"},{"en":"MuZero requires human opening books","zh":"MuZero 需要人类开局库"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"MuZero predicts rewards, values, and policies in a latent model useful for search.","zh":"MuZero 在对搜索有用的潜在模型中预测奖励、价值和策略。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-muzero"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2019-muzero-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"MuZero 与 AlphaZero 的关键区别是什么？","en":"What is the key difference between MuZero and AlphaZero?"},"options":[{"zh":"MuZero 学习用于规划的紧凑模型，而不是直接获得精确环境动力学","en":"MuZero learns a compact model for planning instead of being given exact environment dynamics"},{"zh":"MuZero 不能使用搜索","en":"MuZero cannot use search"},{"zh":"MuZero 只玩扑克","en":"MuZero only plays poker"},{"zh":"MuZero 需要人类开局库","en":"MuZero requires human opening books"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"MuZero 在对搜索有用的潜在模型中预测奖励、价值和策略。","en":"MuZero predicts rewards, values, and policies in a latent model useful for search."},"sourceIds":["source-nature-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-muzero-learned-model"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"MuZero","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>MuZero 学会在没有显式环境规则的情况下进行规划。它只学习搜索所需的紧凑内部模型：策略、价值和奖励。在棋类游戏与 Atari 中，它把 AlphaZero 式规划和从经验中学习模型连接起来。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-muzero_learned-model.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"用学习到的模型进行规划\"","quoteAttribution":"《通过学习模型进行规划以掌握 Atari、围棋、国际象棋和将棋》, Julian Schrittwieser 等，Nature，2020","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：MuZero","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"用学习到的模型进行规划\"<br>source：《通过学习模型进行规划以掌握 Atari、围棋、国际象棋和将棋》, Julian Schrittwieser 等，Nature，2020"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"AlphaZero 依赖已知规则搜索，而许多强化学习智能体从像素学习但缺少显式前瞻。MuZero 通过学习一个对规划有用的模型，把这两个世界连接起来，即使没有提供精确规则也能工作。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"MuZero 不预测每个未来观测，而是学习面向奖励、价值、策略和搜索的潜在动力学模型。这个模型按是否帮助决策来评价，而不是按是否重建完整世界来评价。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 MuZero 视为学习模型规划的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于说明：基于模型的强化学习可以结合 AlphaZero 式搜索和经验驱动模型学习的优势。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-muzero-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the key difference between MuZero and AlphaZero?","zh":"MuZero 与 AlphaZero 的关键区别是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"MuZero learns a compact model for planning instead of being given exact environment dynamics","zh":"MuZero 学习用于规划的紧凑模型，而不是直接获得精确环境动力学"},{"en":"MuZero cannot use search","zh":"MuZero 不能使用搜索"},{"en":"MuZero only plays poker","zh":"MuZero 只玩扑克"},{"en":"MuZero requires human opening books","zh":"MuZero 需要人类开局库"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"MuZero predicts rewards, values, and policies in a latent model useful for search.","zh":"MuZero 在对搜索有用的潜在模型中预测奖励、价值和策略。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-muzero"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"MuZero","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>MuZero 学会在没有显式环境规则的情况下进行规划。它只学习搜索所需的紧凑内部模型：策略、价值和奖励。在棋类游戏与 Atari 中，它把 AlphaZero 式规划和从经验中学习模型连接起来。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-muzero_learned-model.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"用学习到的模型进行规划\"","quoteAttribution":"《通过学习模型进行规划以掌握 Atari、围棋、国际象棋和将棋》, Julian Schrittwieser 等，Nature，2020","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：MuZero","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"用学习到的模型进行规划\"<br>source：《通过学习模型进行规划以掌握 Atari、围棋、国际象棋和将棋》, Julian Schrittwieser 等，Nature，2020"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"AlphaZero 依赖已知规则搜索，而许多强化学习智能体从像素学习但缺少显式前瞻。MuZero 通过学习一个对规划有用的模型，把这两个世界连接起来，即使没有提供精确规则也能工作。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"MuZero 不预测每个未来观测，而是学习面向奖励、价值、策略和搜索的潜在动力学模型。这个模型按是否帮助决策来评价，而不是按是否重建完整世界来评价。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 MuZero 视为学习模型规划的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于说明：基于模型的强化学习可以结合 AlphaZero 式搜索和经验驱动模型学习的优势。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-muzero-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"MuZero 与 AlphaZero 的关键区别是什么？","en":"What is the key difference between MuZero and AlphaZero?"},"options":[{"zh":"MuZero 学习用于规划的紧凑模型，而不是直接获得精确环境动力学","en":"MuZero learns a compact model for planning instead of being given exact environment dynamics"},{"zh":"MuZero 不能使用搜索","en":"MuZero cannot use search"},{"zh":"MuZero 只玩扑克","en":"MuZero only plays poker"},{"zh":"MuZero 需要人类开局库","en":"MuZero requires human opening books"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"MuZero 在对搜索有用的潜在模型中预测奖励、价值和策略。","en":"MuZero predicts rewards, values, and policies in a latent model useful for search."},"sourceIds":["source-nature-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-muzero-learned-model"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"MuZero","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>MuZero learned to plan without being given the exact rules of the environment. It built a compact internal model only for the quantities needed by search: policy, value, and reward. In board games and Atari, it linked AlphaZero-style planning with model learning from experience.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-muzero_learned-model.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"planning with a learned model\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Mastering Atari, Go, chess and shogi by planning with a learned model</em>, Julian Schrittwieser et al., Nature, 2020","quoteLabel":"Paper cue","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: MuZero","commentarySections":[{"label":"Paper cue","html":"\"planning with a learned model\"<br>source：<em>Mastering Atari, Go, chess and shogi by planning with a learned model</em>, Julian Schrittwieser et al., Nature, 2020"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"AlphaZero searched using known rules, while many reinforcement-learning agents learned from pixels without explicit lookahead. MuZero connected these two worlds by learning a model that was useful for planning even when the exact rules were not supplied.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Instead of predicting every future observation, MuZero learns a latent dynamics model for rewards, values, policies, and search. The model is judged by whether it helps decisions, not by whether it reconstructs the full world.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat MuZero as a landmark in learned-model planning. Its legacy is showing that model-based reinforcement learning can combine the strengths of AlphaZero-style search with experience-driven model learning.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-muzero-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What is the key difference between MuZero and AlphaZero?","zh":"MuZero 与 AlphaZero 的关键区别是什么？"},"options":[{"en":"MuZero learns a compact model for planning instead of being given exact environment dynamics","zh":"MuZero 学习用于规划的紧凑模型，而不是直接获得精确环境动力学"},{"en":"MuZero cannot use search","zh":"MuZero 不能使用搜索"},{"en":"MuZero only plays poker","zh":"MuZero 只玩扑克"},{"en":"MuZero requires human opening books","zh":"MuZero 需要人类开局库"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"MuZero predicts rewards, values, and policies in a latent model useful for search.","zh":"MuZero 在对搜索有用的潜在模型中预测奖励、价值和策略。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-muzero"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"MuZero","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>MuZero learned to plan without being given the exact rules of the environment.   - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Science paper","zh":"Science 论文"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aay2400"},{"type":{"en":"News report","zh":"新闻报道"},"label":{"en":"Meta AI Pluribus report","zh":"Meta AI Pluribus 报道"},"url":"https://ai.meta.com/blog/pluribus-first-ai-to-beat-pros-in-6-player-poker/"},{"type":{"en":"News report","zh":"新闻报道"},"label":{"en":"CMU Pluribus release","zh":"CMU Pluribus 新闻稿"},"url":"https://www.cmu.edu/news/stories/archives/2019/july/ai-beats-pros-six-player-poker.html"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-science-paper","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"Science 论文","en":"Science paper"},"url":"https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aay2400","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-meta-ai-pluribus-report","type":{"zh":"新闻报道","en":"News report"},"label":{"zh":"Meta AI Pluribus 报道","en":"Meta AI Pluribus report"},"url":"https://ai.meta.com/blog/pluribus-first-ai-to-beat-pros-in-6-player-poker/","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-cmu-pluribus-release","type":{"zh":"新闻报道","en":"News report"},"label":{"zh":"CMU Pluribus 新闻稿","en":"CMU Pluribus release"},"url":"https://www.cmu.edu/news/stories/archives/2019/july/ai-beats-pros-six-player-poker.html","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Many real strategic settings are neither two-player nor zero-sum in the clean chess sense. Multiplayer poker made that gap concrete by adding several opponents with private information and shifting incentives.","zh":"许多真实策略场景并不是干净的两人零和棋局。多人扑克通过多个拥有私人信息、激励不断变化的对手，把这个差距具体化了。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Pluribus used a compact self-play blueprint as the baseline policy. During play it applied limited-lookahead search to refine decisions without trying to solve the entire six-player game from scratch.","zh":"Pluribus 使用紧凑自我对弈蓝图作为基准策略。在对局中，它用有限前瞻搜索细化决策，而不是从头求解整个六人游戏。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Pluribus as an important demonstration that imperfect-information AI can scale beyond two players. Its legacy is the blueprint-plus-search pattern for messy multi-agent domains where exact equilibrium computation is out of reach.","zh":"专家通常把 Pluribus 视为不完全信息 AI 扩展到两人之外的重要展示。它的长期影响在于提出蓝图加搜索模式，用于那些无法精确计算均衡的复杂多智能体领域。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"许多真实策略场景并不是干净的两人零和棋局。多人扑克通过多个拥有私人信息、激励不断变化的对手，把这个差距具体化了。","en":"Many real strategic settings are neither two-player nor zero-sum in the clean chess sense. Multiplayer poker made that gap concrete by adding several opponents with private information and shifting incentives."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Pluribus 使用紧凑自我对弈蓝图作为基准策略。在对局中，它用有限前瞻搜索细化决策，而不是从头求解整个六人游戏。","en":"Pluribus used a compact self-play blueprint as the baseline policy. During play it applied limited-lookahead search to refine decisions without trying to solve the entire six-player game from scratch."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Pluribus 视为不完全信息 AI 扩展到两人之外的重要展示。它的长期影响在于提出蓝图加搜索模式，用于那些无法精确计算均衡的复杂多智能体领域。","en":"Experts generally treat Pluribus as an important demonstration that imperfect-information AI can scale beyond two players. Its legacy is the blueprint-plus-search pattern for messy multi-agent domains where exact equilibrium computation is out of reach."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2019-pluribus-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Pluribus add beyond Libratus?","zh":"Pluribus 相比 Libratus 主要扩展了什么？"},"options":[{"en":"It handled six-player no-limit Texas hold'em","zh":"它处理六人无限注德州扑克"},{"en":"It removed all hidden information","zh":"它移除了所有隐藏信息"},{"en":"It played only checkers","zh":"它只下跳棋"},{"en":"It used no strategy blueprint","zh":"它不使用策略蓝图"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Pluribus scaled imperfect-information poker AI from heads-up play to a multiplayer table.","zh":"Pluribus 将不完全信息扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到多人牌桌。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-pluribus"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2019-pluribus-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Pluribus 相比 Libratus 主要扩展了什么？","en":"What did Pluribus add beyond Libratus?"},"options":[{"zh":"它处理六人无限注德州扑克","en":"It handled six-player no-limit Texas hold'em"},{"zh":"它移除了所有隐藏信息","en":"It removed all hidden information"},{"zh":"它只下跳棋","en":"It played only checkers"},{"zh":"它不使用策略蓝图","en":"It used no strategy blueprint"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Pluribus 将不完全信息扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到多人牌桌。","en":"Pluribus scaled imperfect-information poker AI from heads-up play to a multiplayer table."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-pluribus-blueprint-search"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2019","title":"Pluribus","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pluribus 将扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到六人无限注德州扑克。它使用紧凑蓝图策略与有限前瞻搜索，同时处理多个对手，把游戏 AI 推向无法只靠单一对手模型的多人场景。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-pluribus_blueprint-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"面向多人扑克的超人 AI\"","quoteAttribution":"《面向多人扑克的超人 AI》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2019","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：Pluribus","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"面向多人扑克的超人 AI\"<br>source：《面向多人扑克的超人 AI》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2019"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"许多真实策略场景并不是干净的两人零和棋局。多人扑克通过多个拥有私人信息、激励不断变化的对手，把这个差距具体化了。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Pluribus 使用紧凑自我对弈蓝图作为基准策略。在对局中，它用有限前瞻搜索细化决策，而不是从头求解整个六人游戏。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Pluribus 视为不完全信息 AI 扩展到两人之外的重要展示。它的长期影响在于提出蓝图加搜索模式，用于那些无法精确计算均衡的复杂多智能体领域。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-pluribus-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Pluribus add beyond Libratus?","zh":"Pluribus 相比 Libratus 主要扩展了什么？"},"options":[{"en":"It handled six-player no-limit Texas hold'em","zh":"它处理六人无限注德州扑克"},{"en":"It removed all hidden information","zh":"它移除了所有隐藏信息"},{"en":"It played only checkers","zh":"它只下跳棋"},{"en":"It used no strategy blueprint","zh":"它不使用策略蓝图"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Pluribus scaled imperfect-information poker AI from heads-up play to a multiplayer table.","zh":"Pluribus 将不完全信息扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到多人牌桌。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-pluribus"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2019","title":"Pluribus","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pluribus 将扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到六人无限注德州扑克。它使用紧凑蓝图策略与有限前瞻搜索，同时处理多个对手，把游戏 AI 推向无法只靠单一对手模型的多人场景。</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-pluribus_blueprint-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"面向多人扑克的超人 AI\"","quoteAttribution":"《面向多人扑克的超人 AI》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2019","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：Pluribus","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"面向多人扑克的超人 AI\"<br>source：《面向多人扑克的超人 AI》, Noam Brown 与 Tuomas Sandholm，Science，2019"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"许多真实策略场景并不是干净的两人零和棋局。多人扑克通过多个拥有私人信息、激励不断变化的对手，把这个差距具体化了。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Pluribus 使用紧凑自我对弈蓝图作为基准策略。在对局中，它用有限前瞻搜索细化决策，而不是从头求解整个六人游戏。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Pluribus 视为不完全信息 AI 扩展到两人之外的重要展示。它的长期影响在于提出蓝图加搜索模式，用于那些无法精确计算均衡的复杂多智能体领域。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-pluribus-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Pluribus 相比 Libratus 主要扩展了什么？","en":"What did Pluribus add beyond Libratus?"},"options":[{"zh":"它处理六人无限注德州扑克","en":"It handled six-player no-limit Texas hold'em"},{"zh":"它移除了所有隐藏信息","en":"It removed all hidden information"},{"zh":"它只下跳棋","en":"It played only checkers"},{"zh":"它不使用策略蓝图","en":"It used no strategy blueprint"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Pluribus 将不完全信息扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到多人牌桌。","en":"Pluribus scaled imperfect-information poker AI from heads-up play to a multiplayer table."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-pluribus-blueprint-search"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2019","title":"Pluribus","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pluribus extended poker AI from heads-up play to six-player no-limit Texas hold'em. It used a compact blueprint strategy plus limited-lookahead search to handle several opponents at once, moving game AI toward multiplayer settings where no single opponent model is enough.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-pluribus_blueprint-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"superhuman AI for multiplayer poker\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Superhuman AI for multiplayer poker</em>, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2019","quoteLabel":"Paper cue","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Pluribus","commentarySections":[{"label":"Paper cue","html":"\"superhuman AI for multiplayer poker\"<br>source：<em>Superhuman AI for multiplayer poker</em>, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2019"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Many real strategic settings are neither two-player nor zero-sum in the clean chess sense. Multiplayer poker made that gap concrete by adding several opponents with private information and shifting incentives.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Pluribus used a compact self-play blueprint as the baseline policy. During play it applied limited-lookahead search to refine decisions without trying to solve the entire six-player game from scratch.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Pluribus as an important demonstration that imperfect-information AI can scale beyond two players. Its legacy is the blueprint-plus-search pattern for messy multi-agent domains where exact equilibrium computation is out of reach.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-pluribus-quiz-1","question":{"en":"What did Pluribus add beyond Libratus?","zh":"Pluribus 相比 Libratus 主要扩展了什么？"},"options":[{"en":"It handled six-player no-limit Texas hold'em","zh":"它处理六人无限注德州扑克"},{"en":"It removed all hidden information","zh":"它移除了所有隐藏信息"},{"en":"It played only checkers","zh":"它只下跳棋"},{"en":"It used no strategy blueprint","zh":"它不使用策略蓝图"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Pluribus scaled imperfect-information poker AI from heads-up play to a multiplayer table.","zh":"Pluribus 将不完全信息扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到多人牌桌。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-pluribus"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2019","title":"Pluribus","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Pluribus extended poker AI from heads-up play to six-player no-limit Texas hold'em. It used a compact blueprint strategy plus limited-lookahead search to handle several opponents at once, moving game AI toward multiplayer settings where no single opponent model is enough.</p>","figures":["",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-pluribus_blueprint-search.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"superhuman AI for multiplayer poker\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Superhuman AI for multiplayer poker</em>, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2019","quoteLabel":"Paper cue","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Pluribus","commentarySections":[{"label":"Paper cue","html":"\"superhuman AI for multiplayer poker\"<br>source：<em>Superhuman AI for multiplayer poker</em>, Noam Brown and Tuomas Sandholm, Science, 2019"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Many real strategic settings are neither two-player nor zero-sum in the clean chess sense. Multiplayer poker made that gap concrete by adding several opponents with private information and shifting incentives.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Pluribus used a compact self-play blueprint as the baseline policy. During play it applied limited-lookahead search to refine decisions without trying to solve the entire six-player game from scratch.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Pluribus as an important demonstration that imperfect-information AI can scale beyond two players. Its legacy is the blueprint-plus-search pattern for messy multi-agent domains where exact equilibrium computation is out of reach.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-pluribus-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"Pluribus 相比 Libratus 主要扩展了什么？","en":"What did Pluribus add beyond Libratus?"},"options":[{"zh":"它处理六人无限注德州扑克","en":"It handled six-player no-limit Texas hold'em"},{"zh":"它移除了所有隐藏信息","en":"It removed all hidden information"},{"zh":"它只下跳棋","en":"It played only checkers"},{"zh":"它不使用策略蓝图","en":"It used no strategy blueprint"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Pluribus 将不完全信息扑克 AI 从一对一扩展到多人牌桌。","en":"Pluribus scaled imperfect-information poker AI from heads-up play to a multiplayer table."},"sourceIds":["source-science-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-pluribus-blueprint-search"]}]}`

### milestone-gaming-ai-2019-suphx

- Kind: changed
- `date`
  - Legacy: `null`
  - Archive: `"2019-2020"`
- `achievement.sources`
  - Legacy: `[{"type":{"en":"Paper","zh":"论文"},"label":{"en":"Suphx arXiv paper","zh":"Suphx arXiv 论文"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.13590"},{"type":{"en":"DOI","zh":"DOI"},"label":{"en":"arXiv DOI page","zh":"arXiv DOI 页面"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2003.13590"},{"type":{"en":"Background paper","zh":"背景论文"},"label":{"en":"Building a Computer Mahjong Player via Deep CNNs","zh":"用深度卷积网络构建麻将程序"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1906.02146"}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"source-suphx-arxiv-paper","type":{"zh":"论文","en":"Paper"},"label":{"zh":"Suphx arXiv 论文","en":"Suphx arXiv paper"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.13590","reliability":"primary","sourceType":"paper"},{"id":"source-arxiv-doi-page","type":{"zh":"DOI","en":"DOI"},"label":{"zh":"arXiv DOI 页面","en":"arXiv DOI page"},"url":"https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2003.13590","reliability":"reference-only","sourceType":"reference-only"},{"id":"source-building-a-computer-mahjong-player-via-deep-cnns","type":{"zh":"背景论文","en":"Background paper"},"label":{"zh":"用深度卷积网络构建麻将程序","en":"Building a Computer Mahjong Player via Deep CNNs"},"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/1906.02146","reliability":"secondary","sourceType":"paper"}]`
- `commentarySections`
  - Legacy: `[{"label":{"en":"Historical Background","zh":"历史背景"},"html":{"en":"Mahjong is more difficult for direct search than chess-like board games because players see only part of the state. Every discard affects hand value, safety, turn order, and the hidden intentions of three opponents.","zh":"麻将比类棋盘游戏更难直接搜索，因为玩家只能看到部分状态。每一次打牌都会影响手牌价值、安全性、巡目节奏，以及三个对手的隐藏意图。"}},{"label":{"en":"Core Idea","zh":"核心思想"},"html":{"en":"Suphx learned from human games and then improved through reinforcement learning. Its additional reward prediction, oracle guiding, and policy adaptation components helped it reason about delayed points, hidden tiles, and changing table context.","zh":"Suphx 先从人类牌谱学习，再通过强化学习改进。额外的奖励预测、oracle guiding 和策略适配组件，帮助它推理延迟得分、隐藏牌和不断变化的牌桌上下文。"}},{"label":{"en":"Long-Term Legacy","zh":"长期影响"},"html":{"en":"Experts generally treat Suphx as a signal that deep reinforcement learning can handle multi-player stochastic imperfect-information games beyond poker. Its legacy is broadening the game-AI testbed from clean boards and two-player equilibrium toward messy cultural games with rich hidden state.","zh":"专家通常把 Suphx 视为一个信号：深度强化学习可以处理扑克之外的多人随机不完全信息游戏。它的长期影响在于把游戏 AI 试验场从干净棋盘和两人均衡，扩展到具有丰富隐藏状态的复杂文化游戏。"}}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"historical-background","label":{"zh":"历史背景","en":"Historical Background"},"html":{"zh":"麻将比类棋盘游戏更难直接搜索，因为玩家只能看到部分状态。每一次打牌都会影响手牌价值、安全性、巡目节奏，以及三个对手的隐藏意图。","en":"Mahjong is more difficult for direct search than chess-like board games because players see only part of the state. Every discard affects hand value, safety, turn order, and the hidden intentions of three opponents."},"sourceIds":["source-suphx-arxiv-paper"]},{"id":"core-idea","label":{"zh":"核心思想","en":"Core Idea"},"html":{"zh":"Suphx 先从人类牌谱学习，再通过强化学习改进。额外的奖励预测、oracle guiding 和策略适配组件，帮助它推理延迟得分、隐藏牌和不断变化的牌桌上下文。","en":"Suphx learned from human games and then improved through reinforcement learning. Its additional reward prediction, oracle guiding, and policy adaptation components helped it reason about delayed points, hidden tiles, and changing table context."},"sourceIds":["source-suphx-arxiv-paper"]},{"id":"long-term-legacy","label":{"zh":"长期影响","en":"Long-Term Legacy"},"html":{"zh":"专家通常把 Suphx 视为一个信号：深度强化学习可以处理扑克之外的多人随机不完全信息游戏。它的长期影响在于把游戏 AI 试验场从干净棋盘和两人均衡，扩展到具有丰富隐藏状态的复杂文化游戏。","en":"Experts generally treat Suphx as a signal that deep reinforcement learning can handle multi-player stochastic imperfect-information games beyond poker. Its legacy is broadening the game-AI testbed from clean boards and two-player equilibrium toward messy cultural games with rich hidden state."},"sourceIds":["source-suphx-arxiv-paper"]}]`
- `quizzes`
  - Legacy: `[{"id":"2019-suphx-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why is Japanese mahjong difficult for AI?","zh":"为什么日本麻将对 AI 很难？"},"options":[{"en":"It combines hidden tiles, stochastic draws, four players, and complex scoring","zh":"它同时包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、四名玩家和复杂计分"},{"en":"Every tile is public from the start","zh":"所有牌一开始都是公开的"},{"en":"There is only one legal move","zh":"每步只有一个合法行动"},{"en":"The game has no scoring","zh":"这个游戏没有计分"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Suphx used deep reinforcement learning components to reason under hidden information and delayed rewards.","zh":"Suphx 使用深度强化学习组件，在隐藏信息和延迟奖励下进行推理。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-suphx"]}]`
  - Archive: `[{"id":"2019-suphx-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么日本麻将对 AI 很难？","en":"Why is Japanese mahjong difficult for AI?"},"options":[{"zh":"它同时包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、四名玩家和复杂计分","en":"It combines hidden tiles, stochastic draws, four players, and complex scoring"},{"zh":"所有牌一开始都是公开的","en":"Every tile is public from the start"},{"zh":"每步只有一个合法行动","en":"There is only one legal move"},{"zh":"这个游戏没有计分","en":"The game has no scoring"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Suphx 使用深度强化学习组件，在隐藏信息和延迟奖励下进行推理。","en":"Suphx used deep reinforcement learning components to reason under hidden information and delayed rewards."},"sourceIds":["source-suphx-arxiv-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-suphx-mahjong-policy"]}]`
- `viewModel.zh`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"Suphx：深度强化学习麻将 AI","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Suphx 将深度强化学习带入日本麻将，这是一种四人不完全信息游戏，包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、复杂计分和长期风险权衡。它使用监督预训练、自我对弈强化学习、全局奖励预测、oracle guiding 和运行时策略适配，在天凤平台达到超过绝大多数注册段位玩家的水平。</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-suphx_mahjong-policy.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"用深度强化学习掌握麻将\"","quoteAttribution":"《Suphx：用深度强化学习掌握麻将》, Junjie Li 等，arXiv，2020","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：日本麻将 / Suphx","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"用深度强化学习掌握麻将\"<br>source：《Suphx：用深度强化学习掌握麻将》, Junjie Li 等，arXiv，2020"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"麻将比类棋盘游戏更难直接搜索，因为玩家只能看到部分状态。每一次打牌都会影响手牌价值、安全性、巡目节奏，以及三个对手的隐藏意图。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Suphx 先从人类牌谱学习，再通过强化学习改进。额外的奖励预测、oracle guiding 和策略适配组件，帮助它推理延迟得分、隐藏牌和不断变化的牌桌上下文。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Suphx 视为一个信号：深度强化学习可以处理扑克之外的多人随机不完全信息游戏。它的长期影响在于把游戏 AI 试验场从干净棋盘和两人均衡，扩展到具有丰富隐藏状态的复杂文化游戏。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-suphx-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why is Japanese mahjong difficult for AI?","zh":"为什么日本麻将对 AI 很难？"},"options":[{"en":"It combines hidden tiles, stochastic draws, four players, and complex scoring","zh":"它同时包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、四名玩家和复杂计分"},{"en":"Every tile is public from the start","zh":"所有牌一开始都是公开的"},{"en":"There is only one legal move","zh":"每步只有一个合法行动"},{"en":"The game has no scoring","zh":"这个游戏没有计分"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Suphx used deep reinforcement learning components to reason under hidden information and delayed rewards.","zh":"Suphx 使用深度强化学习组件，在隐藏信息和延迟奖励下进行推理。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-suphx"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"Suphx：深度强化学习麻将 AI","category":"AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进","subtitle":"以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Suphx 将深度强化学习带入日本麻将，这是一种四人不完全信息游戏，包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、复杂计分和长期风险权衡。它使用监督预训练、自我对弈强化学习、全局奖励预测、oracle guiding 和运行时策略适配，在天凤平台达到超过绝大多数注册段位玩家的水平。</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-suphx_mahjong-policy.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"用深度强化学习掌握麻将\"","quoteAttribution":"《Suphx：用深度强化学习掌握麻将》, Junjie Li 等，arXiv，2020","quoteLabel":"论文线索","quotePage":"AI 棋牌分支：日本麻将 / Suphx","commentarySections":[{"label":"论文线索","html":"\"用深度强化学习掌握麻将\"<br>source：《Suphx：用深度强化学习掌握麻将》, Junjie Li 等，arXiv，2020"},{"label":"历史背景","html":"麻将比类棋盘游戏更难直接搜索，因为玩家只能看到部分状态。每一次打牌都会影响手牌价值、安全性、巡目节奏，以及三个对手的隐藏意图。","link":null},{"label":"核心思想","html":"Suphx 先从人类牌谱学习，再通过强化学习改进。额外的奖励预测、oracle guiding 和策略适配组件，帮助它推理延迟得分、隐藏牌和不断变化的牌桌上下文。","link":null},{"label":"长期影响","html":"专家通常把 Suphx 视为一个信号：深度强化学习可以处理扑克之外的多人随机不完全信息游戏。它的长期影响在于把游戏 AI 试验场从干净棋盘和两人均衡，扩展到具有丰富隐藏状态的复杂文化游戏。","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-suphx-quiz-1","storylineId":"","question":{"zh":"为什么日本麻将对 AI 很难？","en":"Why is Japanese mahjong difficult for AI?"},"options":[{"zh":"它同时包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、四名玩家和复杂计分","en":"It combines hidden tiles, stochastic draws, four players, and complex scoring"},{"zh":"所有牌一开始都是公开的","en":"Every tile is public from the start"},{"zh":"每步只有一个合法行动","en":"There is only one legal move"},{"zh":"这个游戏没有计分","en":"The game has no scoring"}],"answerIndex":0,"answer":0,"explanation":{"zh":"Suphx 使用深度强化学习组件，在隐藏信息和延迟奖励下进行推理。","en":"Suphx used deep reinforcement learning components to reason under hidden information and delayed rewards."},"sourceIds":["source-suphx-arxiv-paper"],"assetIds":["asset-2019-suphx-mahjong-policy"]}]}`
- `viewModel.en`
  - Legacy: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"Suphx: Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Suphx brought deep reinforcement learning to Japanese mahjong, a four-player imperfect-information game with hidden tiles, stochastic draws, complex scoring, and long-horizon risk tradeoffs. It used supervised pretraining, self-play reinforcement learning, global reward prediction, oracle guiding, and run-time policy adaptation to reach a level above most ranked Tenhou players.</p>","figures":["","",""],"photos":["resources/images/bench-council-ai100/explainers/2019-suphx_mahjong-policy.svg"],"primaryVideo":null,"quoteHtml":"\"Mastering Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning\"","quoteAttribution":"<em>Suphx: Mastering Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning</em>, Junjie Li et al., arXiv, 2020","quoteLabel":"Paper cue","quotePage":"Gaming AI branch: Japanese Mahjong / Suphx","commentarySections":[{"label":"Paper cue","html":"\"Mastering Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning\"<br>source：<em>Suphx: Mastering Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning</em>, Junjie Li et al., arXiv, 2020"},{"label":"Historical Background","html":"Mahjong is more difficult for direct search than chess-like board games because players see only part of the state. Every discard affects hand value, safety, turn order, and the hidden intentions of three opponents.","link":null},{"label":"Core Idea","html":"Suphx learned from human games and then improved through reinforcement learning. Its additional reward prediction, oracle guiding, and policy adaptation components helped it reason about delayed points, hidden tiles, and changing table context.","link":null},{"label":"Long-Term Legacy","html":"Experts generally treat Suphx as a signal that deep reinforcement learning can handle multi-player stochastic imperfect-information games beyond poker. Its legacy is broadening the game-AI testbed from clean boards and two-player equilibrium toward messy cultural games with rich hidden state.","link":null}],"quizzes":[{"id":"2019-suphx-quiz-1","question":{"en":"Why is Japanese mahjong difficult for AI?","zh":"为什么日本麻将对 AI 很难？"},"options":[{"en":"It combines hidden tiles, stochastic draws, four players, and complex scoring","zh":"它同时包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、四名玩家和复杂计分"},{"en":"Every tile is public from the start","zh":"所有牌一开始都是公开的"},{"en":"There is only one legal move","zh":"每步只有一个合法行动"},{"en":"The game has no scoring","zh":"这个游戏没有计分"}],"answerIndex":0,"explanation":{"en":"Suphx used deep reinforcement learning components to reason under hidden information and delayed rewards.","zh":"Suphx 使用深度强化学习组件，在隐藏信息和延迟奖励下进行推理。"},"source":{"label":{"en":"Gaming AI branch notes","zh":"AI 棋牌分支内容"}},"tags":["gaming-ai","2019-suphx"]}]}`
  - Archive: `{"year":"2019-2020","title":"Suphx: Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning","category":"AI in Board & Tabletop Games","subtitle":"Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning","location":"","descriptionHtml":"<p>Suphx brought deep reinforcement learning to Japanese mahjong, a four-player imperfect-information game with hidden tiles, stochastic draws, complex scoring, and long-horizon risk tradeoffs.
